M01_Q01.stem: What are the acceptable thresholds for particulate matter for all spaces except Commercial Kitchens and Industrial spaces in unpolluted regions in Part 1: Meet Thresholds for Particulate Matter of Feature A01: Air Quality?

options.text: PM2.5: 15 ug/M or lower and PM10: 50 ug/m or lower.
PM2.5: 50 ug/M or lower and PM10: 15 ug/m or lower.
PM2.5: 10 ug/M or lower and PM10: 2.5 ug/m or lower.
PM2.5: 25 ug/M or lower and PM10: 75 ug/m or lower.

M01_Q01.explanation: A01 Air Quality, Part 1 Meet Thresholds for Particulate Matter 要求一般 occupiable spaces 在未採 polluted region modified path 時達到 PM2.5 15 µg/m³ or lower 與 PM10 50 µg/m³ or lower。Commercial Kitchen Spaces 與 Industrial 另有 PM2.5 35 µg/m³ 的規則，不能混用。

B.gap: 把 PM2.5 與 PM10 的嚴格程度顛倒，誤認粗細懸浮微粒門檻。
B.followup: 在 A01 Part 1 的一般空間門檻中，哪一種粒徑較小、因此應有較低的 µg/m³ 上限？

C.gap: 套用了過度嚴格且不存在的 PM10 數值，混淆 enhanced threshold。
C.followup: A01 Part 1 是 precondition 門檻；若看到 PM2.5 10 µg/m³，你會先想到 A01 還是 A05？

D.gap: 混入 polluted region 的 PM2.5 25 門檻，又錯放 PM10 上限。
D.followup: A01 Part 1 modified thresholds 適用於年均 outdoor PM2.5 多高的地區，PM10 是否變成 75？

M01_Q02.stem: In Feature A01: Air Quality, what is the acceptable threshold for particulate matter in commercial kitchens?
M01_Q02.explanation: A01 Air Quality, Part 1 Meet Thresholds for Particulate Matter 對 Commercial Kitchen Spaces & Industrial 的 acceptable threshold 是 PM2.5 35 µg/m³ or lower。這不是一般空間的 PM2.5 15 µg/m³ 門檻。

D.gap: 把 commercial kitchen 誤套一般 occupiable spaces 的 PM2.5 門檻。
D.followup: A01 Part 1 在 Commercial Kitchen Spaces & Industrial 下，是否仍使用一般空間的 PM2.5 15 µg/m³？

B.gap: 混淆 polluted region modified threshold 與 commercial kitchen 規則。
B.followup: PM2.5 25 µg/m³ 是哪個 A01 Part 1 路徑的數值，與商業廚房條件有何不同？

C.gap: 抓到 35 數字卻選錯污染物，忽略商業廚房列的是 PM2.5。
C.followup: A01 Part 1 的 Commercial Kitchen Spaces & Industrial 欄位列出的是 PM2.5 還是 PM10？

M01_Q03.stem: What is the verification method for Part 1: Meet Thresholds for Particulate Matter, Option 1 of Feature A01: Air Quality in all spaces except commercial kitchens and industrial spaces?
M01_Q03.explanation: A01 Air Quality, Part 1 Meet Thresholds for Particulate Matter is performance-based: occupiable spaces must demonstrate PM2.5 15 µg/m³ or lower and PM10 50 µg/m³ or lower. Because the requirement is measured indoor contaminant concentration, the verification method is a Performance Test by the WELL Performance Testing process.

B.gap: 把實測污染物濃度誤當成設計文件或規格書審查。
B.followup: A01 Part 1 要證明 PM2.5 與 PM10 已低於門檻，單靠 Technical Document 能反映現場濃度嗎？

C.gap: 混淆年度監測資料提交與初次 performance verification。
C.followup: A01 Part 5 才要求 pollutants annual monitoring；Part 1 Option 1 的現場門檻應如何驗？

D.gap: 誤以為 owner 聲明可取代現場空氣品質測試。
D.followup: 當題目問 PM2.5 15 µg/m³ 與 PM10 50 µg/m³ 是否達標時，誰需要量測現場數值？

M01_Q04.stem: In a project with regularly occupied spaces at or below grade, where should the radon test be performed for Feature A01: Air Quality?
M01_Q04.explanation: A01 Air Quality, Part 4 Meet Thresholds for Radon applies to regularly occupied spaces at or below grade. It requires radon to be 0.15 Bq/L [4 pCi/L] or lower, with one test per 25,000 ft² of regularly occupied space at or below grade.

C.gap: 過度限縮為最低樓層，忽略所有 at or below grade 占用空間。
C.followup: A01 Part 4 說的是 lowest occupied level，還是 regularly occupied spaces at or below grade？

D.gap: 選到與 radon 風險位置相反的高樓層，忽略 below-grade 條件。
D.followup: Radon 測試在 A01 Part 4 為何特別限定 at or below grade 的 regularly occupied spaces？

B.gap: 把 below grade 理解成任何地下空間，忽略 regularly occupied。
B.followup: A01 Part 4 的測試面積基準是 unoccupied basement，還是 regularly occupied space？

M01_Q05.stem: At an existing office building campus, signage indicating an outdoor smoking ban is posted at all building entrances. The signs indicate the ban on smoking within 7.5 m (25 ft) of all building entrances, operable windows, building air intakes and regularly occupied exterior building spaces. What signage must be added to the courtyard areas more than 7.5 m (25 ft) from building entrances to meet the requirements of Part 2: Prohibit Outdoor Smoking of Feature A02: Smoke-Free Environment?

options.text: Contact information for a smoking cessation program, posted every 15 m (50 ft) along the edge of the no smoking area.
The local municipal ordinance on smoking in exterior public areas, posted every 15 m (50 ft) along the edge of the no smoking area.
The location of designated smoking areas, posted every 30 m (100 ft) along walkways.
The hazards of smoking, posted at ground level every 30 m (100 ft) along walkways.

M01_Q05.explanation: A02 Smoke-Free Environment, Part 2 Prohibit Outdoor Smoking requires that if any outdoor areas within the project boundary allow smoking, signs along walkways must be no more than 100 ft [30 m] apart and describe the hazards of smoking. The 25 ft [7.5 m] ban around entrances, operable windows and air intakes is a separate minimum exclusion zone.

B.gap: 把 WELL signage requirement 誤解為張貼地方禁菸法規。
B.followup: A02 Part 2 對允許吸菸的戶外區域，要求標示內容是 municipal ordinance 還是 smoking hazards？

A.gap: 混淆健康促進資源與禁菸邊界內必要警示標示。
A.followup: A02 Part 2 的 walkway signage 是要提供戒菸聯絡資訊，還是描述 smoking 的危害？

C.gap: 只注意指定吸菸區位置，漏掉標示必須描述吸菸危害。
C.followup: 若 courtyard 仍允許 smoking，A02 Part 2 要每 100 ft 內的 signs 傳達哪一類資訊？

M01_Q06.stem: An office building's air quality test has met the minimum requirement for ozone in Part 3: Inorganic Gases of Feature A01: Air Quality. What other minimum standard is also required in Part 3 of that feature for WELL Certification?
M01_Q06.explanation: A01 Air Quality, Part 3 Meet Thresholds for Inorganic Gases pairs ozone with carbon monoxide for all spaces except Commercial Kitchen Spaces & Industrial. The standard threshold is carbon monoxide 10 mg/m³ [9 ppm] or lower, while ozone is 100 µg/m³ [51 ppb] or lower.

A.gap: 混淆 Part 1 particulate matter 與 Part 3 inorganic gases。
A.followup: A01 Part 3 標題是 Inorganic Gases；PM2.5 是 gas 還是 particulate matter？

B.gap: 把 Part 2 organic gas 的 formaldehyde 門檻放到 inorganic gases。
B.followup: Formaldehyde 50 µg/m³ 在 A01 中屬於 Part 2 Organic Gases，為何不屬於 Part 3？

C.gap: 同時誤選 PM10 與不存在的 35 門檻，未分清污染物類型。
C.followup: A01 Part 3 與 ozone 同列的另一項是 CO，還是 PM10 這類 particulate matter？

M01_Q07.stem: A new office building in Seattle is in its post-occupancy performance test phase by a WELL Performance Testing Agent. What is the minimum threshold for formaldehyde in Part 2: Meet Thresholds for Organic Gases of Feature A01: Air Quality?
M01_Q07.explanation: A01 Air Quality, Part 2 Meet Thresholds for Organic Gases requires laboratory-based VOC thresholds in occupiable spaces, including formaldehyde 50 µg/m³ or lower. The same Part also lists benzene 10 µg/m³ and toluene 300 µg/m³, which are different pollutants.

D.gap: 把 benzene 的 10 µg/m³ 門檻誤套到 formaldehyde。
D.followup: A01 Part 2 同列 benzene 與 formaldehyde；兩者的 µg/m³ 門檻分別是多少？

B.gap: 選到標準未列的寬鬆數值，低估 formaldehyde 控制要求。
B.followup: 在 A01 Part 2 的 organic gases 表中，formaldehyde 是否允許到 150 µg/m³？

A.gap: 把 toluene 300 µg/m³ 門檻誤認為 formaldehyde。
A.followup: A01 Part 2 中 300 µg/m³ 對應哪一種 VOC，而 formaldehyde 的門檻是多少？

M01_Q08.stem: Which of the following features from the Air concept is a precondition for WELL Certification?
M01_Q08.explanation: A02 Smoke-Free Environment is listed as a WELL v2 Air precondition, and its Parts require indoor smoking prohibition plus outdoor smoking restrictions and signage. A05, A06 and A10 are optimizations with point values rather than required preconditions.

B.gap: 把 enhanced performance optimization 誤認為 certification precondition。
B.followup: A05 Enhanced Air Quality 有 points；在 WELL Air 清單中它標示為 precondition 還是 optimization？

A.gap: 混淆 A03 基本通風 precondition 與 A06 enhanced ventilation optimization。
A.followup: Ventilation Design 中哪個 feature 是基本 precondition，哪個是增加 outdoor air 的 optimization？

C.gap: 把 combustion source control 類 optimization 誤判為必要門檻。
C.followup: A10 Part 1 Manage Combustion 有 point value；這表示它是必做前提還是加分項？

M01_Q09.stem: An office building has several balconies and a rooftop accessible by building occupants. According to Part 2: Prohibit Outdoor Smoking of Feature A02: Smoke-Free Environment, there must be signage at all outdoor areas in the project's boundary. What is the verification method required for this feature?
M01_Q09.explanation: A02 Smoke-Free Environment, Part 2 Prohibit Outdoor Smoking requires smoking and e-cigarettes to be prohibited on decks, patios, balconies, rooftops and other occupiable outdoor areas above ground level, with signage clearly communicating the ban. Because the requirement is visible site signage, compliance is verified with On-site Photographs.

A.gap: 把可視化 signage 證據誤當成一般技術文件提交。
A.followup: A02 Part 2 要證明 balconies 與 rooftop 已設禁菸標示，哪種證據最能呈現現場狀態？

D.gap: 誤以為禁菸標示需要持續數據報告，混淆監測型 feature。
D.followup: A02 Part 2 是 signage 與 policy 行為要求，是否涉及 pollutants 的 ongoing sensor data？

B.gap: 只想到政策排程，忽略題目問 signage 的現場照片證據。
B.followup: 如果要確認 rooftop 實際有禁菸 signage，Policy Schedule 與 On-site Photographs 哪個更直接？

M01_Q10.stem: What is the maximum level of carbon monoxide for all spaces in Part 3: Meet Threshold for Inorganic Gases of Feature A05: Enhanced Air Quality?
M01_Q10.explanation: A05 Enhanced Air Quality, Part 3 Meet Enhanced Thresholds for Inorganic Gases requires carbon monoxide 7 mg/m³ [6 ppm] or lower for all spaces. The same Part also lists nitrogen dioxide 40 µg/m³ [21 ppb] or lower, which uses different units.

B.gap: 把 organic gas acetaldehyde 數值混進 inorganic gases 題目。
B.followup: A05 Part 3 只列 CO 與 nitrogen dioxide；140 µg/m³ 在 A05 Part 2 對應哪個污染物？

D.gap: 把 nitrogen dioxide 門檻誤認為 carbon monoxide 門檻。
D.followup: A05 Part 3 中 40 µg/m³ 是 nitrogen dioxide；CO 使用的單位和數值是什麼？

C.gap: 選到過寬且不存在的 CO 上限，未區分 enhanced threshold。
C.followup: A05 是 Enhanced Air Quality；它的 CO 門檻會比 A01 的 10 mg/m³ 更嚴還是更鬆？

M01_Q11.stem: In mechanically ventilated spaces, ventilation systems are designed to meet supply and exhaust rates set in one or more of the following verification guidelines:
M01_Q11.explanation: A03 Ventilation Design, Part 1 Ensure Adequate Ventilation requires mechanically ventilated projects to meet supply and exhaust rates from listed ventilation guidelines covering at least 90% of project area. The listed mechanical paths include ASHRAE 62.1-2010 or newer and ASHRAE 62.2-2016.

D.gap: 混入 CIBSE AM10，誤把 natural ventilation 指南用於 mechanical path。
D.followup: A03 Part 1 中 CIBSE AM10 出現在 naturally ventilated Option，還是 mechanically ventilated Option？

A.gap: 選到自然通風常見指南組合，未對準 mechanical ventilation。
A.followup: 題目指定 mechanically ventilated spaces；A03 Part 1 機械通風清單是否以 ASHRAE 62 系列為核心？

B.gap: 把 thermal comfort 標準 ASHRAE 55 誤當通風量標準。
B.followup: ASHRAE 55 主要處理 thermal comfort，A03 Part 1 要的是 ventilation rates 還是熱舒適？

M01_Q12.stem: In naturally ventilated spaces with no mechanical ventilation, what requirements must be met for at least 90% of the project?
M01_Q12.explanation: A03 Ventilation Design, Part 1 Ensure Adequate Ventilation says naturally ventilated projects with no mechanical ventilation must use design criteria describing ventilation rates for at least 90% of project area. One accepted reference is CIBSE AM10: Natural Ventilation in Non-Domestic Buildings, Section 2.4 and Chapter 4.

B.gap: 選到非 A03 列名的 ASHRAE 編號，缺乏標準對應。
B.followup: A03 Part 1 自然通風清單列的是 ASHRAE 62.1 Natural Ventilation Procedure，還是 ASHRAE 63？

D.gap: 接近 AS 1668.4-2012 但編號錯誤，混淆澳洲標準。
D.followup: A03 Part 1 的 Australian natural ventilation reference 是 AS 1668.4-2012 還是 AS 1669.2-2012？

A.gap: 把 thermal comfort 標準誤當自然通風設計計算指南。
A.followup: A03 Part 1 要描述 ventilation rates，ASHRAE 55 是否是 ventilation rate design criterion？

M01_Q13.stem: The use of UVGI is required for which of the following features?

options.text: Feature A14: Microbe and Mold Control

M01_Q13.explanation: A14 Microbe and Mold Control, Part 1 Implement Ultraviolet Air Treatment requires UV system design or maintenance strategies for cooling coils and drain pans. Central air handling units use ultraviolet lamps to irradiate cooling coil and drain pan surfaces.

C.gap: 把提高通風效率與 UVGI 微生物控制混為一談。
C.followup: A06 Part 2 著重 displacement 或 personalized ventilation；哪個 A14 Part 1 元件要用 ultraviolet lamps？

B.gap: 把基本空氣品質測試門檻誤認為設備型 UVGI 要求。
B.followup: A01 是污染物 threshold feature；它是否要求 cooling coils 與 drain pans 的 UVGI？

A.gap: 混淆 particle filtration media filters 與 UVGI 空氣處理。
A.followup: A12 Part 1 的核心是 MERV/M6/F8 過濾等級，UVGI 是哪個 feature 的 Part 名稱？

M01_Q14.stem: Which of the following is NOT a part of Feature A04: Construction Pollution Management?
M01_Q14.explanation: A04 Construction Pollution Management, Part 1 Mitigate Construction Pollution includes duct protection, filter replacement when permanent ventilation operates during construction, and moisture and dust management. Envelope commissioning belongs to A09 Pollution Infiltration Management, Part 2 Perform Envelope Commissioning.

B.gap: 未辨認 duct sealing/cleaning 是 A04 施工污染管理要求。
B.followup: A04 Part 1 的第一組要求是否要求 ducts during construction 被保護或清潔？

D.gap: 忽略施工期間使用永久通風系統時的 filter replacement 條款。
D.followup: A04 Part 1 若永久 ventilation system 施工中運轉，filters 在 occupancy 前要如何處理？

C.gap: 把 moisture and dust management 誤判為非施工污染策略。
C.followup: A04 Part 1 是否列出 absorptive materials 保護、隔離作業區與 walk-off mats 等 dust procedures？

M01_Q15.stem: What are the minimum dimensions required for entryway walk-off systems?

options.text: At least the width of the doorway and 3m (10ft) long in the direction of travel.
At least 2m (6ft) wide and 4m (12ft) long in the direction of travel.
At least 2m (6ft) wide and 3m (10ft) long in the direction of travel.
At least the width of the doorway and 2m (6ft) long in the direction of travel.

M01_Q15.explanation: A09 Pollution Infiltration Management, Part 1 Design Healthy Entryways requires entryway systems at regularly used entrances to be at least the width of the entrance and 10 ft [3 m] long in the primary direction of travel. The length may be the sum of indoor and outdoor portions.

D.gap: 抓對 doorway width 但低估 required travel length 為 2m。
D.followup: A09 Part 1 對 walk-off system 的 primary direction of travel 要求是 6 ft 還是 10 ft？

C.gap: 抓對 3m 長度但把寬度固定為 2m，忽略 entrance width。
C.followup: A09 Part 1 的寬度基準是固定 2m，還是至少等於 actual entrance width？

B.gap: 選到比標準更長且固定寬度的不存在尺寸要求。
B.followup: A09 Part 1 是否要求 4m 長，還是只要求 10 ft [3 m] 並至少入口同寬？

M01_Q16.stem: An office space is being constructed on the 5th floor of a downtown tower. According to Feature A03: Ventilation Design, when is the ideal time to perform testing and balancing on the HVAC system in this project?
M01_Q16.explanation: A03 Ventilation Design, Part 1 Ensure Adequate Ventilation states that newly installed mechanically ventilated systems must be designed to meet listed supply and exhaust rates and are scheduled to be tested and balanced after project occupancy. Existing systems instead must have been tested and balanced within the last five years.

A.gap: 套用一般交屋前測試直覺，忽略 A03 明定 after occupancy。
A.followup: A03 Part 1 對 newly installed ventilation systems 的 testing and balancing 時點寫在 occupancy 前還是後？

B.gap: 把 commissioning 流程節點誤當成 A03 指定測平衡時點。
B.followup: 題目問 A03 Ventilation Design；條文是否使用 after commissioning，或明確說 after project occupancy？

D.gap: 把施工完成前程序誤認為可代表 occupied condition 下的平衡測試。
D.followup: A03 Part 1 為何會要求在 project occupancy 後安排 ventilation system testing and balancing？

M01_Q17.stem: In Part 2: Meet Enhanced Thresholds for Organic Gases of Feature A05: Enhanced Air Quality, which thresholds are to be met?

options.text: Formaldehyde 9ug/m3 or lower & PM 2.5 12 ug/m3 or lower.
Formaldehyde 9 ug/m3 or lower & Toluene 300 ug/m3 or lower.
Formaldehyde 9 ug/m3 or lower & PM10 20ug/m3 or lower.
PM 2.5 12 ug/m3 or lower & Toluene 300 ug/m3 or lower.

M01_Q17.explanation: A05 Enhanced Air Quality, Part 2 Meet Enhanced Thresholds for Organic Gases requires several VOC thresholds, including formaldehyde 9 µg/m³ or lower and toluene 300 µg/m³ or lower. PM2.5 and PM10 thresholds belong to A05 Part 1, not the organic gases Part.

A.gap: 混入 particulate matter PM2.5，未聚焦 organic gases 清單。
A.followup: A05 Part 2 的 Organic Gases 是否包含 PM2.5，還是 PM2.5 在 Part 1 particulate matter？

D.gap: 抓到 toluene 但搭配了錯誤的 PM2.5 threshold 類別。
D.followup: 若題目限定 Organic Gases，A05 Part 2 應同時選 VOC 名稱，還是可混入 PM thresholds？

C.gap: 混入 PM10 20 µg/m³ 這個 enhanced particulate threshold。
C.followup: A05 Part 1 的 2-point particulate threshold 有 PM10 20 µg/m³；它是否屬於 Part 2？

M01_Q18.stem: For naturally ventilated spaces, it is necessary to ensure that adequate outdoor air quality & _____________ are met.
M01_Q18.explanation: A03 Ventilation Design states in its natural ventilation rationale that naturally ventilated spaces must ensure adequate outdoor air quality and noise levels. In Part 1 Ensure Adequate Ventilation, natural ventilation paths also require design criteria for at least 90% of project area and outdoor PM thresholds such as PM2.5 less than 15 µg/m³ under the standard path.

D.gap: 選到 outdoor air quality 的一個參數，未補上並列的 noise levels。
D.followup: A03 的自然通風說明已提 outdoor air quality；空格要補的是另一個環境條件，PM2.5 是否重複？

A.gap: 把熱舒適議題帶入自然通風要求，偏離 A03 文字。
A.followup: A03 Ventilation Design 的自然通風概述明說 outdoor air quality 與哪一項條件需同時滿足？

C.gap: 把 mechanical systems 的維護重點誤套到自然通風條件。
C.followup: A03 對 mechanically ventilated projects 提到 maintenance；naturally ventilated spaces 特別還要考慮什麼環境干擾？

M01_Q19.stem: Since it is difficult to test for every potential pollutant in the indoor air of a building, what easily detectable pollutant serves as a proxy for other indoor pollutants?
M01_Q19.explanation: A06 Enhanced Ventilation Design explains that because testing every potential pollutant is difficult, carbon dioxide is easy to detect and serves as a proxy for other indoor pollutants. In Part 1 Increase Outdoor Air Supply, DCV paths use CO2 thresholds such as 900 ppm or 500 ppm above outdoor levels.

C.gap: 混淆 CO 中毒污染物與 CO2 作為通風稀釋 proxy 的角色。
C.followup: A06 Part 1 的 demand-controlled ventilation 監測 threshold 是 carbon monoxide 還是 carbon dioxide？

A.gap: 把 particulate matter 指標誤認為 occupancy-related ventilation proxy。
A.followup: PM2.5 能代表戶外粒狀污染；A06 用哪個 gas 來推估人員與室內污染累積？

B.gap: 把濕度舒適或霉菌風險參數誤當污染物 proxy。
B.followup: A06 的 CO2 proxy 與 DCV 控制有關；humidity 是否用於 900 ppm 這類門檻？

M01_Q20.stem: In Tokyo, a new mixed-use complex is being planned to replace a retired railyard. The ambient air has a high concentration of small particulates. According to Feature A12: Air Filtration, what is the project team required to install in order to protect the building occupants from exposure to the particulates?

options.text: Adequate media filters based on the annual average PM 2.5 of the area.

M01_Q20.explanation: A12 Air Filtration, Part 1 Implement Particle Filtration requires media filters in the ventilation system to filter outdoor air supplied to the space according to annual average outdoor PM2.5. The table scales minimum PM2.5 removal from at least 80% for 23 µg/m³ or less to at least 95% for 40 µg/m³ or greater.

A.gap: 選到低於 A12 表格最低例示等級的 filter，不符合 PM2.5 removal。
A.followup: A12 Part 1 的最低表格列是 ≥80% PM2.5 removal，例示為 MERV 12/M6 還是 MERV 10/M5？

C.gap: 把 VOC/ozone 的 activated carbon 誤當 particle filtration 主策略。
C.followup: A12 Part 1 要降低 small particulates，應看 media filter 的 PM2.5 removal 還是 carbon filter？

D.gap: 直接選最高等級，忽略依年均 PM2.5 分級選型的要求。
D.followup: A12 Part 1 是否永遠要求 MERV 16/E10，還是依 annual average outdoor PM2.5 threshold 分級？

M01_Q21.stem: A new office building in San Diego has an average annual PM 2.5 of 21 ug/m. What type of filter is required to meet Part 1: Implement Particle Filtration of Feature A12: Air Filtration?
M01_Q21.explanation: A12 Air Filtration, Part 1 Implement Particle Filtration sets the minimum filtration level by annual average outdoor PM2.5. At 23 µg/m³ or less, the required level is at least 80% PM2.5 removal, illustrated as MERV 12 or M6; 21 µg/m³ falls in this bracket.

A.gap: 低估 A12 最低 filtration level，把施工期 MERV 8 類概念混入。
A.followup: A12 Part 1 表格中 annual PM2.5 23 µg/m³ or less 的例示等級是 MERV 8 還是 MERV 12？

B.gap: 選到仍低於表格最低例示值的 filter 等級。
B.followup: 當 annual PM2.5 為 21 µg/m³，A12 Part 1 要求 ≥80% removal；MERV 10/M5 是否達到例示等級？

C.gap: 把 24–39 µg/m³ 區間的較高等級套用到 21 µg/m³。
C.followup: A12 Part 1 中 MERV 14/F8 對應 annual PM2.5 哪個區間，21 µg/m³ 是否落入？

M01_Q22.stem: A new medical office building is being constructed in a suburban campus setting. The 2-story building is planned to hold 6 tenants, and the main lobby will host a 24-hour security desk and a daily parking attendant. The owner would like to pursue WELL Certification for the building. Which of the following would qualify as an adequate building entry design?

options.text: 2 sets of normally-closed doors in a series: the main building doors, and the tenant suite doors.
An entryway vestibule with 2 sets of normally-closed doors.
2 sets of normally-closed doors in a series: the main building doors and the individual office doors.
3 sets of normally-closed doors in series: the main building doors, the first floor elevator door, and the second floor elevator door.

M01_Q22.explanation: A09 Pollution Infiltration Management, Part 1 Design Healthy Entryways requires all regularly used entrances that open to a pedestrian network to include an entryway system and a measure to slow outdoor-to-indoor air movement. One accepted measure is a building entry vestibule with two typically closed doorways.

A.gap: 把 tenant suite doors 當成 building entry vestibule，位置不在入口空氣緩衝。
A.followup: A09 Part 1 要在 building entrance 減緩 outdoor-to-indoor air movement，tenant suite doors 是否能替代 vestibule？

C.gap: 把個別辦公室門誤作入口氣鎖，未處理主入口污染滲入。
C.followup: 若污染從 main building doors 進入，individual office doors 是否符合 A09 的 entryway vestibule 要求？

D.gap: 堆疊 elevator doors 但未形成入口 vestibule 或 revolving door 策略。
D.followup: A09 Part 1 接受的是 vestibule with two typically closed doorways 或 revolving doors，elevator doors 是否列名？

M01_Q23.stem: In an urban high-rise building, a contractor is preparing to begin construction on a 10,000 ft2 (930m2) tenant suite. The team is preparing to use a combination of strategies during construction to mitigate the risk of construction pollution to the tenant suite. Envelope protection and filter replacement are some of the strategies that can be used. What is another strategy that can be used during construction to reduce the risk of construction pollution?
M01_Q23.explanation: A04 Construction Pollution Management, Part 1 Mitigate Construction Pollution requires construction-phase strategies including duct protection, filter replacement if permanent ventilation operates, and moisture and dust management. The moisture and dust procedures include protecting absorptive materials, isolating active work areas and using walk-off mats.

D.gap: 把既有系統再調適流程誤當施工污染控制策略。
D.followup: A04 Part 1 的施工期條款列的是 retrocommissioning，還是 ducts、filters、moisture and dust procedures？

C.gap: 選到不存在的 envelope sizing，混淆 envelope protection 與尺寸設計。
C.followup: 題目已提 envelope protection；A04 Part 1 另列的施工管理策略是否叫 envelope sizing？

A.gap: 只抓濕度字面，漏掉 A04 規範的 moisture and dust 成套程序。
A.followup: A04 Part 1 的 requirement 是單純 humidity management，還是 moisture and dust management procedures？

M01_Q24.stem: Feature A09: Pollution Infiltration Management's intent is to minimize the introduction of pollutants into indoor air through the building envelope and at building entrances. One strategy is to design healthy entryways. What else can we do to minimize pollutants in our buildings?
M01_Q24.explanation: A09 Pollution Infiltration Management includes Part 1 Design Healthy Entryways and Part 2 Perform Envelope Commissioning. Part 2 requires envelope commissioning for air infiltration and leakage, reflected in the specification, commissioning plan and O&M Manual.

D.gap: 把施工後空氣沖洗概念誤套到 envelope infiltration 管理。
D.followup: A09 的第二個 Part 是 air flush，還是針對 air infiltration and leakage 的 envelope commissioning？

C.gap: 把既有建築系統再調適誤認為 A09 指定策略。
C.followup: A09 Part 2 要 façade engineer 與 commissioning plan，這與 retrocommissioning 是否相同？

B.gap: 把結果性 IAQ 測試誤當阻止污染滲入的設計策略。
B.followup: A09 的 intent 是減少污染 through envelope and entrances；IAQ test 是否能直接改善 envelope leakage？

M01_Q25.stem: For which Feature in the WELL Building Standard™ (WELL™) is envelope commissioning required?
M01_Q25.explanation: A09 Pollution Infiltration Management, Part 2 Perform Envelope Commissioning requires the commissioning process to include envelope commissioning for air infiltration and leakage. The plan must be reflected in specifications, executed as planned and included in the O&M Manual.

C.gap: 混淆 construction pollution management 與 envelope leakage commissioning。
C.followup: A04 Part 1 管的是 ducts、filters、moisture and dust；envelope commissioning 在哪個 A09 Part？

D.gap: 把 enhanced ventilation 設計加分項誤認為建築外殼調適要求。
D.followup: A06 主要增加 outdoor air 或提升 ventilation effectiveness；是否列出 façade engineer 與 envelope metrics？

B.gap: 把 supply air treatment feature 誤認為 envelope infiltration feature。
B.followup: A13 Part 1 是 100% outdoor air、carbon filter、media filter 或 UVGI；哪個 feature 管 envelope commissioning？

M01_Q26.stem: To earn points toward Part 1: Increase Outdoor Air Supply of Feature A06: Enhanced Ventilation Design, minimum fresh air supply rates should exceed ASHRAE by what amount?
M01_Q26.explanation: WELL v2 A06 Enhanced Ventilation Design, Part 1 Increase Outdoor Air Supply 要求 mechanically ventilated projects 的 outdoor air supply rates 超過 ASHRAE 62.1-2010 表定值，門檻分別是 30% 與 60%。這兩個百分比對應可取得的不同 point level。

C.gap: 把 enhanced ventilation 誤記成低幅度加成，低估 A06 的加強門檻。
C.followup: 如果 A06 Part 1 是要 exceed ASHRAE 62.1，表格中兩個 point thresholds 分別是多少？

B.gap: 知道需要高於 ASHRAE，但把 30%/60% 與其他常見比例混淆。
B.followup: A06 Part 1 的 increased air supply table 是以哪些百分比換取 1 point 與 2 points？

D.gap: 將加強新風量想得過高，忽略 WELL 表格列出的實際可行門檻。
D.followup: 在 A06 Part 1 中，標準是否要求 80% 這種超高增量，還是只列兩個固定 thresholds？

M01_Q27.stem: What feature uses displacement ventilation to improve indoor air quality by delivering fresh outdoor air at floor level?
M01_Q27.explanation: WELL v2 A06 Enhanced Ventilation Design, Part 2 Improve Ventilation Effectiveness 明列 displacement ventilation system，要求至少 90% regularly occupied spaces 使用此系統並以 ASHRAE RP-949、ASHRAE 62.1-2019 stratified air distribution 或 REHVA Guidebook No. 01 為設計基礎。其原理是從 floor level 供應 fresh outdoor air，讓較暖且污染的空氣往上排出。

D.gap: 把 performance threshold 型 feature 誤認為通風系統設計策略。
D.followup: A01 主要是在驗 PM、VOC、CO 等濃度，哪個 A06 Part 才談 displacement ventilation？

C.gap: 混淆 building envelope infiltration 控制與室內送風分層策略。
C.followup: A09 管的是入口與 envelope 污染滲入；floor-level fresh air delivery 屬於哪個 ventilation effectiveness Part？

B.gap: 把基本 adequate ventilation 與 enhanced ventilation effectiveness 混在一起。
B.followup: A03 要符合基本 ventilation rates；哪個 A06 Part 才要求 displacement ventilation basis of design？

M01_Q28.stem: Ensuring interior rooms that may contain sources of air pollution are isolated from adjacent spaces with self-closing doors is a criteria for which of the following WELL Features?
M01_Q28.explanation: WELL v2 A11 Source Separation, Part 1 Manage Pollution and Exhaust 要求 bathrooms、kitchens、cleaning and chemical storage rooms、high-volume printer/copier rooms 與 high-humidity areas 與相鄰 regularly occupied spaces 以 self-closing doors/vestibules 分隔，或相對負壓，並將 exhaust vented outdoors。

B.gap: 只看到 air quality 結果，忽略本題問的是污染源隔離手段。
B.followup: A01 驗證濃度是否達標；哪個 feature 直接規定污染源房間要 self-closing doors 或負壓？

A.gap: 把隔離污染源誤當作提高 outdoor air supply 或 ventilation effectiveness。
A.followup: A06 是增加新風或改善 ventilation effectiveness；隔離 chemical storage room 應看哪個 Part？

D.gap: 混淆 supply air 處理與污染源房間的物理隔離要求。
D.followup: A13 處理 recirculated supply air；self-closing doors 保護相鄰空間是 A11 哪個要求？

M01_Q29.stem: The Property Manager for a Johannesburg office building is installing lobby signage to display real-time data on indoor environmental quality. Which of the following is NOT a required parameter for this display to meet Feature A08: Air Quality Monitoring and Awareness requirements?
M01_Q29.explanation: WELL v2 A08 Air Quality Monitoring and Awareness, Part 1 Install Indoor Air Monitors 要求 monitors 至少量測 PM2.5/PM10、carbon dioxide、carbon monoxide、ozone、nitrogen dioxide、total VOCs、formaldehyde 中三項；Part 2 顯示 Part 1 量測到的 air quality data。Humidity 不在這個 A08 indoor air pollutant parameter list 內。

A.gap: 忽略 carbon monoxide 是 A08 可監測污染物之一，且有精度要求。
A.followup: A08 Part 1 的七個 monitor parameters 中，carbon monoxide 是否列有 0-10 ppm 的 accuracy？

C.gap: 把 CO2 當成舒適性資料，忘記它是 A08 明列監測項目。
C.followup: A08 Part 1 對 carbon dioxide sensor 的 750 ppm accuracy 要求，是否代表它可用於顯示？

D.gap: 未辨識 total VOCs 是 A08 monitor parameter，而非額外選配資料。
D.followup: A08 Part 1 是否把 total VOCs 與 formaldehyde 一起列入可選的監測污染物清單？

M01_Q30.stem: Which of the following are ongoing requirements for indoor air monitoring in Feature A08: Air Quality Monitoring and Awareness?

options.text: Data are analyzed for regularly occupied hours and submitted to annually through WELL Online.
Data are analyzed and submitted to IWBI.
Record data at hourly intervals; Send monthly reports to IWBI.
Data is analyzed 24 hours and submitted monthly through WELL Online.

M01_Q30.explanation: WELL v2 A08 Air Quality Monitoring and Awareness, Part 1 Install Indoor Air Monitors requires measurements at intervals of no longer than 10 minutes for carbon dioxide and no longer than one hour for other pollutants, with data submitted annually through the WELL digital platform. Monthly submission is not the stated ongoing pathway.

C.gap: 只記到部分 hourly interval，卻把提交頻率誤寫成 monthly。
C.followup: A08 Part 1 對 CO2 與其他 pollutants 的 interval 不同；提交到 WELL digital platform 的頻率是多少？

D.gap: 把即時監測解讀成全天分析與每月提交，混淆 operation 與 reporting。
D.followup: A08 Part 1 的 reporting & maintenance 是 monthly 還是 annually？標準是否要求 24-hour analysis？

B.gap: 說法過於籠統，漏掉 A08 對提交頻率與平台的明確要求。
B.followup: 若要證明 A08 ongoing compliance，資料應透過哪個 digital platform、多久提交一次？

M01_Q31.stem: A property management company is considering submitting its portfolio of 9 urban office properties for WELL Certification. The property teams are reviewing the requirements for air data record keeping. What should the property teams plan to provide in the WELL application for this feature?

options.text: Results from flow hood testing that confirm compliance with ASHRAE 62.1 ventilation calculations.
On-site Photographs, Letter of Assurance – Engineer
A written policy for each property, including corrective action steps.

M01_Q31.explanation: WELL v2 A08 Air Quality Monitoring and Awareness, Part 1 Install Indoor Air Monitors 要求部署符合參數、密度與位置要求的 monitors；申請文件需能證明設備已設置並符合工程要求。題目所列 documentation 對應 monitor installation and assurance，而不是 ventilation flow testing。

C.gap: 把監測設備證明誤認為一般營運時程，未對應 A08 monitor 要求。
C.followup: A08 Part 1 要證明 monitors 的部署、位置與密度；單純 Operations Schedule 能證明哪些設備條件？

D.gap: 混淆 policy/corrective action 與實際設備安裝佐證文件。
D.followup: 本題問 WELL application 的 air data record keeping，A08 是要政策，還是要證明 monitors installed？

A.gap: 把 A03 ventilation testing 文件套到 A08 air quality monitoring。
A.followup: flow hood testing 驗的是 ASHRAE ventilation rates；A08 monitor density 與 sensor siting 要用什麼文件證明？

M01_Q32.stem: For Feature A07: Operable Windows, what requirement must be met before integrating operable windows into a building design?

options.text: All windows in regularly occupied spaces have operable windows that provide access to outdoor air.
At least 25% of regularly occupied spaces have operable windows that provide access to outdoor air.
No windows in regularly occupied spaces have operable windows.
At least 75% of regularly occupied spaces have operable windows that provide access to outdoor air.

M01_Q32.explanation: WELL v2 A07 Operable Windows, Part 1 Provide Operable Windows 要求 project meet one of two paths，其中一條是至少 75% regularly occupied spaces 具備可接觸 outdoor air 的 operable windows。另一條是每層 openable window area 至少為 net occupiable floor area 的 4%。

B.gap: 把 75% 門檻大幅低估，未掌握 A07 Part 1 的覆蓋比例。
B.followup: A07 Part 1 對 regularly occupied spaces 的 operable windows 覆蓋率，是 25% 還是 75%？

A.gap: 把 WELL 的比例門檻誤讀成所有空間或所有窗戶皆需可開啟。
A.followup: A07 Part 1 是要求全部 regularly occupied spaces，還是至少 75% 或 4% openable area？

C.gap: 完全反向理解 operable windows，忽略 feature 的自然通風目標。
C.followup: A07 的 intent 是鼓勵在 outdoor air quality acceptable 時開窗；為何會要求完全沒有 operable windows？

M01_Q33.stem: A project team in Montreal is designing a new hospital wing for administrative offices. During the schematic design phase, the team has an opportunity to plan for a data-gathering station to measure outdoor air parameters. Where should the team locate the devices to comply with Feature A07: Operable Windows?

options.text: Within 3 m (30ft) of the main building entrance.
On the building exterior, halfway between the ground level and the roof.
Within 4 km (2.5 mi) of the building.

M01_Q33.explanation: WELL v2 A07 Operable Windows, Part 2 Manage Window Use, Option 1 Outdoor air measurement 要求 PM2.5、temperature 與 humidity 至少每小時監測一次，data-gathering station 位於 building 2.5 mi (4 km) 內。該 station 可由 project 或其他 entity 運作。

A.gap: 把 outdoor air station 與入口污染控制距離混淆，尺度錯誤。
A.followup: A07 Part 2 允許使用 2.5 mi 範圍內的 station；為何不是入口 3 m 的近距離要求？

C.gap: 以為設備必須設在屋頂，忽略標準採用距離範圍而非特定位置。
C.followup: A07 Outdoor air measurement 條文要求 station 的高度或屋頂位置，還是要求離 building 的最大距離？

B.gap: 自行加入外牆高度條件，未回到 A07 對 station location 的明文要求。
B.followup: A07 Part 2 是否提到 halfway between ground and roof，或只指定 within 2.5 mi (4 km)？

M01_Q34.stem: Which of the following does NOT describe an advantage of displacement ventilation systems?

options.text: Air is delivered at very low velocity, preventing occupant discomfort due to air speed.
Air can be delivered slightly cooler or warmer than the desired space temperature because registers are at raised floor height.
Air is not delivered and pushed through the return air path (often the dirtiest portion of the air stream).
The airflow tends to concentrate pollutants near the ceiling, out of the breathing zone.

M01_Q34.explanation: WELL v2 A06 Enhanced Ventilation Design, Part 2 Improve Ventilation Effectiveness recognizes displacement ventilation because fresh outdoor air is delivered at floor level and warmer polluted indoor air rises above the ventilation zone. The standard does not frame delivery of slightly warmer air from raised-floor registers as an advantage; displacement systems rely on low-level, typically cooler supply air and stratification.

C.gap: 把 displacement ventilation 避免混合髒回風的優點誤當錯誤敘述。
C.followup: A06 Part 2 為何強調 floor-level supply 與上方排除 polluted air？這和 return air path 有何關係？

D.gap: 未掌握熱羽流讓污染物往上離開 breathing zone 的核心機制。
D.followup: displacement ventilation 中 CO2 等 warmer polluted air 會停在 breathing zone，還是往上被排出？

A.gap: 忽略低速送風是 displacement/personal ventilation 避免 draft discomfort 的設計考量。
A.followup: A06 Part 2 中 personalized ventilation 還限制 head-level airspeed；低速送風為何是舒適性優勢？

M01_Q35.stem: A developer is planning a new convention center, including over 30 conference rooms of all sizes. The team is interested in pursuing WELL Certification and is considering a displacement ventilation system for the conference rooms. In Part 2: Improve Ventilation Effectiveness of Feature A06: Enhanced Ventilation Design, what must be used as a basis for design for this system?

options.text: ASHRAE Guidelines RP-949 or REHVA Guidebook No. 1

M01_Q35.explanation: WELL v2 A06 Enhanced Ventilation Design, Part 2 Improve Ventilation Effectiveness, Option 1 requires a displacement ventilation system in at least 90% of regularly occupied spaces, using ASHRAE Guidelines RP-949、ASHRAE 62.1-2019 Stratified Air Distribution Systems 或 REHVA Guidebook No. 01 as a basis for design. 題目選項中明確列出其中兩個合格依據。

B.gap: 把具體 design guide 誤記成泛稱的 ANSI approval，缺少可審查依據。
B.followup: A06 Part 2 Option 1 要求 displacement ventilation 用哪些具名指南作 basis for design？

A.gap: 把 energy standard ASHRAE 90.1 與 ventilation effectiveness 設計依據混淆。
A.followup: ASHRAE 90.1 主要管能源；A06 displacement ventilation 表中列的是 RP-949、62.1-2019 哪一節或 REHVA？

C.gap: 知道 ASHRAE 相關，卻未限定到 stratified air distribution 或具體版本。
C.followup: A06 Part 2 不是泛稱 ASHRAE 62.1；它指定 62.1-2019 的哪個 Stratified Air Distribution 內容？

M01_Q36.stem: What is the primary reason to introduce activated carbon filters to the main air ducts of an existing building?

options.text: To reduce HVAC noise from vibration.
To reduce VOCs in the indoor air.

M01_Q36.explanation: WELL v2 A13 Enhanced Supply Air, Part 1 Improve Supply Air requires activated carbon filters when partially recirculated air is treated, paired with media filtration or UVGI. The feature summary and solutions state carbon filters treat VOCs and ozone in recirculated supply air.

A.gap: 把 air treatment filter 誤認為機械減振或噪音控制設備。
A.followup: A13 Part 1 的 activated carbon filter 是放在 supply air treatment 中，它要移除哪類污染物？

D.gap: 把 filtration 目的誤解成節能，忽略其控制污染物的健康目標。
D.followup: A13 的 intent 是 mitigation of contamination and VOCs；哪一項條文提到 carbon filter？

C.gap: 混淆 thermal comfort 與 air quality treatment，未辨識 carbon 對 VOC 的作用。
C.followup: 若主要問題是 VOCs from furnishings and cleaning products，A13 會用 carbon filter 還是溫控策略？

M01_Q37.stem: Ultraviolet Germicidal Irradiation (UVGI) is one method for treating recirculated air in Feature A13: Enhanced Air Supply. What is another approved treatment method according to this feature?
M01_Q37.explanation: WELL v2 A13 Enhanced Supply Air, Part 1 Improve Supply Air allows partially recirculated air if it is treated with an activated carbon filter plus at least one additional strategy such as media filter with PM2.5 removal ≥90% or UVGI. 因此 carbon filter 是此 feature 明列的 treatment component。

A.gap: 抓到 high-efficiency filtration 概念，但標準列的是 media filter ≥90% 而非 Hepa。
A.followup: A13 Part 1 對 particle filtration 寫的是 HEPA，還是 PM2.5 removal ≥90% 的 media filter？

B.gap: 以近義詞猜測，但未對準標準用語 activated carbon filter。
B.followup: A13 條文使用的正式 filter 名稱是 charcoal，還是 activated carbon filter？

D.gap: 忽略 A13 明確列出 UVGI 之外仍有 carbon 與 media filtration。
D.followup: A13 Part 1 在 UVGI 之外，還列出哪個必備 filter 來處理 VOCs？

M01_Q38.stem: In buildings that use forced-air cooling systems, which are strategies to implement air sanitation in Feature A14: Microbe and Mold Control?

options.text: Ultraviolet germicidal irradiation and carbon filters.

M01_Q38.explanation: WELL v2 A14 Microbe and Mold Control, Part 1 Implement Ultraviolet Air Treatment requires central air handling units to use ultraviolet lamps to irradiate cooling coil and drain pan surfaces; fan coil cooling coils and drain pans must be irradiated or openable for inspection and cleaning. Carbon filters belong to A13 supply air treatment, not A14 microbe and mold control.

C.gap: 把 A13 carbon filter 與 A14 UVGI 混合，加入非 A14 要求。
C.followup: A14 Part 1 處理 cooling coils and drain pans；條文是否提到 carbon filters 作為 sanitation strategy？

B.gap: 把一般空氣淨化技術套入 A14，忽略其限定 UVGI 與檢查清潔。
B.followup: A14 Part 1 寫的是 photocatalytic oxidation/MERV 13，還是 ultraviolet lamps irradiation？

A.gap: 完全偏向化學吸附與氧化處理，未對應 mold on cooling coils。
A.followup: 若問題是 forced-air cooling system 的 mold growth，A14 要照射哪些 HVAC surfaces？

M01_Q39.stem: What regular documentation is required for WELL project teams to demonstrate that air purification strategies are in property operation for Feature A13: Enhanced Supply Air?

options.text: Evidence of filter maintenance is submitted annually through WELL Online.
Monthly letters from third party inspectors that air filtration/sanitation systems are in place.
Annual letters from third party inspectors that air filtration/sanitation systems are in place.

M01_Q39.explanation: WELL v2 A13 Enhanced Supply Air, Part 1 Improve Supply Air, Option 2 Filter maintenance requires evidence that filters or other air treatment devices have been replaced or maintained according to the manufacturer recommendation, submitted annually through the WELL digital platform. The standard does not require monthly third-party letters for this item.

D.gap: 把 annual WELL submission 誤記成 monthly maintenance record requirement。
D.followup: A13 Option 2 要 submitted annually through WELL digital platform；它是否要求每月提交 records？

C.gap: 抓到 annual 節奏，但把證據形式誤換成第三方 inspector letters。
C.followup: A13 要的是 manufacturer recommendation 下的 replacement/maintenance evidence，還是第三方年度信？

B.gap: 同時誤判頻率與文件形式，未回到 A13 filter maintenance 條文。
B.followup: A13 Part 1 Option 2 有提到 monthly letters 嗎？真正要提交的是什麼 evidence？

M01_Q40.stem: Under what circumstance should combustion-based space heaters be allowed in regularly occupied spaces?

options.text: When they have automatic shut-off timers with a maximum of 15 minute cycles.
Combustion-based space heaters should never be allowed in regularly occupied spaces.
When they are located within 7.5 m (25ft) of an exterior door.
When they are located on an exterior wall and directly vented to the outside.

M01_Q40.explanation: WELL v2 A10 Combustion Minimization, Part 1 Manage Combustion, Option 1 states that combustion-based fireplaces, stoves, space heaters, ranges and ovens are not used in occupiable spaces. This ban applies to all spaces except commercial kitchen spaces.

A.gap: 以操作限制取代禁用要求，忽略 A10 對 space heaters 的明確 ban。
A.followup: A10 Part 1 Option 1 是否允許用 timer 管理 combustion-based space heaters，還是直接不得使用？

C.gap: 把距離外門的條件誤套到 combustion source 管理，無條文依據。
C.followup: A10 Combustion Minimization 管的是設備使用與排放；條文何處提到 7.5 m exterior door？

D.gap: 以直接排氣作例外想像，但 A10 occupiable spaces 仍禁止該類設備。
D.followup: 即使設備在 exterior wall 並 direct vented，A10 Option 1 對 space heaters 的用語是允許還是 not used？

M01_Q41.stem: Which substance has 210 times the binding affinity for hemoglobin compared to oxygen and is toxic to humans?
M01_Q41.explanation: WELL v2 A01 Air Quality, Part 3 Meet Thresholds for Inorganic Gases sets a carbon monoxide threshold of 10 mg/m³ [9 ppm] or lower in occupiable spaces, reflecting its toxicity. A10 Combustion Minimization also identifies carbon monoxide as a combustion by-product linked to nausea, loss of consciousness, death and impaired cognition.

B.gap: 把金屬污染物與血紅素結合毒性混淆，未辨識 CO 中毒機制。
B.followup: A01 Part 3 特別列出哪個 inorganic gas 的 9 ppm threshold，且與 combustion by-products 有關？

A.gap: 知道是有毒氣體，卻選到非 A01 Part 3 明列的 hemoglobin affinity 氣體。
A.followup: 題幹提到與 oxygen 競爭 hemoglobin；A01 Part 3 的 carbon monoxide threshold 是多少？

D.gap: 把可燃氣體危害與一氧化碳的血紅素結合毒性混為一談。
D.followup: A10 說 combustion emissions 包含 nitrogen dioxide 與 carbon monoxide；哪一個會造成 CO poisoning？

M01_Q42.stem: An office building is located where the annual average ambient PM 2.5 level is 35 ug/m3 or higher. What threshold must be met for the project to meet the standards for Feature A01: Fundamental Air Quality?

options.text: PM 2.5 equal to 30% of the 24- or 48- hour average of outdoor levels on days of performance testing.
PM 10 equal to 25% of the 24- or 48- hour average of outdoor levels on days of performance testing.
PM 2.5 equal to 60% of the 24- or 48- hour average of outdoor levels on days of performance testing.
PM 2.5 equal to 10% of the 24- or 48- hour average of outdoor levels on days of performance testing.

M01_Q42.explanation: WELL v2 A01 Air Quality, Part 1 Meet Thresholds for Particulate Matter, Option 3 Dynamic thresholds in polluted regions applies when annual average outdoor PM2.5 is 35 µg/m³ or higher. It requires PM2.5 less than or equal to 30% of the 24- or 48-hour average of outdoor levels on the day(s) of performance testing, with a parallel PM10 threshold also at 30%.

C.gap: 把 polluted-region dynamic threshold 誤記成較寬鬆的 60%。
C.followup: A01 Part 1 Option 3 在 PM2.5 outdoor annual average ≥35 µg/m³ 時，indoor PM2.5 是 outdoor average 的幾成？

B.gap: 選到 PM10 且比例錯誤，未對準題目詢問的 PM2.5 threshold。
B.followup: 題幹問 PM2.5；A01 Option 3 是否同時列 PM2.5 與 PM10，且兩者比例是否都是 30%？

D.gap: 把動態門檻壓得過嚴，誤記為 10% 而非標準列值。
D.followup: A01 dynamic thresholds 的限制會影響 certification level；表中 PM2.5 實際比例是多少？

M01_Q43.stem: A new library would like to meet the standards for Feature A05: Enhanced Air Quality. What threshold must be met for organic gases to achieve this feature?

options.text: Formaldehyde less than 25 µg/m³ or lower
Formaldehyde less than 13 µg/m³ or lower
Formaldehyde less than 50 µg/m³ or lower

M01_Q43.explanation: WELL v2 A05 Enhanced Air Quality, Part 2 Meet Enhanced Thresholds for Organic Gases requires formaldehyde at 9 µg/m³ or lower in occupiable spaces. The 50 µg/m³ formaldehyde level belongs to A01 Air Quality, Part 2 baseline organic gas threshold, not the enhanced threshold.

C.gap: 接近 enhanced threshold，但把 formaldehyde 的數值記成不存在的 13 µg/m³。
C.followup: A05 Part 2 的 formaldehyde enhanced threshold 是 9 µg/m³，還是其他中間值？

B.gap: 把 enhanced organic gas threshold 放寬，未掌握 A05 比 A01 更嚴。
B.followup: A05 是 enhanced air quality；相較 A01 formaldehyde 50 µg/m³，A05 應降到多少？

D.gap: 將 A01 baseline formaldehyde threshold 誤套到 A05 enhanced feature。
D.followup: 哪個 feature 的 Part 2 是 formaldehyde 50 µg/m³，哪個 feature 才要求 9 µg/m³？

M01_Q44.stem: What is the intent of Feature A01: Air Quality?

options.text: To provide a basic understanding of indoor air pollutants.
To provide a humidity control panel to occupants.
To provide a basic level of indoor air quality that contributes to the health and well-being of building users.
To provide a basic understanding of the role the building envelope plays in indoor air quality.

M01_Q44.explanation: WELL v2 A01 Air Quality states its Intent is to provide a basic level of indoor air quality that contributes to the health and well-being of building users. The feature operationalizes this through thresholds for particulate matter, organic gases, inorganic gases, radon and annual monitoring.

A.gap: 把 feature intent 誤解成教育認知，而非實際達成基本 air quality。
A.followup: A01 的 Intent 是讓人理解 pollutants，還是要求室內空氣品質達到基本健康水準？

B.gap: 把濕度控制與空氣品質門檻混淆，偏離 A01 的污染物範圍。
B.followup: A01 Parts 1-4 列的是 PM、organic gases、inorganic gases、radon；humidity control panel 出現在哪裡？

D.gap: 把 A09 building envelope infiltration 的重點誤放到 A01 intent。
D.followup: building envelope 對 IAQ 的角色更接近 A09；A01 本身的 basic air quality intent 是什麼？

M01_Q45.stem: Which feature is a precondition of the Air concept?

options.text: Feature A08: Air Quality Monitoring and Awareness

M01_Q45.explanation: WELL v2 Air concept summary lists A01 Air Quality、A02 Smoke-Free Environment、A03 Ventilation Design and A04 Construction Pollution Management as preconditions. A05, A08 and A10 are optimizations in the same concept.

A.gap: 把 enhanced optimization 誤認為 Air concept 的必備 precondition。
A.followup: Air concept 表格中 A05 Enhanced Air Quality 標示為 precondition，還是 optimization？

C.gap: 把監測 awareness 類 optimization 誤當成 certification prerequisite。
C.followup: A08 Air Quality Monitoring and Awareness 在 Air concept 清單中屬於 O 還是 P？

D.gap: 同時記錯 feature 名稱與狀態，A10 屬 combustion minimization optimization。
D.followup: Air concept 的四個 preconditions 是 A01-A04；A10 Combustion Minimization 排在哪一類？

M01_Q46.stem: A nonprofit is renovating floors 4 through 6 of an office building. How will Part 4: Meet Thresholds for Radon of Feature A01: Air Quality impact this project?

options.text: The project will need to test for radon to ensure it is 0.15 Bq/L or lower.
This will not impact this project because this requirement is only for regularly occupied spaces at or below grade.
The project will need to have a professional test for radon to ensure it is 0.15 Bq/L or lower.
The project will need one test per 25,000 ft2 of regularly occupied space at or below grade.

M01_Q46.explanation: WELL v2 A01 Air Quality, Part 4 Meet Thresholds for Radon applies to regularly occupied spaces at or below grade. A renovation on floors 4 through 6 does not include such spaces, so the radon testing path of 0.15 Bq/L [4 pCi/L] or lower and one test per 25,000 ft² at/below grade is not triggered by the stated scope.

A.gap: 記得 radon threshold，卻忽略適用範圍限定在 at or below grade。
A.followup: A01 Part 4 的 0.15 Bq/L radon threshold 是所有樓層都適用，還是只適用特定樓層？

C.gap: 抓到 professional test 要求，但未先判斷樓層是否在適用範圍。
C.followup: 在要求 professional radon test 前，A01 Part 4 先問的是 project 是否有哪類 regularly occupied spaces？

D.gap: 誤套 test density 要求，未注意 floors 4-6 不屬 at/below grade。
D.followup: one test per 25,000 ft² 的規則只計算哪些 regularly occupied spaces？本案有那些空間嗎？

M01_Q47.stem: In order to achieve the optimization, Feature A12: Air Filtration, what is the verification method for filter maintenance?
M01_Q47.explanation: WELL v2 A12 Air Filtration, Part 1 Implement Particle Filtration, Option 2 Filter maintenance requires evidence that the filter has been replaced according to the manufacturer recommendation, submitted annually through the WELL digital platform. This is an ongoing maintenance proof requirement rather than a one-time purchase or inspection item.

B.gap: 把設計技術文件與持續 filter replacement evidence 混淆。
B.followup: A12 Option 2 要證明 filter 按 manufacturer recommendation 更換；這比較像 technical document 還是 maintenance report？

C.gap: 以購買紀錄代替維護證據，無法證明濾網按建議更換。
C.followup: purchase order 只能證明買過 filter；A12 要 annually submit 的 evidence 還需要顯示什麼維護行為？

D.gap: 誤認為 WELL Assessor 現場檢查，而非專案每年提交維護證據。
D.followup: A12 Option 2 的 compliance route 是 on-site inspection，還是 annual WELL digital platform submission？

M01_Q48.stem: Feature A11: Source Separation preserves indoor air quality and maximizes olfactory comfort in occupied spaces through the isolation and proper ventilation of indoor air pollution sources and chemical storage areas. What requirements must be met for dwelling units, all ovens, cooking burners and stovetop cooking appliances that use a range hood?

options.text: Exhaust air is vented directly to the outdoors.
Exhaust air is vented to the space between apartments.
There is no requirement for exhaust air in dwelling units.
Exhaust air outlet are separated from any air intakes by at least 3ft.

M01_Q48.explanation: WELL v2 A11 Source Separation, Part 1 Manage Pollution and Exhaust states that for dwelling units, ovens, cooking burners and stovetop cooking appliances using a range hood must vent exhaust air directly to the outdoors. It also requires exhaust outlets to be separated from air intakes by at least 10 ft (3 m), unless local code says otherwise.

B.gap: 完全違反 source separation，將 cooking exhaust 排入相鄰住戶間隙。
B.followup: A11 dwelling unit 的 range hood exhaust 是要 recirculate 到建築內，還是 vented directly outdoors？

D.gap: 抓到與 air intake 分離概念，但把 10 ft (3 m) 誤記成 3 ft。
D.followup: A11 對 exhaust outlets 與 air intakes 的 separation distance 是 3 ft，還是 10 ft (3 m)？

C.gap: 忽略 dwelling units 仍有 range hood exhaust 的明確要求。
C.followup: A11 Part 1 是否專門列出 For Dwelling Units？其中對 ovens and stovetop appliances 要求什麼？

M01_Q49.stem: To achieve Part 1: Implement Ultraviolet Air Treatment of Feature A14: Microbe and Mold Control, what are the two UV System areas the requirements are based on?

options.text: UV system design and UV system maintenance and inspection.
Humidity control monitor and UV system design.

M01_Q49.explanation: WELL v2 A14 Microbe and Mold Control, Part 1 Implement Ultraviolet Air Treatment is organized into Option 1 UV system design and Option 2 UV system maintenance and inspection. Design covers ultraviolet lamps for cooling coils and drain pans, while maintenance covers annual evidence of lamp replacement/maintenance and quarterly inspection of unirradiated coils if applicable.

D.gap: 把 mold risk 的濕度背景誤當成 A14 Part 1 的 UV option 架構。
D.followup: A14 Part 1 的兩個 option 標題是 humidity monitor，還是 UV system design 與 maintenance/inspection？

B.gap: 只描述 UV 技術本身，未回答條文分成設計與維護檢查兩塊。
B.followup: ultraviolet lamps 是設計要求的一部分；A14 還要求哪個 maintenance and inspection option？

A.gap: 把 A12/A13 air filtration 混入 A14，忽略本 Part 聚焦 UV 與 mold inspection。
A.followup: A14 Microbe and Mold Control 的 Part 1 有列 air filtration，還是列 UV system maintenance and inspection？

M01_Q50.stem: An advertising firm in Albany wants to allow for operable windows in their offices. What do the indicator lights at windows need to cue occupants?

options.text: When PM 2.5 is 50 ug/m3 or lower.
When relative humidity is 85% or lower.
When conditions outside are not suitable for opening windows.
When conditions outside are suitable for opening windows.

M01_Q50.explanation: WELL v2 A07 Operable Windows, Part 2 Manage Window Use, Option 2 Window operation requires indicator lights at windows, at least one per room with windows, to cue occupants when outside conditions are suitable for opening windows. Suitability includes PM2.5 at 15 µg/m³ or lower, dry-bulb temperature within 15 °F (8 °C) of indoor setpoint and relative humidity 65% or lower.

C.gap: 反向理解 indicator light 的 cue，將鼓勵開窗誤讀成禁止開窗。
C.followup: A07 Part 2 的文字是 cue occupants when conditions are suitable，還是 only warn when unsuitable？

A.gap: 抓到 PM2.5 判斷因子，但把 threshold 從 15 誤記為 50 µg/m³。
A.followup: A07 window operation 的 PM2.5 suitability threshold 是 A01 的 PM10 50，還是 PM2.5 15 µg/m³？

B.gap: 知道 humidity 是條件之一，但把 relative humidity threshold 記得過高。
B.followup: A07 Part 2 對 relative humidity 的 suitable threshold 是 65% or lower，還是 85%？

M02_Q01.stem: Nearly two-thirds of the human body is composed of water and a good majority of the global population is under hydrated. Depending on age, sex and pregnancy status, what are the recommended values of daily water consumption by adults?
M02_Q01.explanation: WELL Water concept Overview 指出，依 age、sex 與 pregnancy status，成人 daily water consumption guideline 約為 49-125 oz，包含食物中水分與直接飲水。W06 Drinking Water Promotion, Part 1 Ensure Drinking Water Access 則把這個 hydration 目標轉成飲水可近性要求。

B.gap: 把 daily intake 誤讀成 weekly，忽略水分每日流失需補充。
B.followup: Water concept Overview 說成人 49-125 oz 是用來抵消 respiration、perspiration 與 excretion 的哪一種時間尺度？

A.gap: 低估成人建議攝水範圍，混淆特定族群與整體成人範圍。
A.followup: 題幹提到 age、sex 與 pregnancy status 會改變攝水量，標準給的是單一低值還是成人範圍？

C.gap: 套用常見八杯水口訣，未回到 WELL 引用的 oz 範圍。
C.followup: 若 WELL Water overview 已給 49-125 oz，為何固定 8 glasses 無法涵蓋不同成人狀態？

M02_Q02.stem: The project team for an existing building is pursuing WELL Certification. All water being delivered to the project has been tested, and the turbidity level was found to be less than 1.0 NTU. What other test must be passed to achieve Feature W01: Water Quality Indicators?

options.text: Quarterly testing for inorganic metals is done
An active carbon filter is installed on all water meant for human contact
The pH is level is a neutral level of 7
Total coliforms are not detected in any 100 ml sample

M02_Q02.explanation: W01 Water Quality Indicators, Part 1 Verify Water Quality Indicators 要求 human contact water 同時達到 turbidity ≤ 1.0 NTU/FTU/FNU，且 total coliforms are not detected in any 100 ml sample。題目已滿足 turbidity，因此還需通過 coliforms 指標。

C.gap: 把 pH 中性誤當 W01 指標，混淆 W03/W05 監測項目。
C.followup: W01 Part 1 列出的是 turbidity 與 coliforms；pH 是在哪些水質管理功能中才被監測？

A.gap: 把金屬季檢套到 W01，忽略此題問 easy-to-test indicators。
A.followup: 若 W01 Part 1 只用兩個 indicator 判斷 human contact water，inorganic metals 屬於哪類水質要求？

B.gap: 把處理設備當成合規指標，未核對性能測試門檻。
B.followup: W01 要求的是安裝特定 filter，還是水樣必須達到 turbidity 與 coliforms 的結果門檻？

M02_Q03.stem: Which of the following building systems deal with turbidity limits?
M02_Q03.explanation: W01 Water Quality Indicators, Part 1 Verify Water Quality Indicators 設定 turbidity ≤ 1.0 NTU/FTU/FNU，且該 feature summary 說明以 on-site tests 驗證 performance。題目標示的回應更像 W03/W05 的 ongoing monitoring/reporting，與 W01 turbidity limit 的驗證語境不完全一致。

D.gap: 把水質限值誤認為提交技術文件即可，忽略水樣結果。
D.followup: W01 Part 1 的 turbidity ≤ 1.0 NTU 是設計文件承諾，還是需要水質測試結果支持？

B.gap: 誤以為 owner assurance 可取代水質測試或持續資料。
B.followup: 對 turbidity 這類可量測指標，WELL 通常要求誰提供可驗證數據，而不是單純保證？

C.gap: 把 turbidity 的 on-site 驗證誤當長期數據回報
C.followup: turbidity ≤ 1.0 NTU 屬 W01 的 water quality indicator，是用一次性 on-site performance test 確認，還是長期 data report？

M02_Q04.stem: A tenant buildout project in Sarasota Florida is concerned with the water quality in the building. After testing some of the water they discovered the water had a salty taste. What chemical can cause this?
M02_Q04.explanation: W04 Enhanced Water Quality, Part 1 Meet Thresholds for Drinking Water Taste 說明 high levels of chloride contribute to a salty taste，並設定 Chloride ≤ 250 mg/L。Iron 則主要與 reddish appearance 相關。

A.gap: 把 aesthetic contaminants 混為一談，未連結 salty taste 與 chloride。
A.followup: W04 Part 1 的 taste concern 中，哪個參數有 250 mg/L 上限並被標準描述為鹹味來源？

D.gap: 抓到常見水質金屬，但誤把 iron 的紅色外觀當鹹味。
D.followup: W04 overview 同時提到 chloride 與 iron；哪一個造成 salty taste，哪一個造成 reddish appearance？

C.gap: 把 copper 門檻記成味覺來源，忽略題幹的 salty clue。
C.followup: W04 Part 1 對 copper 設 1 mg/L，但標準是否把 copper 描述為 salty taste 的來源？

M02_Q05.stem: According to Part 1: Verify Water Quality Indicators of Feature W01: Water Quality Indicators, water delivered to the project and intended for human contact must not exceed what maximum thresholds for nephelometric turbidity?
M02_Q05.explanation: W01 Water Quality Indicators, Part 1 Verify Water Quality Indicators 要求 human contact water 的 turbidity is less than or equal to 1.0 NTU, FTU or FNU。這是 W01 的 maximum threshold，並與 100 ml sample 中不得檢出 coliforms 並列。

C.gap: 套用過度嚴格的濁度值，未依 W01 precondition 門檻。
C.followup: W01 Part 1 的 turbidity threshold 是 1.0 還是更接近高階處理設備的低濁度要求？

D.gap: 選了不存在的中間值，可能把其他標準濁度門檻混入。
D.followup: 在 W01 Part 1 條文中，NTU、FTU、FNU 三種單位前面的共同數值是多少？

B.gap: 接近正確數值但低估上限，未精確記住 1.0 NTU。
B.followup: W01 Part 1 寫的是 less than or equal to 哪個整數濁度值，而不是 0.x 的值？

M02_Q06.stem: According to Feature W04: Enhanced Water Quality, all water being delivered to the project area for human consumption must meet which of the following maximum limit for Iron?
M02_Q06.explanation: W04 Enhanced Water Quality, Part 1 Meet Thresholds for Drinking Water Taste 對 human consumption water 設定 Iron ≤ 0.3 mg/L。這屬於 taste、odor and appearance 的 aesthetic threshold。

D.gap: 把 aluminum 的 0.2 mg/L 門檻誤套到 iron。
D.followup: W04 Part 1 中 Aluminum 與 Iron 都有 mg/L 上限；哪一個對應 0.3 mg/L？

B.gap: 把 copper 的 1 mg/L 門檻套到 iron，混淆不同金屬。
B.followup: 若 W04 Part 1 對 Copper 設 1 mg/L，Iron 的紅色外觀相關門檻是多少？

A.gap: 把 manganese 或 sulfide 的低門檻誤認為 iron 上限。
A.followup: W04 Part 1 裡 0.05 mg/L 常見於哪些參數，是否為 Iron 的要求？

M02_Q07.stem: Many people are inadequately hydrated, and often reach for sugar-sweetened beverages instead of water because of what reason?

options.text: You do not need to drink a lot of water.
Mistrust in the safety of drinking water.

M02_Q07.explanation: WELL Water concept Overview 指出，people who mistrust the safety of their water can have lower plain water intake and higher sugar-sweetened beverage intake。W06 Drinking Water Promotion, Part 1 Ensure Drinking Water Access 以 verified quality 與可近性降低這類 hydration barrier。

C.gap: 只看到 bottled water 行為，未指出背後的 tap water safety mistrust。
C.followup: W06 overview 提到 bottled water adoption 被什麼 public perception 催化，而不只是個人偏好？

A.gap: 否定補水需求，與 WELL 對 inadequate hydration 的問題設定相反。
A.followup: Water concept Overview 為何強調成人 daily water consumption guideline 與許多人 hydration 不足？

B.gap: 把行為歸因於不喜歡水，忽略安全感知才是標準引用重點。
B.followup: 題幹問為何轉向 sugar-sweetened beverages；標準引用的是 taste dislike 還是 safety perception？

M02_Q08.stem: While there have been drastic improvements in the drinking water quality over the years, there has been an increasing risk from industrial, agricultural, and pharmaceutical sources. According to the WELL Building Standard™ (WELL™), what contaminants derived from this issue can lead to impaired oxygen transport in infants and impair neurodevelopment in children?
M02_Q08.explanation: WELL Water concept Overview 說明 high nitrate levels can impair oxygen transport in infants，lead exposure can impair neurodevelopment in children。W02 Drinking Water Quality, Part 1 Meet Chemical Thresholds 也分別設定 Nitrate ≤ 50 mg/L as Nitrate 與 Lead ≤ 0.01 mg/L。

C.gap: 抓到 lead 的神經發展危害，但把 nitrate 誤換成 mercury。
C.followup: Water overview 對嬰兒 oxygen transport 指向哪個農業 runoff 常見污染物，而不是 mercury？

D.gap: 抓到 nitrate 卻錯配 copper，忽略兒童神經發展的 lead。
D.followup: W02 Part 1 同列 copper 與 lead，但哪一個在 overview 中連到 child neurodevelopment？

A.gap: 把 iron 外觀問題與 lead 健康危害混在一起。
A.followup: W04 提到 iron 主要影響 appearance；Water overview 的 infant oxygen transport 對應哪個 nitrogen compound？

M02_Q09.stem: In order to meet the requirements of Part 2: Meet Thresholds for Organics and Pesticides of Feature W02: Drinking Water Quality, what two options are available to the project for this precondition?

options.text: Drinking water quality report or on-site testing.

M02_Q09.explanation: W02 Drinking Water Quality, Part 2 Meet Thresholds for Organics and Pesticides 提供兩條 compliance path：Option 1 Drinking water quality report，或 Option 2 On-site testing。兩者都要涵蓋指定 pesticides 與 organic contaminants threshold。

C.gap: 只記住 on-site testing，漏掉 municipal report 路徑。
C.followup: W02 Part 2 在 Option 1 是否允許使用一年內 municipal water quality report 來證明門檻？

D.gap: 只記住 water quality report，漏掉現場測試替代路徑。
D.followup: 若 municipal report 未完整涵蓋 pesticides/organics，W02 Part 2 還提供哪個現場驗證選項？

A.gap: 用籠統 sampling 描述取代條文中的兩個正式選項。
A.followup: W02 Part 2 的標題下，正式列出的兩個 Option 名稱分別是什麼？

M02_Q10.stem: In Part 1: Assess and Maintain Drinking Water Quality of Feature W05: Drinking Water Quality Management, how often should the drinking water be tested in order to assess and maintain drinking water quality?
M02_Q10.explanation: W05 Drinking Water Quality Management, Part 1 Assess and Maintain Drinking Water Quality, Option 2 Water quality monitoring 要求 piped water delivered to drinking water dispensers be tested quarterly。若樣本超標，remediation and re-testing 必須在一個月內完成。

C.gap: 把 annual submission 誤當 testing frequency，混淆測試與上傳。
C.followup: W05 Part 1 同時有 quarterly testing 與 annual submission，題幹問的是哪一個動作的頻率？

D.gap: 高估測試頻率，未依 W05 monitoring 的季度要求。
D.followup: W05 Part 1 是否要求每週測水，還是只在超標後一個月內 remediation and re-testing？

A.gap: 把超標後一個月內重測誤認為常規測試頻率。
A.followup: W05 Part 1 中 one month 出現在哪個情境，是常規 monitoring 還是超標後補救？

M02_Q11.stem: How often are water testing results submitted to the WELL digital platform to satisfy Part 1: Assess and Maintain Drinking Water Quality of Feature W05: Drinking Water Quality Management?
M02_Q11.explanation: W05 Drinking Water Quality Management, Part 1 Assess and Maintain Drinking Water Quality 要求 water is tested quarterly，但 all test results are submitted annually through the WELL digital platform。測試頻率與提交流程不能混淆。

A.gap: 把提交頻率縮短為每月，未依 digital platform 年度提交。
A.followup: W05 Part 1 的測試是 quarterly；但條文說 test results 送到 WELL digital platform 的頻率為何？

B.gap: 誤以為每次測試後即時提交，忽略年度彙整要求。
B.followup: 若每季測水一次，W05 Part 1 是否要求每次測完立即提交，還是 annually submission？

C.gap: 把季度測試頻率直接套用到結果提交頻率。
C.followup: W05 Part 1 中 quarterly 修飾的是 water testing，還是 WELL digital platform submission？

M02_Q12.stem: Legionnaire’s disease especially affects which of the following:
M02_Q12.explanation: W03 Basic Water Management, overview 指出 Legionnaire’s disease especially affects the immunocompromised, smokers and those over age 50。Part 2 Implement Legionella Management Plan 要求針對 recirculated/aerosolized water systems 建立管理計畫以降低暴露風險。

A.gap: 只記住免疫低下族群，漏掉吸菸者與高齡族群。
A.followup: W03 overview 對 Legionnaire’s disease 的高風險族群是否只列 immunocompromised people？

B.gap: 只抓到 smoking risk，忽略標準列出的其他易感族群。
B.followup: 除了 smokers，W03 overview 還列出哪些族群 especially affected by Legionnaire’s disease？

C.gap: 只記住 over 50 年齡條件，漏掉健康狀態與吸菸因素。
C.followup: W03 overview 把 age over 50 與哪些條件並列，作為 Legionella 暴露後較高風險族群？

M02_Q13.stem: In Part 1: Assess and Maintain Drinking Water Quality for Feature W05: Drinking Water Quality Management, for all spaces, what contaminates must be tested for quarterly at the point of dispensing?
M02_Q13.explanation: W05 Drinking Water Quality Management, Part 1 Assess and Maintain Drinking Water Quality, Option 2 Water quality monitoring 要求 quarterly testing 並列出 turbidity、coliforms、lead 與 copper 等 dispenser threshold。Lead ≤ 10 µg/L、Copper ≤ 2 mg/L，且 coliforms 在特定情況下不得於 100 ml sample 檢出。

C.gap: 抓到 lead/copper，卻混入 mercury/arsenic 而漏掉 indicators。
C.followup: W05 Part 1 的 quarterly monitoring 是否把 turbidity 與 coliforms 作為 drinking water dispenser 指標？

A.gap: 保留 turbidity/copper 但漏掉 lead/coliforms，混入非本題項目。
A.followup: 在 W05 Part 1 Option 2 中，哪兩個金屬與 turbidity、coliforms 同列為監測門檻？

B.gap: 只抓到 indicators，卻錯把 mercury/nickel 當季度監測項。
B.followup: W05 Part 1 的金屬監測門檻列 Lead 與 Copper，是否列 Mercury 或 Nickel？

M02_Q14.stem: A project in Miami, Florida is working on completing the requirements for Feature W02: Drinking Water Quality. In Part 1: Meet Chemical Thresholds, what parameters do all drinking water dispensers meet?
M02_Q14.explanation: W02 Drinking Water Quality, Part 1 Meet Chemical Thresholds 要求 all drinking water dispensers 的 residual (free) chlorine does not exceed 4 mg/L。這與同 Part 中 total chlorine ≤ 5 mg/L 是不同參數。

D.gap: 把 residual chlorine 上限誇大，未區分消毒劑安全門檻。
D.followup: W02 Part 1 對 residual (free) chlorine 與 total chlorine 分別設定多少 mg/L 上限？

B.gap: 選了不存在的 7 mg/L，上限記憶不精確。
B.followup: 在 W02 Part 1 的 dispenser parameters 中，residual chlorine 是否高於 total chlorine 的 5 mg/L？

C.gap: 混入 W04 free chlorine taste 門檻，誤套到 W02 health threshold。
C.followup: W04 的 taste threshold 與 W02 的 chemical threshold 都提 chlorine；題幹指定的是哪個 feature？

M02_Q15.stem: According to WELL, building-scale interventions can improve water quality depending on the contaminants that need to be removed. Which system is not able to capture water contaminants?
M02_Q15.explanation: W02 Drinking Water Quality, Solutions 說明能 capture water contaminants 的 typical technologies 包括 activated carbon filters、ion exchange resins 與 reverse osmosis systems。HEPA filter 是空氣過濾或 W08 hand dryer 的語境，不是 W02 的飲水污染物捕捉系統。

A.gap: 把標準列出的有效水處理技術誤判為無效。
A.followup: W02 Solutions 是否明確把 ion exchange resins 列為能 capture contaminants 的 typical technology？

C.gap: 誤排除 reverse osmosis，忽略其在 W02 中的污染物捕捉角色。
C.followup: W02 Solutions 對 reverse osmosis systems 的描述，是可捕捉 contaminants 還是與水處理無關？

B.gap: 誤認 activated carbon filters 不能處理飲水污染物。
B.followup: W02 Solutions 和 W04 Solutions 都提到 carbon media；它在水質改善中扮演什麼角色？

M02_Q16.stem: Lead, arsenic, antimony, mercury, nickel, copper, cadmium, and Chromium are all examples of which of the following?
M02_Q16.explanation: W02 Drinking Water Quality, Part 1 Meet Chemical Thresholds 列出 arsenic、cadmium、chromium、copper、lead、mercury、nickel 等 drinking water chemical thresholds。這些屬於影響 drinking water quality 的 contaminants，而非 microorganisms。

C.gap: 把金屬污染物誤認為 disinfectant byproducts，混淆污染來源。
C.followup: W02 Part 1 中 THMs/HAA5 才是 disinfectant byproducts；lead、arsenic、mercury 屬於哪類參數？

B.gap: 把化學金屬污染物誤當微生物，忽略 chemical threshold。
B.followup: W02 的 Part 1 標題是 Meet Chemical Thresholds；這些金屬是否屬於 biological indicators？

A.gap: 混淆 metals 與 organic pollutants，未分清 W02 Part 1 與 Part 2。
A.followup: W02 Part 2 才列 benzene、toluene 等 organics；題幹這些元素主要出現在哪個 Part？

M02_Q17.stem: To promote proper hydration, what is the maximum distance all parts of regularly occupied floor space should be from water dispensers in Feature W06: Drinking Water Promotion?
M02_Q17.explanation: W06 Drinking Water Promotion, Part 1 Ensure Drinking Water Access, Option 1 Dispenser availability 要求至少一個 drinking water dispenser 位於所有 regularly occupied floor area 的 100 ft (30 m) walk distance 內，且每層至少一個。Dining areas 也必須有飲水機。

C.gap: 把距離要求記得過度嚴格，低估 W06 可近性半徑。
C.followup: W06 Part 1 的 walk distance 是 10 m 還是 30 m，並且是否要求每層至少一台？

A.gap: 把允許距離放得太遠，削弱 regularly occupied area 可近性。
A.followup: 若飲水機距離放到 50 m，還能符合 W06 Part 1 的 100 ft walk distance 嗎？

D.gap: 嚴重高估允許距離，忽略飲水可近性是 hydration 核心。
D.followup: W06 要 remove barriers to accessibility；100 m 的距離是否仍符合 Part 1 的 dispenser availability？

M02_Q18.stem: As part of dispenser maintenance for Feature W06: Drinking Water Promotion, how often should the mouthpieces/outlets, protective guards and basins of drinking water fountains and dispensers be cleaned?
M02_Q18.explanation: W06 Drinking Water Promotion, Part 1 Ensure Drinking Water Access, Option 2 Dispenser maintenance 要求 mouthpieces/outlets、protective guards、aerators、basins and touch points are cleaned on a daily basis。這是維持飲水機可用與衛生的明確頻率。

A.gap: 低估清潔頻率，以每週兩次取代 daily maintenance。
A.followup: W06 Part 1 Option 2 對飲水機 outlet、guard、basin 的要求是 daily 還是 weekly-based？

B.gap: 把清潔週期放寬為隔日，未達 daily basis 要求。
B.followup: 若 mouthpieces 每隔一天清潔，是否符合 W06 對 all drinking water dispensers 的維護文字？

D.gap: 把每日接觸點清潔誤降為每週，忽略 touch points。
D.followup: W06 Part 1 為何把 touch points 與 basins 一起列入 daily cleaning，而不是 weekly cleaning？

M02_Q19.stem: A software company is building a new 100,000 sq ft office building in San Francisco. The client is concerned with microbial growth in the building's internal water supply. Which of the following filtration system would help prevent microbial growth in the potable water according to Feature W02: Drinking Water Quality?

options.text: Reverse osmosis system with a carbon filter

M02_Q19.explanation: W02 Drinking Water Quality, Solutions 將 reverse osmosis (RO) systems 與 activated carbon filters 列為能 capture contaminants 的 typical technologies；但微生物控制本身在 W01 Solutions 中更明確連到 ultraviolet (UV) light killing coliforms and pathogenic microbes。若題意重點是 prevent microbial growth，標準依據與標示答案不完全一致。

A.gap: 把沉砂或顆粒過濾誤當成微生物控制策略。
A.followup: W01 Solutions 對 coliforms/pathogenic microbes 提到的是低 turbidity 後的 UV，還是 sand filter？

D.gap: 把 alkaline ionizer 當成 WELL 認可的微生物水處理技術。
D.followup: 在 W02 Solutions 的 typical technologies 中，有沒有列 alkaline water ionizer 作為污染物控制方式？

C.gap: RO/carbon 著重物理捕捉 contaminants，carbon bed 反而可能孳生微生物
C.followup: 要『抑制微生物生長』，靠物理捕捉的 RO/carbon，還是能殺滅 coliforms 與 pathogens 的 UV？

M02_Q20.stem: What bathroom accommodations can be implemented within a business office to help support hygiene in order to meet the requirements of Part 1: Provide Bathroom and Handwashing Accommodations of Feature W08: Hygiene Support?

options.text: Install a hook or shelf for storage support
Provide access to menstrual products at no cost
Include trash cans in womens and single user bathrooms

M02_Q20.explanation: W08 Hygiene Support, Part 1 Provide Bathroom and Handwashing Accommodations, Option 1 Bathroom Accommodations 要求 stalls 提供 hook/shelf storage support、women’s and single-user bathrooms 提供 menstrual products at no cost or at least 50% subsidized，並在 women’s and single-user stalls 設 trash receptacles。題目列出的措施都屬於此 Part 的 bathroom accommodations。

A.gap: 只記住 storage support，漏掉 menstrual products 與 trash receptacles。
A.followup: W08 Part 1 Option 1 是否只要求 hook/shelf，還是同時處理月經用品與垃圾桶配置？

B.gap: 只看到月經用品，忽略其他 bathroom accommodation 條目。
B.followup: 除了 menstrual products，W08 Part 1 對 toilet stall 還要求哪些 storage 或 disposal 支援？

C.gap: 只抓到 trash cans，漏掉儲物與月經用品支援。
C.followup: W08 Part 1 的 women’s and single-user bathroom 要求是否只限 trash receptacles？

M02_Q21.stem: A business office provides an onsite daycare facility for working parents. They include access to family bathrooms for those employees. What would the bathroom need to include in Part 1: Provide Bathroom and Handwashing Accommodations for Feature W08: Hygiene Support?

options.text: Stalls just for children to use.
Children's Sinks and toilets, or accommodation to use the adult size options.

M02_Q21.explanation: W08 Hygiene Support, Part 1 Provide Bathroom and Handwashing Accommodations, Option 2 Family bathrooms 要求 family bathrooms 包含 children’s toilet facilities or accommodations for child use of adult size toilet，以及 children’s sinks or accommodations for child use of adult size sink。它也列出 motion sensor lights、skid resistant floors、safety grab bars 等配套。

B.gap: 把 child accommodation 縮小成兒童專用隔間，未涵蓋 sink/toilet。
B.followup: W08 Part 1 Option 2 要求的是 stalls for children，還是 children’s toilet/sink facilities or accommodations？

A.gap: 誤把 carpet 當防滑策略，與 skid resistant floors 要求不同。
A.followup: Family bathroom 條文說 skid resistant floors；carpet 在潮濕浴廁中是否等同於該要求？

D.gap: 把兒童可及開關誤認為條文，混淆 motion sensor lights。
D.followup: W08 Part 1 Option 2 提到 lighting 時，是要求 children reachable switches 還是 motion sensor lights？

M02_Q22.stem: A new construction building in a rainy climate is aiming for WELL certification. Excess moisture and dampness in a building is often a problem in this area. This can lead to health problems for the building's occupants. According to Part 1: Design Envelope for Moisture Protection of Feature W07: Moisture Management, which of the following is not a strategy that must be implemented to prevent moisture?

options.text: Install porous mats at all entry ways to prevent tracking in water.
Management of site drainage and storm water during construction.

M02_Q22.explanation: W07 Moisture Management, Part 1 Design Envelope for Moisture Protection 要求 site drainage and storm water management during construction、air tightness testing、entryway design strategies、continuous drainage plane 與 capillary break methods。Porous mats at all entryways 並不是 Part 1 條列的必備 moisture protection strategy。

C.gap: 誤把 continuous drainage plane 排除，但它是 envelope 明列策略。
C.followup: W07 Part 1 是否要求在 exterior cladding 內側設 continuous drainage plane 與 flashing integration？

B.gap: 誤排除 air tightness testing，忽略水蒸氣轉移評估。
B.followup: W07 Part 1 中 air tightness testing 的目的，是不是用來 assess water vapor transfer？

D.gap: 誤排除施工期排水與 storm water 管理要求。
D.followup: 對 construction after registration 的專案，W07 Part 1 是否要求驗證 site drainage/storm water management？

M02_Q23.stem: Feature W07: Moisture Management of the WELL Building Standard stipulates that in order to control the moisture of the interior of a building you must put into place a plan that addresses the following:

options.text: Putting a water drainage plan into place.
The replacement of moisture-sensitive building materials.
Condensation on cold surfaces, such as basements, slab-on-grade floors, the inside of exterior walls and glazing.

M02_Q23.explanation: W07 Moisture Management, Part 2 Design Interiors for Moisture Management, Option 1 Condensation and liquid water management 要求室內濕氣措施至少處理 condensation on cold surfaces，例如 basements、slab-on-grade floors、inside of exterior walls and glazing。它也要求保護 moisture-sensitive materials 與選用耐濕 finishes。

C.gap: 把材料保護理解成替換材料，忽略 condensation 也必須處理。
C.followup: W07 Part 2 要求 protection/selection of materials 之外，還明列哪種 cold surface condensation 問題？

B.gap: 把 envelope drainage plan 誤套到 interior moisture management。
B.followup: 題幹說 control moisture of interior；W07 Part 2 與 Part 1 drainage plane 的焦點有何不同？

A.gap: 把設備方案當成條文必列計畫內容，過度具體化。
A.followup: W07 Part 2 是否指定必須安裝 dehumidifier，還是要求措施能 address condensation and liquid water？

M02_Q24.stem: A WELL project is implementing a Mold and Moisture Management Plan. Which of the following would not be found on this plan in Part 3: Implement Mold and Moisture Management Plan of Feature W07: Moisture Management?

options.text: Submit quarterly mold and leaks inspection report.
Create system for occupants and tenants to report mold or water damage.
Create a schedule to inspect for water damage or pooling, discoloration and mold on ceilings, walls, floors and HVAC equipment.
Implement a system to periodically check for water pipe leaks.

M02_Q24.explanation: W07 Moisture Management, Part 3 Implement Mold and Moisture Management Plan 要求 schedule of periodic inspections、periodic leak assessment protocol，以及 occupant/tenant notification system；inspection results are submitted annually through the WELL digital platform。Quarterly mold and leaks inspection report 不是條文要求的提交頻率。

D.gap: 誤排除 pipe leak inspection protocol，但這是 plan 核心內容。
D.followup: W07 Part 3 Option 1 是否要求 system or inspection protocol to periodically assess water pipe leaks？

B.gap: 誤排除 occupant reporting system，忽略使用者通報機制。
B.followup: W07 Part 3 對 occupants and tenants reporting mold or water damage 有沒有明確要求？

C.gap: 誤排除週期性檢查清單，未抓到 ceilings/walls/HVAC。
C.followup: W07 Part 3 的 inspection schedule 要檢查哪些水損、pooling、discoloration 或 mold 位置？

M02_Q25.stem: A new office complex wants to help reduce demand on its city's water supply by installing a non-potable water capture and reuse system. However, they are worried about cross-contamination. In Feature W09 β: Onside Non -Potable Water Reuse, what does not need to be included in the safety plan?

options.text: A list of all applicable local codes and regulation for where the system is being installed.
A blueprint of the building where the system is being installed.
A flow diagram that displays the non-potable water sources, conveyances, storage units, treatment devices and points of use.
A list of the key team roles for design, operations, maintenance and third party inspections.

M02_Q25.explanation: W09 beta Onsite Non-Potable Water Reuse, Part 1 Implement Safety Plan for Non-Potable Water Capture and Reuse 要求 safety plan 包含 applicable codes/regulations、key team roles，以及 process flow diagram showing sources, conveyances, storage, treatment devices and points of use。條文沒有要求提交整棟 building blueprint。

A.gap: 誤排除法規清單，但 jurisdictional codes 是 safety plan 必備。
A.followup: W09 Part 1 safety plan 為何要列 applicable local codes and regulations，與系統核准有何關係？

D.gap: 誤排除團隊角色清單，忽略設計與維運責任界定。
D.followup: W09 Part 1 要求 key team roles 涵蓋 design、operations、maintenance 與哪一類 inspection？

C.gap: 誤排除 process flow diagram，未理解交叉污染控制需要流程圖。
C.followup: W09 Part 1 的 flow diagram 要顯示哪些 non-potable water sources、storage 與 points of use？

M02_Q26.stem: Feature W09 β: Onsite Non-Potable Water Reuse of the WELL Building Standard states that a project can help decrease water use by what percent by installing non-potable water reuse and capture systems?
M02_Q26.explanation: W09 β Onsite Non-Potable Water Reuse, Part 1 Implement Safety Plan for Non-Potable Water Capture and Reuse 要求建立 safety plan，涵蓋 sources、treatment、points of use、exposure control、monitoring 與 annual documentation。其 Solutions 明確指出，妥善管理 non-potable water reuse and capture systems 可在 new buildings 降低 water use up to 75%。

A.gap: 把節水潛力低估為中等成效，未連到 W09 的 up to 數值。
A.followup: W09 β 的 Solutions 說 non-potable water reuse 在 new buildings 可降低多少 water use？

C.gap: 把節水潛力誤判為過高，超出 W09 overview 的 stated impact。
C.followup: 若 W09 只說 up to 某百分比，考試中看到更高數字時應如何回到原文核對？

B.gap: 把保守節水估計當成標準數字，忽略 reuse 系統的最大潛力。
B.followup: W09 Part 1 要求 safety plan 的目的，是小幅節水，還是支撐較高比例的 non-potable reuse？

M02_Q27.stem: To help support effective handwashing practice in a building for Part 3: Support Effective Handwashing of Feature W08: Hygiene Support, what is one requirement that must be addressed?

options.text: Proper signage is displayed for locations of handwashing stations.
The water column is at minimum 3 inches away from the edge of the sink.
The faucet is designed for water to flow directly down the drain.

M02_Q27.explanation: W08 Hygiene Support, Part 3 Support Effective Handwashing 要求 newly installed sinks 的水柱設計符合三項參數，其中 water column 必須 at least 3 inches away from any edge of the sink。這是降低 splash 與周邊污染風險的具體 sink design requirement。

B.gap: 把 handwashing signage 誤當成 Part 3 的 sink geometry 要求。
B.followup: W08 Part 3 問的是 sink 與 water column 設計；signage 是 W08 哪一個 Part 的要求？

D.gap: 把水流直接入排水孔當成好設計，方向與防濺水要求相反。
D.followup: W08 Part 3 為何要求 faucet design 防止 water column 直接流入 drain？

A.gap: 用一般防濺概念取代原文指定的水柱距離與尺寸參數。
A.followup: W08 Part 3 列出的 newly installed sinks 三個設計參數中，有沒有要求 splash guards？

M02_Q28.stem: According to the WELL Building Standard Feature W07: Moisture Management overview, what percentage of buildings are affected by excess moisture and dampness in Europe, Canada, and the US?
M02_Q28.explanation: W07 Moisture Management, Part 1 Design Envelope for Moisture Protection 的 Issue 說 excess moisture and dampness 影響 Europe、Canada 與 U.S. about 20% of buildings。Part 1 進一步要求 envelope design 透過 drainage、air tightness、vapor pressure 與 drainage plane 等策略降低 moisture intrusion and accumulation。

C.gap: 低估潮濕建築比例，未抓到 W07 Issue 的 about 20%。
C.followup: W07 overview 提到 Europe、Canada、U.S. 的 dampness 影響比例，是一成還是約五分之一？

D.gap: 把潮濕建築比例高估，可能與其他健康比例混淆。
D.followup: W07 同段還提到 U.S. asthma cases 的 one fifth；這與 buildings affected 的比例是否相同？

B.gap: 把問題規模誇大為四成，超出 W07 overview 的描述。
B.followup: 當題目問 buildings affected 而非 illness burden 時，W07 原文的百分比是哪一個？

M02_Q29.stem: The Water concept in the WELL Building Standard does NOT aim to improve which of the following?

options.text: Provide adequate sanitation through better infrastructure design.
Provide access to better water quality by promoting bottle water.
Increase proper hydration in the building occupants.
Reduce health risk associated with contaminated water and excessive moisture in buildings.

M02_Q29.explanation: W06 Drinking Water Promotion, Part 1 Ensure Drinking Water Access 要求 dispenser within 100 ft walking distance、piped or refillable-container supply，且新設 fountains 可供 bottle-refilling。Water concept 的目標是 hydration、降低 contaminated water 與 excessive moisture 風險、改善 sanitation，並不是推廣 bottled water。
