C.gap: 把 Water concept 的核心 hydration 目標誤認為不屬於此概念。
C.followup: W06 Part 1 如何透過 dispenser availability 支持 occupants 的 adequate hydration？

D.gap: 忽略 Water concept 明確包含 contaminated water 與 excessive moisture 風險。
D.followup: W07 Moisture Management 與 W02 Drinking Water Quality 分別對應哪些健康風險？

A.gap: 忽略 bathroom 與 handwashing infrastructure 也是 Water concept 的一部分。
A.followup: W08 Hygiene Support 的 bathroom accommodations 為何能被歸在 Water concept 的 sanitation 目標中？

M02_Q30.stem: Access to good quality water not only helps with sanitation and hygiene but it can also reduce the risk of acquiring what kind of diseases?
M02_Q30.explanation: W08 Hygiene Support, Part 1 Provide Bathroom and Handwashing Accommodations 要求提供 handwashing support，例如 fragrance-free liquid soap、hand drying method 與 proper hand washing signage。Water concept overview 說 well-designed bathrooms 與 appropriate hand washing 可降低 poor hygiene practices 相關的 enteric and respiratory diseases 風險。

C.gap: 只抓到 enteric disease，漏掉題目要問的 respiratory disease 面向。
C.followup: Water overview 同時列出 enteric and respiratory diseases；若選項只問其中一類，哪個也明確被提到？

D.gap: 把易感族群或免疫狀態誤當成水與衛生可降低的疾病類型。
D.followup: W08 Part 1 的 handwashing support 是針對傳播途徑，還是直接改善 immune disease？

A.gap: 將 lead 等水污染神經風險混入 sanitation and hygiene 題意。
A.followup: 若題幹聚焦 sanitation、hygiene 與 handwashing，應回到 W08 還是 W02 的 neurodevelopment 例子？

M02_Q31.stem: A project team is working to earn the optimization Part 3: Support Effecting Handwashing of Feature W08: Hygiene support which aims to help improve the surrounding environment of handwashing areas reduce the risk of bacteria developing. Which of the following would help aid in this?

options.text: Continuously top off the soap dispensers to prevent it from running out.
Have the handwashing sinks be separate from the bathrooms.
Have a faucet design that prevents water from flowing directly into the drain.

M02_Q31.explanation: W08 Hygiene Support, Part 3 Support Effective Handwashing 要求 faucet design prevents the water column from flowing directly into the drain，或安裝 sink drain stopper，且水龍頭全開時 water does not splash outside the sink。這對應 overview 中 water splashing from the drain may spread bacteria 的風險。

C.gap: 把空間分離當成細菌控制策略，未對應 Part 3 的 faucet/drain 設計。
C.followup: W08 Part 3 的要求是改變 handwashing sink 本身，還是把 sinks 移到 bathroom 外？

A.gap: 知道 soap 污染風險，卻忽略 Part 3 聚焦 drain splash 與 sink geometry。
A.followup: W08 overview 確實提醒 soap dispensers 不宜 topped off，但 Part 3 的 faucet 要求是什麼？

B.gap: 混淆 handwashing signage 與降低 sink 周邊細菌散布的設計要求。
B.followup: 若目標是避免 drain splash spread bacteria，W08 Part 3 指向 signage 還是 faucet flow path？

M02_Q32.stem: A new WELL project is going to have an onsite cafeteria for its employees. In order to meet the requirements in Part 1: Provide Bathroom and Handwashing Accommodations of Feature W08: Hygiene Support for proper handwashing accommodations for this commercial kitchen and dining space, what must be done?

options.text: Have handwashing stations at every entrance.
Have 5 or more handwashing stations available.
There are no special requirements for commercial spaces.
Post clear signage to the nearest handwashing location at the entrance to all food prep and consumption areas.

M02_Q32.explanation: W08 Hygiene Support, Part 1 Provide Bathroom and Handwashing Accommodations 對 Commercial Kitchen Spaces & Commercial Dining Spaces 要求，在所有 food preparation and consumption areas 的入口設置 clear signage directing toward the nearest handwashing location。這是商業廚房與用餐空間的額外 signage requirement。

A.gap: 把入口 signage 誤解為每個入口都要設置 handwashing station。
A.followup: W08 Part 1 商業廚房條款要求 entrance 有什麼資訊，是 station 本身還是指向最近位置的 signage？

B.gap: 憑空加入固定數量門檻，原文沒有五座 handwashing stations 要求。
B.followup: W08 Part 1 對 commercial dining spaces 有列出 handwashing station 數量，還是要求清楚指引？

C.gap: 忽略 commercial kitchen/dining spaces 有獨立的 handwashing signage 條款。
C.followup: W08 Part 1 在 For Commercial Kitchen Spaces & Commercial Dining Spaces 下新增了哪個要求？

M02_Q33.stem: To ensure the drinking water of a building is within the threshold for organics and pesticides, routine on-site testing can be done, according to Part 2: Meet Thresholds for Organics and Pesticides of Feature W02: Drinking Water Quality. What is a requirement that must be met?

options.text: The test must show no traces of any pesticides or organic contaminants.
Any pesticides or organic contaminants are okay as long as they are under the threshold.
Tested water shows no trace of either pesticides OR organic contaminants.
Drinking water dispensers provide water that meets the threshold for at least two pesticides and three organic contaminants.

M02_Q33.explanation: W02 Drinking Water Quality, Part 2 Meet Thresholds for Organics and Pesticides 的 Option 2 On-site testing 要求 all drinking water dispensers provide water that meets thresholds for at least two pesticides and three organic contaminants，且測試者不得與 WELL project 有 conflict of interest。重點是指定數量的 contaminants 達到 thresholds，不是完全零檢出。

A.gap: 把 meet thresholds 誤解為所有 pesticides 與 organics 都必須零檢出。
A.followup: W02 Part 2 Option 2 說的是 no traces，還是 at least two pesticides and three organic contaminants meet thresholds？

B.gap: 忽略 Part 2 只允許指定 contaminants 在 threshold 以下，不是任何污染物皆可。
B.followup: 若 municipal report 顯示某 pesticide 超標，W02 Part 2 的 Note 要 project 優先選哪些項目測試？

C.gap: 把 AND 的最低測項要求誤讀成 pesticides 或 organics 其中一類零檢出。
C.followup: W02 Part 2 onsite testing 同時要求 pesticides 和 organic contaminants，兩類各至少幾項？

M02_Q34.stem: Part 1: Meet Chemical Thresholds of Feature W02: Drinking Water Quality of Feature W02: Drinking Water Quality stipulates that a Project must provide at least one drinking water dispenser plus how many water dispensers per dwelling unit?
M02_Q34.explanation: W02 Drinking Water Quality, Part 1 Meet Chemical Thresholds 要求 project provides at least one drinking water dispenser, plus one drinking water dispenser per dwelling unit。這是 Part 1 的 dispenser availability requirement，之後才要求所有 dispensers 符合化學參數 thresholds。

C.gap: 把每戶 dispenser 數量誇大到四台，超出 W02 Part 1 要求。
C.followup: W02 Part 1 的文字是 plus one drinking water dispenser per dwelling unit，還是每戶多台？

A.gap: 憑住宅單元需求推高數量，未回到原文的 one per dwelling unit。
A.followup: 題目問 per dwelling unit 時，W02 Part 1 的 minimum quantity 是以哪個數字表達？

B.gap: 把至少一台專案總量與每戶一台規則相加錯讀。
B.followup: W02 Part 1 中 at least one drinking water dispenser 與 per dwelling unit 的要求分別指什麼？

M02_Q35.stem: Legionella bacteria naturally occur in water at low concentrations but may colonize in recirculating water systems. If contaminated water aerosols are inhaled it can lead to many health issues and even death. In Part 2: Implement Legionella Management Plan of Feature W03: Basic Water Management, in order to prevent the colonization of Legionella, a proper management plan must be put into place. Which of the following isn't included in the items that need to be addressed?
M02_Q35.explanation: W03 Basic Water Management, Part 2 Implement Legionella Management Plan 要求 plan addresses hot water systems, cooling towers, decorative fountains and any other project-controlled devices or spaces where water is recirculated and aerosolized。Commercial Kitchen Appliances 並未列為這個 Legionella plan 的指定項目。

C.gap: 把明列的 cooling towers 誤當成不需納入 Legionella plan。
C.followup: W03 Part 2 在第一句列出的 systems 中，cooling towers 是否屬於需 address 的水資產？

D.gap: 忽略 hot water systems 是 Legionella colonization 的核心風險系統。
D.followup: Legionella 常在 recirculating water systems colonize；W03 Part 2 是否明列 hot water systems？

B.gap: 將 decorative fountains 排除，但原文明確列入 aerosolized water 風險。
B.followup: W03 Part 2 對 decorative fountains 的要求，和 cooling towers 是否同樣需要被 plan address？

M02_Q36.stem: A Legionella Management Plan must document monitoring results, corrective actions, and any sample results and submit them through the WELL digital platform. As part of Part 2: Implement Legionella Management Plan of Feature W03: Basic Water Management, how often must projects submit this documentation?
M02_Q36.explanation: W03 Basic Water Management, Part 2 Implement Legionella Management Plan 的 Option 2 要求 project submits annually through the WELL digital platform documentation of monitoring results, corrective actions and Legionella sample results, if any。提交頻率是 annually。

A.gap: 把 Legionella documentation 提交頻率誤設為過度頻繁的 monthly。
A.followup: W03 Part 2 Option 2 用哪個詞描述 WELL digital platform 的提交頻率？

D.gap: 把 annual submission 誤讀為半年一次，未對準原文頻率。
D.followup: 如果管理計畫內可有不同 monitoring schedule，提交 documentation 到平台是否也是半年一次？

C.gap: 混淆季度水質監測與 Legionella plan documentation 的年度提交。
C.followup: W05 Part 1 有 quarterly testing；W03 Part 2 的 Legionella documentation 是不是同一頻率？

M02_Q37.stem: A new office project is not only concerned about the health-based concerns in the drinking water, but with the water aesthetics as well. What filtration system can help with the taste and visual appearances of the building drinking water, as found in Feature W04: Enhanced Water Quality?
M02_Q37.explanation: W04 Enhanced Water Quality, Part 1 Meet Thresholds for Drinking Water Taste 管理影響 taste, odor and appearance 的 aesthetic chemicals，例如 chloride、iron、TDS 與 free chlorine thresholds。W04 Solutions 指出 treatment options include filtration with carbon media and reverse osmosis，用於改善 nuisance chemicals。

B.gap: 把可處理特定離子的 ion exchange 誤當成 W04 overview 例示方案。
B.followup: W04 Solutions 明確列出的兩種 treatment options 是 filtration with carbon media 和哪一種？

A.gap: 把 disinfection 的 UV filtration 混入 taste and appearance 的處理策略。
A.followup: W04 Part 1 關注 chloride、iron、TDS 等美觀口感參數；UV 主要解決哪類問題？

D.gap: 把一般懸浮物過濾想成飲水 taste aesthetics 的標準方案。
D.followup: W04 overview 面對 nuisance chemicals 時，原文有提 inline sand filtration system 嗎？

M02_Q38.stem: How is drinking water taste verified, in Feature W04: Enhanced Water Quality?
M02_Q38.explanation: W04 Enhanced Water Quality, Part 1 Meet Thresholds for Drinking Water Taste 要求 project water for human consumption meets measured thresholds，例如 TDS ≤ 500 mg/L、chloride ≤ 250 mg/L、iron ≤ 0.3 mg/L 與 free chlorine ≤ 1.25 mg/L。因為合規取決於現場水質濃度是否達標，drinking water taste 以 Performance Testing 驗證。

B.gap: 把水質濃度實測誤當成只需文件證明的設計項目。
B.followup: W04 Part 1 要確認 TDS、chloride、iron 等數值達標，Technical Document 能取代現場採樣嗎？

D.gap: 混淆 ongoing monitoring report 與初次驗證 taste thresholds 的方式。
D.followup: W04 Part 1 是一次性 threshold verification，還是 W05 那種定期監測資料提交？

A.gap: 把操作政策或排程誤認為能證明 drinking water taste threshold。
A.followup: 若要求 free chlorine ≤ 1.25 mg/L，Policy Schedule 能否直接證明水樣濃度？

M02_Q39.stem: A 2-story first-time registered project is testing the drinking water quality in its building. Where does Part 1: Assess and Maintain Drinking Water Quality of Feature W05: Drinking Water Quality Management state is the best place to take the sample from?

options.text: From every water dispenser on a single floor.
From the water dispenser that is farthest away from the water source.
From the water dispenser that is closest to the water source.
All drinking water dispensers should be tested.

M02_Q39.explanation: W05 Drinking Water Quality Management, Part 1 Assess and Maintain Drinking Water Quality 的 Option 1 要求 first-time registered projects pre-test water，採樣點包含 closest to the pipe that delivers water into the project 的 dispenser。只有 projects with more than two floors 才另外加入 highest floor 與 farthest dispenser。

A.gap: 把單層多點採樣誤認為兩層建築的 pre-test location 規則。
A.followup: W05 Part 1 Option 1 的 location 條款，是按每層全部取樣，還是指定 closest pipe location？

B.gap: 把超過兩層才需的 farthest dispenser 規則套到 2-story project。
B.followup: W05 Part 1 何時才要求取 highest floor 與 farthest dispenser 的水樣？

D.gap: 把 pre-test sampling 擴大成所有 dispensers 逐一測試。
D.followup: W05 Part 1 的 sampling locations 是代表性點位，還是要求 all drinking water dispensers should be tested？

M02_Q40.stem: A new WELL project is concerned with being transparent with the tenants about the building's drinking water quality. In order to comply with Part 2: Promote Drinking Water Transparency of Feature W05: Drinking Water Quality Management, a couple of things must prominently be displayed near the sources of drinking. One of those items is the most recent test results for water quality, which includes the date and compliance with thresholds. What is the other item that must be posted?

options.text: The last date of maintenance for the drinking dispenser.
Treatment technologies of the filters used, plus the recent date of maintenance or replacement.
What chemicals are being used to enhance the drinking water.
The cleaning scheduled for the water drinking dispenser.

M02_Q40.explanation: W05 Drinking Water Quality Management, Part 2 Promote Drinking Water Transparency 要求 near sources of drinking water 或 occupant website 顯示兩類資訊：最近 water quality sampling results，以及若使用 filters or treatment units，顯示 treatment technologies 與最近 maintenance 或 filter cartridge replacement date。

A.gap: 只抓到 maintenance date，漏掉 treatment technologies 與 filter replacement。
A.followup: W05 Part 2 對 filters or treatment units 要顯示的是單純日期，還是技術與維護/更換日期？

C.gap: 把 treatment technologies 誤解成列出用來強化水質的 chemicals。
C.followup: W05 Part 2 使用的是 treatment technologies 這個詞，是否要求公開投加 chemicals 清單？

D.gap: 混淆飲水機清潔排程與透明揭露的水質/濾材維護資訊。
D.followup: W05 Part 2 要 occupants 看到 cleaning schedule，還是 filter maintenance or cartridge replacement date？

M02_Q41.stem: Feature W06: Drinking Water Promotion details dispenser availability and dispenser maintenance. According to this feature, which option does not aid in drinking water promotion?

options.text: At least one water dispenser is located within a 100 ft walking distance from all regularly occupied floor and dining areas.
The water that supplies the dispensers is piped through the buildings water supply or stored in refillable containers.
Newly installed water fountains are designed for water bottle refilling.
Post the cleaning schedules of the water dispensers within view when standing at the dispenser.

M02_Q41.explanation: W06 Drinking Water Promotion, Part 1 Ensure Drinking Water Access 要求至少一台 dispenser within 100 ft walking distance、供水直接由 building supply piping 或 refillable containers 提供，且 newly installed fountains 支援 bottle-refilling。Dispenser maintenance 的 requirement 是 mouthpieces、guards、aerators、basins and touch points cleaned daily，並非張貼 cleaning schedules。

C.gap: 把 W06 明列的 bottle-refilling fountain 誤認為無助飲水推廣。
C.followup: W06 Part 1 Option 1 對 newly installed drinking water fountains 的 bottle-refilling 設計有何要求？

B.gap: 忽略 piped supply 或 refillable containers 是 dispenser availability 條款之一。
B.followup: W06 Part 1 要 water delivered by dispensers 來自哪些可接受來源？

A.gap: 把 100 ft walking distance 的核心 accessibility requirement 誤排除。
A.followup: W06 Part 1 如何用 100 ft walking distance 支持 regularly occupied areas 的 drinking water access？

M02_Q42.stem: The WELL Building Standard seeks to manage water quality in buildings. As part of this, Feature W07: Moisture Management details the issue of excess moisture and dampness in buildings. How many of the asthma cases in the U.S. are linked to excess moisture and dampness in a building?
M02_Q42.explanation: W07 Moisture Management, Part 1 Design Envelope for Moisture Protection 的 Issue 說 U.S. asthma cases 中約 one fifth are caused by excess moisture and dampness in buildings。這支撐 W07 透過 moisture intrusion、condensation 與 leaks 管理來降低 respiratory health risk。

D.gap: 低估 excess moisture 對 asthma cases 的歸因比例。
D.followup: W07 overview 提到 one fifth of asthma cases；換成百分比大約是多少？

B.gap: 把 asthma 歸因比例誇大為一半，超出 W07 原文。
B.followup: W07 Issue 說的是 one fifth，與 50% 這種 half 的表述是否一致？

C.gap: 把三分之一與 one fifth 混淆，未精確轉換比例。
C.followup: 當 WELL 用 one fifth 描述 asthma cases，應對應 20% 還是 33%？

M02_Q43.stem: A 10-story new office complex in New Orleans, LA is working on the interior of the building. Since New Orleans receives a large amount of annual rainfall, the project team is taking measures to protect against any moisture and mold issues. In Part 2: Design Interiors for Moisture Management of Feature W07: Moisture Management, besides addressing condensation issues, what is another issue that needs to be addressed?

options.text: Proper drainage for moisture build up.

M02_Q43.explanation: W07 Moisture Management, Part 2 Design Interiors for Moisture Management 包含 Option 1 condensation and liquid water management，以及 Option 2 Water leak control in fixtures。Option 2 要求 hard-piped fixtures 有 labeled, readily accessible single-throw manual shut-off 或 automatic shut-off at point-of-connection，並要求 water treatment devices 的 waste line 固定且具 backflow preventor。

B.gap: 憑空加入 evaporation system，未對應 Part 2 的 condensation 或 leak control。
B.followup: W07 Part 2 是要求安裝 evaporation system，還是管理 cold surfaces condensation 與 hard-piped fixtures leaks？

C.gap: 抓到排水概念但未對準 interiors Part 2 的 fixtures leak control。
C.followup: W07 Part 1 談 site drainage；題目問 Part 2 interiors 時，另一個 option 名稱是什麼？

D.gap: 忽略 Part 2 明確提供 Water leak control in fixtures 作為另一項路徑。
D.followup: W07 Part 2 除了 condensation and liquid water management，是否還有 Option 2？

M02_Q44.stem: A project designer is focusing their efforts on creating a bathroom design that will accommodate for enhanced hygiene support. Which of the following features would not aid in their design according to Part 2: Enhance Bathroom Accommodations of Feature W08: Hygiene Support?

options.text: A method to exit the bathroom hands free.
Providing single use hand drying cloths that can be washed and reused.

M02_Q44.explanation: W08 Hygiene Support, Part 2 Enhance Bathroom Accommodations 要求 all bathrooms 具備 hands-free flushing、contactless soap dispensers and hand drying、hands-free exit，以及符合條件的 sensor-activated faucets。Reusable single-use hand drying cloths 並不是 Part 2 的 bathroom enhancement requirement；fabric towel rolls 是 Part 1 handwashing support 的另一種 hand drying method。

D.gap: 把 Part 2 明列的 hands-free flushing 誤當成無助 hygiene design。
D.followup: W08 Part 2 第一項 bathroom requirement 是否就是 toilets equipped with hands-free flushing？

A.gap: 忽略 hands-free exit 是 Part 2 降低接觸點的核心要求。
A.followup: W08 Part 2 為何要求 users can exit the bathroom hands-free？

C.gap: 把 contactless soap dispensers 排除，但原文明確列入 Part 2。
C.followup: W08 Part 2 對 soap dispensers and hand drying 的 contactless 要求是什麼？

M02_Q45.stem: What is required to be submitted annually through the WELL digital platform for a safety plan for Non-Potable water capture and reuse?

options.text: List of key team members, maintenance logs, emergency operations.
Testing results, maintenance logs, chemicals used to treat odors.
Documents of start up procedure, maintenance logs, results from testing.
Emergency operations, a description of the system, maintenance logs.

M02_Q45.explanation: W09 β Onsite Non-Potable Water Reuse, Part 1 Implement Safety Plan for Non-Potable Water Capture and Reuse 要求 projects submit annually documentation of the startup procedure, maintenance logs, verification test results when applicable, and third-party inspections through the WELL digital platform。這是 safety plan implementation 的 annual submission requirement。

A.gap: 混入 team roles 與 emergency operations，漏掉 startup procedure 與 verification tests。
A.followup: W09 Part 1 annual submission 要交的是 key team members，還是 startup procedure 與測試/inspection 文件？

B.gap: 把 odor control chemicals 誤當成年度提交內容，且漏掉 startup procedure。
B.followup: W09 Part 1 safety plan 會描述 odor control strategies，但 annual documentation 條款列出哪些文件？

D.gap: 把 safety plan 內容清單與 annual documentation 提交清單混淆。
D.followup: W09 Part 1 的 emergency operations 與 system description 屬於 plan 內容，是否就是每年提交清單？

M02_Q46.stem: When testing the water quality, what temperature should the water be when tested?
M02_Q46.explanation: W05 Drinking Water Quality Management, Part 1 Assess and Maintain Drinking Water Quality 要求 first-time registered projects pre-test drinking water parameters before Performance Verification，且採樣點依 dispenser location 決定。提供的 WELL v2 standard text 未列出採樣水溫程序；來源解析稱 sample water should be taken from the cold water fixture，若無法調整水溫則記錄條件。

A.gap: 把熱水採樣誤認為飲用水水質測試的標準條件。
A.followup: W05 Part 1 測的是 drinking water dispensers；若程序要求 cold fixture，熱水會引入哪些非飲用狀態變因？

C.gap: 把折衷溫度當成標準，未區分 cold fixture 與例外記錄。
C.followup: 若採樣程序有指定 cold water fixture，無法調整水溫時應直接改 lukewarm 還是記錄條件？

B.gap: 忽略採樣條件會影響 disinfectants 與水質參數讀值。
B.followup: 在 W05 的 water quality testing 情境中，為何採樣條件不應被視為 any temperature？

M02_Q47.stem: A WELL Certified office building is testing the building's water supply for levels of disinfectants. In order to obtain a proper sample, how long must the water be running before gathering a sample?
M02_Q47.explanation: W05 Drinking Water Quality Management, Part 1 Assess and Maintain Drinking Water Quality 要求測試 total chlorine、residual free chlorine 等 parameters，W03 Basic Water Management, Part 1 也要求 residual chlorine 至少 annually monitoring。提供的 WELL v2 standard text 未列出 disinfectants 採樣前需放水的秒數；來源解析稱除非緊接前一個樣本，取樣前水需 run for at least 30 seconds。

D.gap: 低估 disinfectants 採樣前 flush 時間，可能取到停滯水樣。
D.followup: 若要量 residual chlorine，放水時間太短會不會反映 fixture 內停滯水而非供水狀態？

B.gap: 接近但仍少於來源程序的 30 seconds requirement。
B.followup: 題目問 disinfectants sample 前的固定秒數，來源解析中的 minimum 是 20 還是 30 seconds？

C.gap: 把取樣前放水時間拉長，未對準來源程序的 minimum。
C.followup: 若程序寫 at least 30 seconds，考題通常要選 minimum requirement 還是更長時間？

M02_Q48.stem: What type of verification is needed for Part 1: Design Envelope for Moisture Protection of Feature W07: Moisture Management?
M02_Q48.explanation: W07 Moisture Management, Part 1 Design Envelope for Moisture Protection 是設計敘述型要求，需說明 drainage and storm water management、air tightness testing、vapor pressure differentials、entryway strategies、continuous drainage plane 與 capillary break methods 等 envelope moisture protection strategies。這類合規重點在設計策略說明，因此以 Professional Narrative 驗證。

A.gap: 把設計敘事型 moisture envelope 策略誤當成單一責任方保證。
A.followup: W07 Part 1 要說明多項 envelope strategies，Letter of Assurance 是否足以呈現完整設計邏輯？

B.gap: 混淆持續維護報告與設計階段的 envelope moisture protection。
B.followup: W07 Part 3 才涉及 inspections results annual submission；Part 1 問的是哪一類設計證明？

C.gap: 以為現場照片能取代 moisture intrusion 與 vapor control 的策略說明。
C.followup: W07 Part 1 的 adverse vapor pressure differentials 與 capillary breaks，是否只靠照片即可完整證明？

M02_Q49.stem: A building is using reclaimed water for the urinals and toilets through the building's bathrooms. How often does the reclaimed water quality need to be tested?
M02_Q49.explanation: W01 Water Quality Indicators, Part 1 Verify Water Quality Indicators applies to water intended for human contact，例如 drinking、cooking、handwashing、showering or bathing，並要求 turbidity ≤ 1.0 NTU/FTU/FNU 與 coliforms not detected in any 100 ml sample。Reclaimed water used only for urinals and toilets is not listed as intended for human contact under this water quality indicator requirement。

B.gap: 把非接觸用途誤套成高頻水質測試義務。
B.followup: W01 Part 1 的適用範圍是所有建築用水，還是 likely to come in contact with occupants 的水？

A.gap: 混淆 W05 quarterly drinking water monitoring 與廁所 reclaimed water 用途。
A.followup: W05 Part 1 quarterly testing 是針對 drinking water dispensers；urinal/toilet reclaimed water 是否屬於同一類？

D.gap: 把年度水質提交概念套到不屬 human contact 的 reclaimed water。
D.followup: W03 或 W05 的 annual submission 條款是否自動適用於 urinals and toilets 的 reclaimed water？

M02_Q50.stem: How frequently in the building does signage indicating the water quality results need to be placed according to Part 2: Promote Drinking Water Transparency of Feature W05: Drinking Water Quality Management?

options.text: At the drinking fountains close to every exit/entrance.
The amount is at the discretion of the project team.

M02_Q50.explanation: W05 Drinking Water Quality Management, Part 2 Promote Drinking Water Transparency 要求 water quality results 與 filter/treatment maintenance information prominently displayed near sources of drinking water or on a website available to occupants。原文沒有指定每層、每座或出入口旁的固定張貼密度，而是以有效告知 occupants 為原則。

B.gap: 把 near sources 誤解成 every drinking fountain 的固定頻率。
B.followup: W05 Part 2 的文字是 prominently displayed near sources，是否明定每一座 fountain 都要貼？

A.gap: 自行加入每層一處的數量規則，原文沒有 floor-based density。
A.followup: W05 Part 2 是用 per floor 來規定 signage 數量，還是允許用 occupant website？

C.gap: 把出入口導向邏輯混入飲水水質透明揭露位置要求。
C.followup: W05 Part 2 要資訊靠近 drinking water sources，還是靠近 building exits/entrances？

M03_Q01.stem: A café located in an office building has recently altered its menu to incorporate more nutritious food options. The daily menu currently offers: Ham sandwich Grilled cheese sandwich Hamburger Fried fish Spaghetti Chicken and rice Oranges Apple slices Dried cherries What additional food item(s) should this cafeteria sell to meet the requirements of Feature N01: Fruits and Vegetables?

options.text: Fruit cups with no added sugar.
Nothing, the requirements are already met.

M03_Q01.explanation: N01 Fruits and Vegetables 的 Part 1 Provide Fruits and Vegetables 要求非 commercial dining spaces 至少提供 two varieties of fruits with no added sugar 和 two varieties of non-fried vegetables。題目已有足夠水果，但缺少第二種 non-fried vegetable，因此需要補上非油炸蔬菜選項。

A.gap: 把蔬菜種類數量與 non-fried 限制混淆。
A.followup: N01 Part 1 要求的是 non-fried vegetables；fried green tomatoes 在這個門檻下還能算合格蔬菜嗎？

C.gap: 只計算水果，忽略還需兩種非油炸蔬菜。
C.followup: 現有菜單中哪些項目能明確算作 non-fried vegetables？數量是否已達 N01 Part 1 的 two varieties？

B.gap: 看到 no added sugar 就忽略題目缺的是蔬菜。
B.followup: N01 Part 1 同時要求水果與 non-fried vegetables；若水果已足夠，下一個缺口應補哪一類？

M03_Q02.stem: A building owner is overhauling a building’s cafeteria menu to meet the requirements of Feature N03: Refined Ingredients. Which of the following is required of the new cafeteria?

options.text: Partially-hydrogenated oil may be included in a maximum of 50% of the food options.
All foods containing common allergens must be served in separate vending machines.
Wheat flour is banned as the primary ingredient in any food option.
No beverages may contain more than 25g of sugar.

M03_Q02.explanation: N03 Refined Ingredients 的 Part 1 Limit Total Sugars 要求所有每日販售或提供的 beverages 不得超過 25 g sugar per container or serving。此 feature 還要求至少 25% beverages 無糖或免費提供 drinking water，並限制非飲料食品糖量。

A.gap: 把 artificial ingredient 限制誤放到 N03 糖量規範。
A.followup: Partially hydrogenated oil 出現在 N05 的人工成分表；N03 Part 1 實際限制的是哪個 sugar threshold？

C.gap: 把 whole grain 推廣誤解成全面禁止 wheat flour。
C.followup: N03 Part 2 要求 50% grain-based foods 以 whole grain 為第一成分，這等同禁止 wheat flour 嗎？

B.gap: 把 allergen 管理誤認為 refined ingredients 要求。
B.followup: 若題目問 common allergens，應回到 N02 或 N09；N03 Part 1 的核心門檻是什麼？

M03_Q03.stem: A project owner has decided to limit the amount of all highly processed beverages, snacks, and meals. Which of the following ingredient restrictions must be true of all foods, beverages, snacks, and meals sold or distributed for N05: Artificial Ingredients?

options.text: Contains no artificial dyes, or flavorings
Specific colorings (Blue 1, Blue 2, Green 3, Orange B, Citrus Red 2, Red 3, Red 40, Yellow 5, Yellow 6, carmine, cochineal, caramel coloring) are phased out over a maximum of three years.
No individually sold, single-serving, non-beverage food items containing more than 40 g of sugar.
50% of foods must contain no High Fructose Corn syrup and/or another artificial sweetener.

M03_Q03.explanation: N05 Artificial Ingredients 的 Part 1 Limit Artificial Ingredients 允許 Option 1 Artificial ingredient phase out，要求最多三年內 phase out 表列人工成分，其中 colorings 包含 Blue 1、Red 40、Yellow 5、carmine、caramel coloring 等。標準還涵蓋 sweeteners、preservatives 及 fats and oils，並要求標示是否含有表列成分。

C.gap: 把 N03 的 sugar 限制誤套到 N05 人工成分。
C.followup: N05 Part 1 的表格列的是 colorings、sweeteners、preservatives 與 fats and oils，是否有 40 g sugar 門檻？

D.gap: 誤以為 N05 只要求一半食品避開甜味劑。
D.followup: N05 Part 1 是 phase out 或 restriction；它對表列 artificial sweeteners 的比例要求是 50% 還是全產品線？

A.gap: 只抓到 dyes，漏看 preservatives、sweeteners 與 oils。
A.followup: 若只禁止 artificial dyes 或 flavorings，是否覆蓋 N05 Part 1 表格中的 sodium nitrite、BHA、BVO 等項目？

M03_Q04.stem: Insufficient fruit and vegetable intake is attributed to ___________ deaths worldwide in 2013, according to Feature N01: Fruits and Vegetables.
M03_Q04.explanation: N01 Fruits and Vegetables 的 Issue 段落指出，insufficient fruit and vegetable intake 在 2013 年歸因於 5.2 million deaths worldwide。Part 1 Provide Fruits and Vegetables 因此設定每日供餐情境下的水果與非油炸蔬菜供應門檻。

B.gap: 將 5.2 million 誤放大十倍成 52 million。
B.followup: N01 Issue 的死亡數字是用小數點表示；你如何區分 5.2 million 與 52 million 的量級？

D.gap: 把全球死亡歸因數量級嚴重誇大。
D.followup: N01 的數字用來說明飲食風險，但是否可能達到數億 deaths worldwide 的規模？

C.gap: 將 million 誤讀為 thousand，低估健康影響。
C.followup: N01 Issue 同時列出 gastrointestinal cancer、heart disease、stroke 歸因比例；這種背景下應是 thousand 還是 million？

M03_Q05.stem: Where should the property manager ensure food allergens are clearly labeled for all foods sold/distributed at a WELL Certified property?

options.text: At point-of-decision on packaging, menus, or signage

M03_Q05.explanation: N09 Special Diets 的 Part 2 Label Food Allergens 要求 foods and beverages 在 point-of-decision 透過 packaging、menus 或 signage 清楚標示是否含有 common food allergens。這比只放在包裝或內部卡片更廣，並直接對應使用者做選擇的時點。

D.gap: 把 point-of-decision 誤縮小成只有包裝。
D.followup: N09 Part 2 同時列出 packaging、menus 與 signage；若餐點沒有包裝，還能怎麼標示 allergens？

B.gap: 只想到菜單形式，忽略現場決策點標示。
B.followup: N09 Part 2 要求在 point-of-decision；takeout menus 是否足以覆蓋現場購買與取餐情境？

A.gap: 把對顧客可見的 allergen label 誤作內部文件。
A.followup: allergen labeling 的目的在於協助購買者避開風險；employee information cards 是否在決策點可見？

M03_Q06.stem: What is required for Part 1: Provide Meal Support of N10: Food Preparation for Commercial Kitchen Spaces in primary and secondary schools?

options.text: Pots, pans, knives and cutting boards.
The space contains the proper kitchen equipment and infrastructure to prepare and serve meals on-site and on school days, at least one meal is prepared and served on-site

M03_Q06.explanation: N10 Food Preparation 的 Part 1 Provide Meal Support 對 Commercial Kitchen Spaces in primary and secondary schools 要求具備 proper kitchen equipment and infrastructure to prepare and serve meals on-site。標準同時要求在 school days 至少一餐 prepared and served on-site。

C.gap: 只列工具，未涵蓋完整 kitchen infrastructure 與供餐。
C.followup: N10 Part 1 對學校 commercial kitchen 不只要器具；還要求哪個 on-site meal service 行為？

A.gap: 誤以為服務預製餐即可，忽略現場製備。
A.followup: 若只是 serve pre-prepared meals，是否符合 N10 Part 1 的 prepare and serve meals on-site？

B.gap: 把一般員工餐食支援誤套到學校商用廚房。
B.followup: N10 Part 1 對一般空間有 reheating device，但 primary and secondary schools 的 Commercial Kitchen Spaces 要求有何不同？

M03_Q07.stem: For commercial dining spaces selling or providing food on a daily basis, in order to fulfill the requirement for Feature N01: Fruits and Vegetables, what fruit and vegetable promotion strategies are employed?

options.text: Listed on a board at the cash register.
Digitally highlighted using avatars and comic stars.
Visually highlighted through icons, different colors and bolding.
Printed on posters and posted around the space.

M03_Q07.explanation: N01 Fruits and Vegetables 的 Part 2 Promote Fruit and Vegetable Visibility 在 Commercial Dining Spaces 要求 menus and menu boards 至少採用三種 healthy menu design 策略。可用策略包含以 icons、different colors 或 bolding 視覺凸顯水果與蔬菜。

B.gap: 把數位呈現誤認為標準列明的 menu design 策略。
B.followup: N01 Part 2 有提到 digital menus，但列出的視覺凸顯方式是 avatars 還是 icons、colors、bolding？

A.gap: 只抓到接近購買點，未符合菜單設計策略。
A.followup: Commercial Dining Spaces 的 N01 Part 2 是要求 menus and menu boards 上的哪些 promotion strategies？

D.gap: 把一般海報宣傳誤當成菜單與 menu board 要求。
D.followup: 若只把 poster 貼在空間中，是否等同於 N01 Part 2 對 menus and menu boards 的呈現要求？

M03_Q08.stem: What is the intent of Feature N05: Artificial Ingredients?

options.text: To help building occupants avoid colors, flavors, sweeteners and preservatives in food and beverages.
To eliminate artificial ingredients from all foods and beverages sold or distributed on property.
To help building occupants avoid refined gluten and chemically rendered oils in food and beverages.
To help building occupants follow a paleo diet plan.

M03_Q08.explanation: N05 Artificial Ingredients 的 Intent 是協助 occupants avoid artificial colors, flavors, sweeteners and preservatives in foods and beverages。Part 1 Limit Artificial Ingredients 透過最多三年的 phase out 或每日供應食品飲料不得含表列 artificial ingredients 來落實。

B.gap: 把 intent 誇大成所有場域立即全面消除。
B.followup: N05 Part 1 提供 phase out 與 restriction 兩條路徑；intent 是否等同所有物業立即 eliminate？

C.gap: 混淆 refined ingredients 與 artificial ingredients 的範圍。
C.followup: refined grains 與 sugar 屬於 N03；N05 Part 1 表列的 artificial ingredients 有哪些類別？

D.gap: 把 WELL feature intent 誤解成特定流行飲食法。
D.followup: N05 的目標是控制表列人工添加物，標準有要求 occupants follow paleo diet plan 嗎？

M03_Q09.stem: Which of the following body systems contain the largest reservoir of bacteria, which can play a role in immune health?
M03_Q09.explanation: WELL v2 Nutrition 條文未把 largest reservoir of bacteria 作為可得分門檻；較接近 N07 Nutrition Education 的 Part 1 Provide Nutrition Education，要求至少 quarterly 免費提供 nutrition/dietary education 來提升 food literacy。從健康知識上，此概念通常連到 gut 與 digestive health，但題目本身不是標準中的明確 threshold。

B.gap: 把血液循環與免疫關聯誤當成菌群主要棲地。
B.followup: 若回到 food literacy，營養與 microbiome 常連到消化吸收；circulatory system 是否是 bacteria reservoir 的核心？

D.gap: 把皮膚表面菌群誤認為最大菌群儲庫。
D.followup: integumentary system 確有皮膚 microbiota，但題目說 largest reservoir；與 digestive tract 相比如何判斷？

C.gap: 混淆 cardiovascular 與 digestive health 的概念。
C.followup: Nourishment 背景提到 diet-related health；若題目關注 bacteria reservoir，應優先思考哪個消化相關系統？

M03_Q10.stem: A building manager is hosting a lunch for the occupants, and has asked the cafeteria to prepare meals with signage clearly declaring the presence of common allergens. Which of the following does NOT need to be declared in Feature N09: Special Diets?
M03_Q10.explanation: N09 Special Diets 的 Part 2 Label Food Allergens 要求標示 peanut、fish、shellfish、soy、milk、egg、wheat、tree nuts 和 gluten。caffeine 不在 common food allergens 清單內，因此不是此 Part 的必標項目。

B.gap: 漏記 fish 是 N09 common food allergens 之一。
B.followup: N09 Part 2 的 allergen 清單是否明列 fish 與 shellfish？這兩者和 caffeine 有何不同？

A.gap: 忽略 soy 在標準 allergen label 清單中。
A.followup: 若 signage 要符合 N09 Part 2，soy 是否需要在 point-of-decision 被標示？

C.gap: 未辨識 egg 是需揭露的 common allergen。
C.followup: N09 Part 2 同時列 egg、milk、wheat 等 allergens；哪個選項不屬於這份清單？

M03_Q11.stem: A building occupant purchases a prepared lunch and pre-packed snack from the cafeteria. According to Feature N02: Nutritional Transparency, which of the following is NOT a required label for these foods?

options.text: If the item contains GMOs (genetically modified organisms)

M03_Q11.explanation: N02 Nutritional Transparency 的 Part 1 Provide Nutritional Information 要求 point-of-decision 顯示 calories、macronutrient content 與 total sugar content；Commercial Dining Spaces 也要求 standard menu items 顯示 calories，其他營養資訊可 upon request。GMO status 不是此 Part 的 required label。

C.gap: 誤把核心 calorie labeling 當成非必填資訊。
C.followup: N02 Part 1 對 packaged foods 和 standard menu items 都如何處理 calories？它是 optional 還是 required？

A.gap: 抓到 micronutrients 不必標，但忽略 macronutrients 必須揭露。
A.followup: N02 Part 1 明列 total protein、fat、carbohydrate；若選項同時寫 macro 與 micro，哪一部分才是標準要求？

D.gap: 未辨識 total sugar content 是必需透明資訊。
D.followup: N02 Part 1 和 Part 3 都涉及 sugar；標準是否要求揭露 total sugar content？

M03_Q12.stem: A building’s cafeteria recently renovated its signage according to Feature N04: Food Advertising. What foods and beverages are not to be advertised or promoted?

options.text: Unsweetened beverages with a high sugar content (e.g. apple juice).

M03_Q12.explanation: N04 Food Advertising 的 Part 1 Optimize Food Advertising 要求 sugar-sweetened beverages 不得被 advertised or promoted，並且 deep-fried food options 不得被 advertised or promoted，也不得 displayed under heat lamps。題目問 foods，對應的是 deep-fried food options。

A.gap: 混淆 high sugar 與 sugar-sweetened beverages 的定義。
A.followup: N04 Part 1 禁止 promotion 的飲料類別是 sugar-sweetened；unsweetened apple juice 是否屬於同一類？

C.gap: 把 allergen labeling 要求誤認為 advertising 禁令。
C.followup: common allergens 在 N09 Part 2 要標示；N04 Part 1 的 advertising 禁止項目有哪些？

B.gap: 把 local sourcing 透明度誤當成食物廣告限制。
B.followup: N11 會處理 local farms 或 certified products labeling；N04 是否禁止 non-locally sourced foods 宣傳？

M03_Q13.stem: Which of the following is a goal of Feature N02: Food Advertising?

options.text: Discourage purchases of sugary and caffeine-laden drinks.
Encourage occupants to select and consume healthier food choices.
Discourage building occupants from any foods with added sugars.
Fully implement only natural, whole food advertising.

M03_Q13.explanation: WELL v2 中 Food Advertising 是 N04，而 N04 Food Advertising 的 Intent 是透過 advertising and messaging 鼓勵 selection and consumption of healthier food choices。Part 1 Optimize Food Advertising 具體要求不促銷 sugar-sweetened beverages 與 deep-fried food options，並在 eating areas 或 points of sale 放置至少兩則水果蔬菜或飲水 messaging。

D.gap: 把健康廣告目標過度收窄成只允許天然全食物。
D.followup: N04 的 intent 是鼓勵 healthier food choices；Part 1 是否要求所有 advertising 只能是 natural whole foods？

A.gap: 抓到 sugary drinks 但加入 caffeine 這個非標準限制。
A.followup: N04 Part 1 明列 sugar-sweetened beverages；標準是否也提到 caffeine-laden drinks？

C.gap: 把不促銷特定項目誤解為禁止所有 added sugars。
C.followup: N04 的 advertising 限制與 N03 sugar threshold 不同；它是否要求 occupants 避開所有 added sugars？

M03_Q14.stem: In order to meet the requirements in Part 1: Promote Healthy Portions of Feature N06: Portion Sizes, non-circular plates cannot exceed the following size in a Secondary School setting?

options.text: The total surface area of the plate must not exceed 69 in^2 (445 cm^2).
The total surface area of the plate must not exceed 80 in^2 (516 cm^2).
The total surface area of the plate must not exceed 70 in^2 (450 cm^2).
The total surface area of the plate must not exceed 79 in^2 (507 cm^2).

M03_Q14.explanation: N06 Portion Sizes 的 Part 1 Promote Healthy Portions 在 self-serve food 情境限制 dishware sizes。表格中 Secondary School Students 的 non-circular plates surface area 上限是 79 in2 (507 cm2)。

A.gap: 選到接近但非 secondary school 的盤面尺寸。
A.followup: N06 Part 1 表格分 Primary School、Secondary School、Adults；49、79 in2 分別對應哪個族群？

C.gap: 以近似數值取代標準表格的精確門檻。
C.followup: N06 的 dishware table 給的是精確 surface area；Secondary School 的 non-circular plate 是 70 還是 79 in2？

B.gap: 把 79 in2 四捨五入成不符合標準的 80 in2。
B.followup: WELL threshold 是上限值；若標準寫 79 in2，使用 80 in2 是否仍能說 cannot exceed？

M03_Q15.stem: In order to meet the requirements of Feature N06: Portion Sizes, what must be true of all bowls served to customers?

options.text: Customers have the option of a 16 oz (473 mL) or 20 oz (591 mL) (costs vary).
Bowls, for adults, must be no larger than 16 oz (473 mL).
Bowls must be no larger than 8 oz (237 mL).
Customers have the option of a 8 oz (237 mL) or 16 oz (473 mL) (costs vary).

M03_Q15.explanation: N06 Portion Sizes 的 Part 1 Promote Healthy Portions 要求 self-serve dishware 不超過各 occupant type 的表格上限。Adults 的 bowls volume 上限是 16 fl oz (473 mL)，而 primary school 與 secondary school 分別是 8 fl oz 與 12 fl oz。

D.gap: 把選擇性杯碗尺寸誤作所有 bowls 的上限規範。
D.followup: N06 Part 1 是要求 dishware does not exceed 表格尺寸，還是只需提供兩種 bowl options？

C.gap: 把 primary school bowl 尺寸誤套到成人顧客。
C.followup: N06 dishware table 中，8 fl oz 是哪個 occupant type 的 bowl 上限？成人上限是多少？

A.gap: 允許超過 adult bowl 上限，且誤以選項取代限制。
A.followup: 若提供 20 oz bowl，是否已超過 N06 Part 1 對 adults 的 16 fl oz maximum？

M03_Q16.stem: In order to meet the requirements of Feature N06: Serving Sizes, what must be true of all non-circular plates served to students in Secondary School?

options.text: The total surface area of the plate must not exceed 69 in2 (445 cm2).
The total surface area of the plate must not exceed 80 in2 (516 cm2).
The total surface area of the plate must not exceed 79 in2 (507 cm2).
The total surface area of the plate must not exceed 70 in2 (450 cm2).

M03_Q16.explanation: N06 Portion Sizes 的 Part 1 Promote Healthy Portions 在 self-serve 情境對 dishware 設定尺寸表。Secondary School Students 的 non-circular plates 上限為 79 in2 (507 cm2)，不得以近似值替代。

A.gap: 誤選非 secondary school 的過小 plate threshold。
A.followup: N06 表格中 primary school 與 secondary school 的 non-circular plates 面積是否相同？

D.gap: 用接近數字取代 WELL 表格明列值。
D.followup: Secondary School Students 的 row 對 non-circular plates 寫的是 70 in2 還是 79 in2？

B.gap: 將 79 in2 上限誤放寬為 80 in2。
B.followup: N06 的語句是 does not exceed；若 plate 是 80 in2，是否超出 79 in2 上限？

M03_Q17.stem: The owner of a building has asked the cafeteria to focus on healthy options for the building occupants. In order to reduce the likelihood of unintended overeating and to encourage healthier eating habits, what should the maximum cup size be for beverages served on a daily basis?
M03_Q17.explanation: N06 Portion Sizes 的 Part 1 Promote Healthy Portions 要求 self-serve dishware 不超過表格尺寸；Adults 的 cups volume 上限是 16 fl oz (473 mL)。題目選項以 480 mL 表示 16 oz，對應 adult cup maximum 的近似換算。

D.gap: 選到非標準表格中的中間容量數字。
D.followup: N06 dishware table 對 adult cups 是否列出 10 oz，或是列出 16 fl oz (473 mL)？

B.gap: 把 primary school cup 上限誤套到成人餐廳。
B.followup: 8 fl oz 是 N06 表格中哪一類 occupant 的 cup limit？題目是否指 building occupants adults？

C.gap: 把 secondary school cup 上限誤用於成人顧客。
C.followup: 12 fl oz 在 N06 表格對應 Secondary School Students；adult cups 的上限是多少？

M03_Q18.stem: In order to meet the requirements of Feature N09: Special Diets, what must be true of a catered event?

options.text: Prior to the catering event, employees and clients must submit all dietary preferences.
Main dish options must be available that do not contain the common food allergies.
All religious dietary restrictions must be adhered to.
All food must be labeled for the most common food allergies.

M03_Q18.explanation: N09 Special Diets 的 Part 1 Accommodate Special Diets 要求 meals sold or provided 包含 main dish options，且分別能避開 peanut、gluten、dairy、egg、animal/seafood/dairy products，以及 animal or seafood products except eggs and dairy。這是 meal alternatives 的供應要求，與 Part 2 的 allergen labeling 不同。

A.gap: 把使用者事前申報誤認為標準要求。
A.followup: N09 Part 1 是要求 occupants 先提交偏好，還是要求 meals 本身提供哪些 alternative main dish options？

C.gap: 把廣泛宗教飲食限制誤作 WELL 明列清單。
C.followup: N09 Part 1 明列的是 peanut、gluten、dairy、egg 與 vegan/vegetarian 類條件；是否列出所有 religious diets？

D.gap: 混淆 special diet alternatives 與 allergen labeling。
D.followup: N09 有 Part 1 meal alternatives 與 Part 2 labeling；題目問 catered event 必須有哪類 main dish options？

M03_Q19.stem: An employee with a food allergy or dietary restriction in a WELL Certified building can request to have any of the following food options according to Feature N09: Special Diets except:
M03_Q19.explanation: N09 Special Diets 的 Part 1 Accommodate Special Diets 要求 main dish options 不含 peanut、gluten、dairy、egg，並提供不含 animal、seafood 或 dairy products 的選項，以及 vegetarian 類選項。sugar-free option 不在這個 special diets 清單中；糖量限制屬於 N03 或 N02 的範圍。

A.gap: 忽略 gluten-free 是 N09 明列 special diet option。
A.followup: N09 Part 1 是否要求 main dish options do not contain gluten？這與 sugar-free 有何不同？

D.gap: 未辨識 vegan 類選項屬於 animal product 排除要求。
D.followup: N09 Part 1 的 animal, seafood or dairy products 排除條件，是否可對應 vegan option？

C.gap: 漏看 egg-free 是 N09 Part 1 明列要求。
C.followup: N09 Part 1 明列 do not contain egg；因此 egg-free 與 sugar-free 哪個才不是該 Part 要求？

M03_Q20.stem: In order to meet the requirements of Feature N11: Responsible Food Production, which of the following must be true about produce sold or distributed on-site on a daily basis?

options.text: Must be color coded per food labeling laws.
Must have 50% of total produce and 25% of total meat certified organic.
Must be labeled with the USDA organic label (country-equivalent) and Free-trade label (country-equivalent).
Must be labeled to indicate the presence of GMOs (genetically modified organisms).

M03_Q20.explanation: WELL v2 的 feature name 是 N11 Responsible Food Sourcing。其 Part 1 Implement Responsible Sourcing 的 Option 1 Sustainable sourcing 要求至少 50% total produce line certified organic，且至少 25% total animal product line certified organic、Certified Humane 或 GSSI-recognized Seafood Certification Scheme。

A.gap: 把 responsible sourcing 誤解成一般食品標籤顏色規範。
A.followup: N11 Part 1 的 Sustainable sourcing 是看 certified organic/humane 比例，是否提到 color coding laws？

C.gap: 混淆 organic 與 fair trade label，且忽略比例門檻。
C.followup: N11 Option 1 要求 produce 與 animal product line 的比例；Option 2 才談 point-of-decision labeling，兩者差在哪？

D.gap: 把 GMO 揭露誤認為 WELL responsible sourcing 要求。
D.followup: N11 Part 1 明列 certified organic、Certified Humane 與 seafood scheme；是否要求 GMO presence label？

M03_Q21.stem: Which of the following labels for all meat, egg, and dairy products sold or distributed on-site are required by Feature N11: Responsible Food Production?

options.text: Federally Certified Organic and Fair Trade certified
Federally Certified Organic and Humane Certified

M03_Q21.explanation: WELL v2 的 N11 Responsible Food Sourcing 在 Part 1 Implement Responsible Sourcing 要求至少 25% total animal product line，包括 meat、seafood、egg and dairy products，為 certified organic、Certified Humane 或 GSSI-recognized Seafood Certification Scheme。對 meat、egg and dairy 的核心是 organic 或 humane certification，而非 Fair Trade。

A.gap: 把 Fair Trade 誤加入 animal product certification 要求。
A.followup: N11 Part 1 對 meat、egg、dairy 明列 Certified Humane；Fair Trade 是否出現在 animal product line 條件？

D.gap: 只選 Fair Trade，完全偏離 N11 動物產品標準。
D.followup: 若只用 Fair Trade Certified，是否能證明 animal welfare 或 organic status 符合 N11 Part 1？

C.gap: 只抓到 humane certification，漏看 organic 也可適用。
C.followup: N11 Part 1 對 animal products 使用 certified organic、Certified Humane 或 seafood scheme；為何只寫 Humane 不完整？

M03_Q22.stem: For a project to comply with Feature N12: Food Production, garden space or greenhouse of what size and location must be provided for all building occupants?

options.text: 5 ft2 (0.5 m2) per occupant within 1 mi (1.6 km) of the project boundary
2 ft2 (0.2 m2) per occupant within 1.5 mi (2.4 km) of the project boundary
3 ft2 (0.3 m2) per occupant within 0.25 mi (0.4 km) of the project boundary
1 ft2 (0.1 m2) per occupant within 0.25 mi (0.4 km) of the project boundary

M03_Q22.explanation: N12 Food Production 的 Part 1 Provide Gardening Space 要求 food production space 位於 project boundary 的 0.25 mi (400 m) walk distance 內。For All Spaces except Dwelling Units，growing area 至少 1 ft2 (0.09 m2) per regular occupant 或 0.5 ft2 per student，且有最大與最小面積限制。

C.gap: 距離正確但把每人面積門檻誤放大三倍。
C.followup: N12 Part 1 的 growing area 是 1 ft2 per regular occupant，還是 3 ft2？標準如何處理 student？

A.gap: 同時誤用過大面積與較遠距離。
A.followup: N12 Part 1 對 location 寫的是 0.25 mi walk distance；1 mi 是否仍符合 project boundary 要求？

B.gap: 把 food production space 的距離與面積都記錯。
B.followup: 如果 garden 位於 1.5 mi 外，是否仍在 N12 Part 1 要求的 0.25 mi walk distance 內？

M03_Q23.stem: According to Feature N12: Food Production, which of the following is NOT provided to grow and maintain a garden space?
M03_Q23.explanation: N12 Food Production 的 Part 1 Provide Gardening Space 要求 planting supplies，包括 planting medium、watering system、lighting for interior spaces only、plants and gardening tools。標準限定 lighting 只適用於 interior spaces，未要求 exterior lighting。

C.gap: 把明列 planting supplies 誤當成非必要項目。
C.followup: N12 Part 1 的 planting supplies 清單是否明列 planting medium？它和 exterior lighting 的地位相同嗎？

A.gap: 漏看 gardening tools 是維護種植空間的必需供應。
A.followup: N12 Part 1 要求提供哪些 tools 或 supplies 來維持 food-bearing plants？

B.gap: 用 irrigation 近義詞誤判 watering system 需求。
B.followup: N12 Part 1 寫的是 watering system；irrigation 是否可被理解為同一類供水設備？

M03_Q24.stem: Which of the following WELL Concepts intends to enable people to make more informed choices?
M03_Q24.explanation: WELL Nourishment concept 明確要求 fruits and vegetables availability 與 nutritional transparency，並透過 N02 Nutritional Transparency 的 Part 1 Provide Nutritional Information 在 point-of-decision 提供 calories、macronutrients 與 total sugar content。這些要求直接支援 occupants make informed food choices。

D.gap: 把身體活動概念誤當成食物資訊透明目標。
D.followup: 若題目提到 informed food choices，應回到哪個 concept 及 N02 Part 1 的營養資訊要求？

A.gap: 加入 Light 概念，混淆飲食選擇與照明環境。
A.followup: N02 Nutritional Transparency 屬於 Nourishment；Light concept 是否處理 food labeling 或 sugar content？

B.gap: 誤將照明健康目標連到營養決策資訊。
B.followup: Light concept 關注 visual/circadian lighting；哪個 concept 才要求 fruits、vegetables 與 nutritional transparency？

M03_Q25.stem: What must be true for at least half of the entrée items in a building cafeteria’s menu to meet the requirements of Feature N06: Portion Sizes?

options.text: A version of an entrée that is 650 calories or less with a lower cost than the larger, regular version.
A version of an entrée that is 425 calories or less and vegetarian.
A version of an entrée that is 550 calories or less with a lower cost than the larger, regular version.
A version of an entrée that is 575 calories or less and vegetarian.

M03_Q25.explanation: N06 Portion Sizes 的 Part 1 Promote Healthy Portions 要求所有 standard menu items 不超過 650 Cal，或對至少 50% 超過 650 Cal 的 standard menu items 提供 smaller size and lower cost 的版本。此要求針對 portion size 與 cost，不要求 vegetarian。

C.gap: 把 650 Cal 門檻誤降為 550 Cal。
C.followup: N06 Part 1 對 standard menu items 的 calorie threshold 是 650 Cal 還是 550 Cal？

D.gap: 加入 vegetarian 條件並錯記 calorie threshold。
D.followup: vegetarian options 屬於 N09 special diets；N06 Part 1 是否要求 smaller entrée version 必須 vegetarian？

B.gap: 同時誤用過低 calorie 門檻與特殊飲食條件。
B.followup: N06 的目的在 healthy portions；它要求 425 Cal vegetarian，還是 650 Cal 以下或 smaller lower-cost version？

M03_Q26.stem: Beverly, the wellness program manager for an office building wants to include Nutrition Education as part of their wellness programming. In order to fulfill the requirement of N07: Nutrition Education, what is an acceptable nutrition education opportunity?

options.text: Organize a health-focused dinner club with regular occupants.
Bring in plant-based food trucks once a month for regular occupants.
Gardening or planting workshops focused on edible plants that integrate hands-on learning opportunities.
Tours of local grocery stores with emphasis on healthy eating.

M03_Q26.explanation: N07 Nutrition Education, Part 1 Provide Nutrition Education 要求至少一種 nutrition education opportunity 免費、每季至少一次提供給 regular occupants；其中明列 edible plants 的 gardening or planting workshops，且需整合 hands-on learning opportunities。

D.gap: 把健康食物可近性活動誤認為正式 nutrition education。
D.followup: N07 Part 1 列出的教育機會是否包含 grocery store tours，還是要求由特定教學形式或專業人員提供？

A.gap: 混淆 communal dining 與具學習目標的 food literacy 教育。
A.followup: 如果是 dinner club，它是否滿足 N07 對 cooking skills、nutrition sessions 或 hands-on learning 的明確要求？

B.gap: 把提供食物選項誤當成 nutrition education programming。
B.followup: N07 Part 1 關注的是教育活動；plant-based food trucks 有提供每季免費的教學內容嗎？

M03_Q27.stem: Feature N08: Mindful Eating dictates that spaces must have a dedicated eating space and that eligible employees must be provided with daily meal breaks. What verification method is required to submit the documentation for the dedicated eating space to IWBI?
M03_Q27.explanation: N08 Mindful Eating, Part 1 Support Mindful Eating 的 dedicated eating space 需位於 project boundary 650 ft(200 m) walk distance 內，並滿足座位、環境保護與 seating types；提供的 WELL v2 標準文字可核對空間要求，但未列出 IWBI 文件提交的 verification method。

D.gap: 把空間設計圖面誤認為此題指定的提交方法。
D.followup: N08 dedicated eating space 要證明 650 ft 與 seating capacity 時，題目詢問的是設計圖還是 IWBI 文件類型？

A.gap: 把現場照片當成足以取代正式文件提交。
A.followup: 照片能顯示 tables and chairs，但是否能完整證明 25% peak occupancy 與 walk distance？

B.gap: 混淆 daily meal breaks 的營運政策與 eating space 文件。
B.followup: N08 Part 1 同時有 dedicated eating space 與 daily meal breaks；哪一項才需要 policy 或 schedule？

M03_Q28.stem: An office building in Vancouver wants to provide a dedicated eating space outside of the cafeteria. In order for this space to fit the requirements for Feature N08: Mindful Eating, what must the dedicated eating space provide?

options.text: Seating for 25% of the regular occupants of the building.
Protection from environmental elements (direct sunlight, rain, wind).

M03_Q28.explanation: N08 Mindful Eating, Part 1 Support Mindful Eating 要求 dedicated eating space 提供 protection from environmental elements，例如 direct sunlight、rain、wind，或位於 climate-controlled space；同一 Part 也要求 650 ft(200 m) walk distance 與 seating capacity。

B.gap: 把用餐便利配備誤當成 N08 的空間性能要求。
B.followup: N08 dedicated eating space 的條文列出 tables、chairs、環境保護與 seating types；是否提到 condiment station？

A.gap: 記得 25% 座位門檻，但忽略題目問必備空間條件。
A.followup: 25% peak occupancy 確實是 N08 要求之一；本題哪個選項直接對應 environmental elements？

C.gap: 把茶水服務誤認為 mindful eating 的必要設施。
C.followup: N08 Part 1 的 dedicated eating space 是否要求 water and coffee，或是要求能避免日曬雨風？

M03_Q29.stem: The World Allergy Organization reports that the prevalence of food allergies is ____________ in countries around the world.
M03_Q29.explanation: N09 Special Diets 的 Issue 明確指出 World Allergy Organization reports that the prevalence of food allergies is increasing in countries around the world；這支撐 Part 1 Accommodate Special Diets 與 Part 2 Label Food Allergens 的需求。

C.gap: 把 food allergy 的全球趨勢方向完全判反。
C.followup: N09 Issue 為何要強調 special diets 與 allergen labeling？如果盛行率下降，這個風險論述會成立嗎？

D.gap: 誤以為 food allergy 盛行率已進入穩定平台期。
D.followup: 回到 N09 Issue 的用語，它描述 prevalence 是 plateauing，還是用 increasing 來建立需求？

B.gap: 把地區差異當成標準引用的主要趨勢。
B.followup: 即使各國差異存在，N09 引用 World Allergy Organization 時強調的是哪個整體變化方向？

M03_Q30.stem: In order to accommodate special diets, main dish options must be available that meet which of the following criteria?
M03_Q30.explanation: N09 Special Diets, Part 1 Accommodate Special Diets 要求 meals sold or provided 包含 main dish options，且需涵蓋不含 peanut、gluten、dairy、egg、animal/seafood/dairy products 等多種 criteria；單一條件不足以完整滿足 Part 1。

A.gap: 只抓到 peanut-free，忽略 N09 要求多類特殊飲食。
A.followup: N09 Part 1 的 main dish options 除了不含 peanut，還列出 gluten、dairy 與哪些其他限制？

B.gap: 只記得 gluten-free，沒有涵蓋完整 special diets 清單。
B.followup: 如果只提供 gluten-free 主菜，能否同時滿足 N09 對 dairy、egg 與 animal products 的 criteria？

C.gap: 把 dairy-free 當作唯一需要 accommodation 的飲食限制。
C.followup: N09 Part 1 為何用 meet each criteria，而不是只要求一種 dairy-free main dish？

M03_Q31.stem: Feature N09: Special Diets lays out the requirements for the labeling of food allergens. What common allergens must be labeled on packaged food?

options.text: Hazelnuts, beef, pork, cheese and black beans.
Peanuts, fish, shellfish, soy, milk, wheat, egg, tree nuts and gluten.
Redskin peanuts, scallops, oats, garlic and onions.

M03_Q31.explanation: N09 Special Diets, Part 2 Label Food Allergens 要求 foods and beverages 在 point-of-decision 標示是否含 peanut、fish、shellfish、soy、milk、egg、wheat、tree nuts 與 gluten 等 common food allergens。

A.gap: 把部分食物類別與肉類誤認為 common allergen 清單。
A.followup: N09 Part 2 的 allergen list 是否包含 beef、pork 或 black beans，還是聚焦 peanut、shellfish、milk 等？

C.gap: 混入過度具體或未列名食材，偏離標準 allergen list。
C.followup: N09 Part 2 要標的是 broad common allergens；scallops、garlic、onions 是否在條文明列？

D.gap: 忽略 N09 明確列出需標示的 common food allergens。
D.followup: 若標準已列 peanut、fish、shellfish、soy、milk 等，為何不能選擇 none of the above？

M03_Q32.stem: Feature N10: Food Preparation requires a food preparation area, storage area and amenities like cold storage and microwaves. What space types are required to have these features?

options.text: All Spaces except Dwelling Units and Commercial Kitchen Spaces

M03_Q32.explanation: N10 Food Preparation, Part 1 Provide Meal Support 分別列出 All Spaces except Dwelling Units & Commercial Kitchen Spaces、Dwelling Units 與 Commercial Kitchen Spaces 的要求；各類空間的 amenities 不同，但都在同一 Part 內被涵蓋。

A.gap: 只看到一般空間條文，漏掉 dwelling units 與 kitchen spaces。
A.followup: N10 Part 1 在一般空間後，是否還有獨立列出 dwelling units 與 commercial kitchen spaces 的要求？

B.gap: 把住宅單元要求誤當成 N10 的全部適用範圍。
B.followup: Dwelling units 需要 stove 和 refrigerator，但 N10 是否也要求一般工作空間提供 reheating 與 storage？

C.gap: 把商業廚房條文視為唯一必須符合的空間類型。
C.followup: N10 Part 1 對 primary and secondary schools 的 commercial kitchen 要求之外，還列出哪些空間類型？

M03_Q33.stem: The WELL Building Standard™ (WELL™) recognizes that responsible sourcing practices and policies can help to promote sustainable, ethical and socially responsible food purchase and promote animal welfare. To implement responsible sourcing for Feature N11: Responsible Food Sourcing, what two items are required?

options.text: NON GMO Project verified and organic sourcing

M03_Q33.explanation: N11 Responsible Food Sourcing, Part 1 Implement Responsible Sourcing 提供兩個路徑：Option 1 Sustainable sourcing 與 Option 2 Sustainable labeling；sourcing 包含 certified organic produce 與 certified animal products，labeling 則在 point-of-decision 推廣 certified organic、sustainable 或 local sources。

B.gap: 把 N09/N02 的 allergen labeling 混入 N11 sourcing。
B.followup: N11 Part 1 的第二個 option 是 sustainable labeling，還是 food allergen labeling？兩者服務的風險是否不同？

C.gap: 誤把 kosher certification 當成 responsible sourcing 要件。
C.followup: N11 要求 animal product line 可用哪些 certified organic、Certified Humane 或 seafood certification？有列 kosher 嗎？

D.gap: 把 non-GMO 與 organic 當成 N11 唯一採購框架。
D.followup: N11 的 sustainable sourcing 是否只看 NON GMO，還是同時設定 produce 與 animal product line 百分比？

M03_Q34.stem: Providing gardening space to regular occupants of buildings and dwelling units can encourage consumption of fruits and vegetables and advance toward what other goal?

options.text: Encourage connection to the broader community.
Have occupants collaborate on common activity.
Lower the need for purchasing outside food.

M03_Q34.explanation: N12 Food Production 的 Solutions 說明 gardening 除了提升 fruit and vegetable consumption，也可 fortify social cohesion and community involvement；Part 1 Provide Gardening Space 則要求永久、可及的 food production space。

D.gap: 把 gardening space 的目的縮小成替代外購食物。
D.followup: N12 Solutions 強調 gardens 的社會效益；它主要是在降低採購需求，還是促進 community involvement？

C.gap: 抓到協作活動，但未連到 broader community 的目標。
C.followup: 共同種植可以是手段；N12 對 community gardening 更大的 social benefit 是什麼？

A.gap: 只看到 physical activity，忽略題目問的 broader goal。
A.followup: N12 確實提到 physical activity；但在 fruits and vegetables 之外，哪個目標更貼近 community connection？

M03_Q35.stem: Ensuring local food access can have a profound impact on the building occupants' health and well-being. Feature N13: Local Food Environment gives us 3 options for providing local food access. Which of these fulfills the requirement of this feature?

options.text: Discounted transportation to nearby green grocers.
A farmer's market located within 0.10 mi walk distance.
A supermarket or store with fresh fruits and vegetables located with 0.25 mi walk distance.
A seasonal farmer's market that operates weekly at certain times every year.

M03_Q35.explanation: N13 Local Food Environment, Part 1 Ensure Local Food Access 的 Option 1 Supportive environment 要求 project 位於 supermarket or store with a fresh fruit and vegetable section 的 0.25 mi(400 m) walk distance 內，或符合指定 farmers' market 條件。

D.gap: 少了 N13 對 farmers' market 距離與營運月數的條件。
D.followup: N13 Option 1 對 farmers' market 是否只說 seasonal weekly，還要求 0.25 mi 與至少四個月？

A.gap: 把 discounted transportation 誤當成 no-cost transportation。
A.followup: N13 Option 3 Supportive transportation 要求交通是 discounted，還是 no-cost between project and fresh food venues？

B.gap: 距離看似更近，但缺少每週與四個月營運條件。
B.followup: N13 對 farmers' market 不只看 walk distance；它還要求 open at least once a week 多久？

M03_Q36.stem: According to the World Health Organization, processed meat has been classified as carcinogenic and red meat is classified as probably carcinogenic. Providing plant-based meat alternatives can decrease the overall consumption of red and processed meats globally. What is the requirement for food that is sold or provided on a daily basis for Feature N14: Red and Processed Meats?

options.text: A single serving of red meat is no more than 6 oz.
Meat-alternatives are listed prominently on the menu.
At least one plant-based options is available at each food outlet.
Meat-alternatives are placed at the beginnign of the self-serve food lines.

M03_Q36.explanation: N14 Red and Processed Meats, Part 1 Limit Red and Processed Meats 要求若 commercial dining spaces 每日銷售或提供食物，each food outlet 至少有 one plant-based option；同 Part 也把 red meat serving 限為 no more than 4 oz(115 g) cooked weight。

A.gap: 記得 red meat portion limit，但數值誤用為 6 oz。
A.followup: N14 Part 1 對 red meat 的 single portion 是 6 oz，還是 4 oz(115 g) cooked weight？

D.gap: 把應降低 prominence 的對象誤套到 meat alternatives。
D.followup: N14 要放在 self-serve line 結尾的是 plant-based alternatives，還是 red and processed meats？

B.gap: 把 menu prominence 策略方向顛倒為強調替代肉。
B.followup: N14 Part 1 要求 listed last 的是哪些 meat products？plant-based option 的要求是否是每 outlet 至少一項？

M03_Q37.stem: Providing Gardening Space is an important aspect of providing opportunities for on-site food production. For dwelling units, what size gardening space is the project required per dwelling unit?
M03_Q37.explanation: N12 Food Production, Part 1 Provide Gardening Space 對 Dwelling Units 要求 food production space 至少 15 ft2(1.4 m2) per dwelling unit，且總面積上限 1,500 ft2、下限 200 ft2，計算的是實際 growing area。

B.gap: 低估 dwelling units 的 per-unit growing area 門檻。
B.followup: N12 Part 1 對 dwelling units 的數值是否比一般 occupant 1 ft2 更高？明列是多少 ft2？

C.gap: 把 gardening space 面積記成接近但未達標的數值。
C.followup: 若每戶只提供 10 ft2，是否達到 N12 對 dwelling units 的 15 ft2 per dwelling unit？

D.gap: 接近正確面積，但仍低於 N12 明定門檻。
D.followup: N12 的 dwelling unit 計算是 12 ft2 還是 15 ft2，且是否有 200 ft2 最小總面積？

M03_Q38.stem: What is the intent of Feature N13: Local Food Environment?

options.text: To increase access to locally produced food, regardless of ingredient origin.
To increase access to fresh, local and seasonal fruits and vegetables by reducing environmental barriers.
To increase access to local farmers and food producers.
To increase access to locally sourced meat and dairy.

M03_Q38.explanation: N13 Local Food Environment 的 Intent 是 increase access to fresh, local and seasonal fruits and vegetables by reducing environmental barriers；Part 1 Ensure Local Food Access 透過 supportive environment、programming 或 transportation 實作此意圖。

D.gap: 把 N13 的蔬果可近性誤解為 meat and dairy sourcing。
D.followup: N13 Intent 中明確說的是 fruits and vegetables，還是 locally sourced meat and dairy？

C.gap: 只抓到 local producers，漏掉 fresh seasonal fruits and vegetables。
C.followup: N13 的重點是接觸農民本身，還是減少取得 fresh local seasonal produce 的環境障礙？

A.gap: 忽略 N13 對 fresh、seasonal 與蔬果類別的限定。
A.followup: 如果 locally produced food 不限成分來源，是否符合 N13 對 fruits and vegetables 的 intent？

M03_Q39.stem: An apartment building is looking to ensure that the kitchen it provides in the individual units fits the requirements of Feature N10: Food Preparation. What is an example of an amenity that the project needs to provide occupants in the kitchen?

options.text: Water tap fitted with a reverse osmosis system.
Stove with hood vented directly to the outdoors.

M03_Q39.explanation: N10 Food Preparation, Part 1 Provide Meal Support 對 Dwelling Units 要求 countertop surface、sink、refrigerator、cabinets，以及 stove with hood vented directly to the outdoors；toaster oven 或 microwave 屬於一般非住宅空間的 reheating device 示例。

A.gap: 混淆一般 dedicated eating area 與 dwelling unit 廚房要求。
A.followup: N10 Part 1 在一般空間列出 reheating device；dwelling units 的清單是否改列 stove with outdoor-vented hood？

C.gap: 把飲用水處理設備誤認為 N10 food preparation amenity。
C.followup: N10 dwelling unit kitchen 要求的是 sink、refrigerator、cabinets 與 stove；reverse osmosis 是否在清單中？

B.gap: 把額外冷凍設備當成標準要求的 refrigerator。
B.followup: N10 對 dwelling units 明列 refrigerator，但是否要求 chest freezer 這種額外設備？

M03_Q40.stem: Which feature is a precondition in the Nourishment Concept?
M03_Q40.explanation: Nourishment concept table lists N02 Nutritional Transparency as a PRECONDITION, along with N01 Fruits and Vegetables；N03 Refined Ingredients、N04 Food Advertising 與 N09 Special Diets are OPTIMIZATION features。

C.gap: 把常考的 refined ingredients 誤記成 precondition。
C.followup: 在 Nourishment feature table 中，N03 的狀態是 PRECONDITION，還是 WELL Certification 2 Pt 的 optimization？

B.gap: 把 Special Diets 的重要性誤等同於 precondition 等級。
B.followup: N09 Special Diets 雖與包容性相關，但在 Nourishment table 中標示的是哪一種 feature type？

A.gap: 把 Food Advertising 誤認為必要前置條件。
A.followup: N04 Food Advertising 在 Nourishment table 是 optimization；兩個 preconditions 分別是哪兩個 Feature？

M03_Q41.stem: In Part 1: Provide Nutrition Education of Feature N07: Nutrition Education, to achieve 1 Pt, what is the session requirement if choosing the option of nutrition or dietary education sessions?

options.text: Sessions are led by a local plant-based chef.
Sessions are led by an accredited dietician or nutritionist.
Sessions are sponsored by a local Farmer's Market.

M03_Q41.explanation: N07 Nutrition Education, Part 1 Provide Nutrition Education 要求 nutrition or dietary education sessions 由 accredited dietitian 或 accredited nutritionist 帶領，並且至少每季、免費提供給 regular occupants；bi-annually 不符合 minimum quarterly basis。

A.gap: 混淆 chef-led cooking demonstrations 與 nutrition education sessions。
A.followup: N07 中 chef-instructors 對應的是 cooking demonstrations；nutrition sessions 需要哪種 accredited professional？

D.gap: 把贊助來源誤當成教育 session 的人員資格。
D.followup: N07 Part 1 對 nutrition or dietary education sessions 要求 sponsor，還是要求 accredited dietitian/nutritionist？

C.gap: 注意到頻率，但把 quarterly minimum 誤記成 bi-annually。
C.followup: N07 Part 1 要求至少 quarterly；一年兩次的 bi-annually 是否達到 minimum frequency？

M03_Q42.stem: What two options are available for Feature N05: Artificial Ingredients?

options.text: Artificial ingredient restriction or artificial ingredient education.
Artificial ingredient labeling or artificial ingredient restriction.
Artificial ingredient phase out or artificial ingredient restriction.
Artificial ingredient phase out or artificial ingredient labeling.

M03_Q42.explanation: N05 Artificial Ingredients, Part 1 Limit Artificial Ingredients 提供兩個合規路徑：Option 1 Artificial ingredient phase out，最多三年內淘汰並標示 listed artificial ingredients；或 Option 2 Artificial ingredient restriction，要求每日供應的 foods and beverages 不含清單中的人工成分。

D.gap: 把 phase out 內含的 labeling 誤當成獨立 option。
D.followup: N05 Part 1 的 Option 1 是否包含 labeling requirement？它本身是否命名為 artificial ingredient labeling？

B.gap: 漏掉 phase out，將 labeling 提升為主要合規路徑。
B.followup: N05 明列的兩個 option 名稱是什麼？labeling 是哪個 option 的附帶要求？

A.gap: 把 education 加進 N05，但標準沒有此 option。
A.followup: N05 是限制人工成分的採購與供應要求；條文中是否有 artificial ingredient education option？

M03_Q43.stem: In Feature N03: Refined Ingredients, whole grains must be present in _____ of sold and provided foods:

options.text: at least 35% of the granola bars.

M03_Q43.explanation: N03 Refined Ingredients, Part 2 Promote Whole Grains 要求至少 50% of grain-based foods 中 whole grain 是 first ingredient；grain-based foods 指 grain flour 為第一成分或含 ≥30% grain ingredients 的食品。

C.gap: 把 whole grain 門檻低估為 25%。
C.followup: N03 Part 2 的 50% calculation 是針對 grain-based foods；你是否把它和無糖飲料 25% 混淆？

D.gap: 把標準誤解為只管 bread 且要求 100%。
D.followup: N03 Part 2 是要求所有 breads，還是所有 grain-based foods 中至少半數以 whole grain 為第一成分？

A.gap: 把任意食品類別 granola bars 誤當成計算基準。
A.followup: N03 的 calculation 是按 grain-based foods 計算；granola bars 是否是條文明列的獨立百分比？

M03_Q44.stem: Reducing sugar content in foods and beverages is a central theme in the Nourishment concept. Standard menu items may not contain more than _______g of sugar per serving.
M03_Q44.explanation: N02 Nutritional Transparency, Part 3 Label Sugar Content 針對 Commercial Dining Spaces 要求 standard menu items 不超過 25 g sugar per serving，或在 point-of-decision 標示/提示超過 25 g 的項目；N03 Part 1 也對每日供應的食品飲料使用 25 g sugar 門檻。

A.gap: 把 sugar threshold 記得過低，未對應 WELL 條文。
A.followup: N02 Part 3 與 N03 Part 1 都使用哪個 sugar grams per serving/container 門檻？

B.gap: 選了接近健康建議但非 WELL 明定數值。
B.followup: 題目問 standard menu items 的 WELL threshold；條文是 18 g 還是 25 g per serving？

C.gap: 高估允許糖量，超出 WELL 的 25 g 控制線。
C.followup: 若 standard menu item 有 32 g sugar，N02 Part 3 是否要求標示或用 icon 另外提示？

M03_Q45.stem: For projects with commercial dining spaces, at least 50% of available food options are fruits and __________
M03_Q45.explanation: N01 Fruits and Vegetables, Part 1 Provide Fruits and Vegetables 對 Commercial Dining Spaces 要求至少四種 fruits 與四種 non-fried vegetables，或至少 50% of available food options are fruits containing no added sugar and/or non-fried vegetables。

D.gap: 把 general starches 誤認為 N01 的 healthy food category。
D.followup: N01 Part 1 的 50% food options 是 fruits and/or 哪一類 vegetables？starches 是否被列入？

B.gap: 將 non-fried 的修飾語套到 chicken 而非 vegetables。
B.followup: N01 強調 fruits and non-fried vegetables；non-fried chicken 是否屬於 Part 1 的計算類別？

A.gap: 混淆 N01 蔬果供應與 N14 plant-based options。
A.followup: Plant-based meat alternatives 是 N14 的重點；N01 Part 1 的 commercial dining 50% 門檻要算什麼？

M03_Q46.stem: An insurance company in Flagstaff is planning on providing daily food for their staff. The building will have an eating area on-site, but all food will be prepared off-site. Are the WELL Nourishment requirements applicable here?

options.text: Yes, this concept is required regardless of where food is prepared.
Yes, but only Feature N10: Food Production is applicable.
No, this concept only applies for food produced on-site.
No, this concept does not have any requirements for outside food or food vendors.

M03_Q46.explanation: WELL v2 Foods and Beverages scope states that projects selling or providing food daily by, or under contract with, the project owner, including catering, are within Nourishment precondition scope; N01 Fruits and Vegetables, Part 1 also applies when foods are sold or provided on a daily basis by the owner or contracted vendor.

B.gap: 誤稱 N10 為 Food Production，且把適用性限縮到單一 feature。
B.followup: Daily catered food 是否會觸發 N01/N02 等 Nourishment preconditions，而不只是某一個 food preparation feature？

D.gap: 忽略 contracted vendors 與 catering 也屬於 owner-provided food。
D.followup: WELL Foods and Beverages scope 是否明說 under contract with project owner, including catering？

C.gap: 把 on-site preparation 誤當成整個 Nourishment concept 的前提。
C.followup: 哪些 dining-space features 需要 on-site preparation？Nourishment preconditions 是否也涵蓋 off-site catering？

M03_Q47.stem: What is the intent of Feature N11: Responsible Food Sourcing?

options.text: To ensure that only organic and non-gmo fruits and vegetables are provided to buidling occupants.
To highlight the problems in the industrial food system and look for ways to purchase more locally sustainable foods.
To promote healthier eating choices at work.
To reduce dietary exposure to pesticides, hormones and antibiotics, limit environmental degradation and promote humane livestock practices.

M03_Q47.explanation: N11 Responsible Food Sourcing 的 Intent 是 reduce dietary exposure to pesticides, hormones and antibiotics, limit environmental degradation and promote humane livestock practices；Part 1 Implement Responsible Sourcing 再以 certified organic、Certified Humane 與 sustainable labeling 實作。

A.gap: 把 N11 過度縮小為 organic/non-GMO produce 規則。
A.followup: N11 Intent 除了 produce sourcing，是否也涵蓋 hormones、antibiotics、animal welfare 與 environmental degradation？

C.gap: 描述太泛，混同整體 Nourishment 目標而非 N11 intent。
C.followup: Promote healthier choices 可以描述多個 Nourishment features；N11 特別鎖定哪些農業與畜牧風險？

B.gap: 抓到 sustainability，但漏掉 pesticide、hormone 與 humane practices。
B.followup: N11 是否只是 locally sustainable purchasing，還明確要求降低 dietary exposure 與促進 livestock welfare？

M03_Q48.stem: A library in Seattle will be providing one dedicated eating area. In order to fulfill the requirements of Feature N10: Food Production, the dedicated eating area must be provided within what distance of the project boundary?
M03_Q48.explanation: N10 Food Preparation, Part 1 Provide Meal Support 要求 supportive amenities 至少設於一個 dedicated eating area，且該 eating area 位於 project boundary 650 ft(200 m) walk distance 內；題幹中的 Feature title 與標準名稱不一致。

B.gap: 把 650 ft walk distance 門檻大幅低估。
B.followup: N10 Part 1 的 dedicated eating area 距離是 150 ft，還是 650 ft(200 m) from project boundary？

D.gap: 選了中間距離，但不是 N10 明定數值。
D.followup: 回看 N10 Provide Meal Support，supportive amenities 要在多少 ft walk distance 內的 dedicated eating area？

A.gap: 高估可接受距離，超過 N10 的 650 ft 要求。
A.followup: 如果 dedicated eating area 在 725 ft，是否仍位於 N10 要求的 650 ft(200 m) walk distance 內？

M03_Q49.stem: The WELL Nourishment concept seeks to promote the consumption of fruits and vegetables by increasing availability and accessibility. Around the world, most individuals do not meet the daily recommended ________ servings of fruits and vegetables.
M03_Q49.explanation: N01 Fruits and Vegetables 的 Issue 說明 most individuals around the world do not meet the daily recommended five servings (400 g)；Part 1 Provide Fruits and Vegetables 因此要求提升 fruits and non-fried vegetables 的 availability。

C.gap: 低估 N01 引用的每日蔬果建議份數。
C.followup: N01 Issue 中五份對應 400 g；如果只記成三份，是否符合條文的 recommended servings？

D.gap: 高估 recommended servings，混入其他膳食建議印象。
D.followup: N01 引用的是 daily recommended five servings；你是否把更高的個別指南數字帶入 WELL？

B.gap: 把每日建議份數誇大到非 WELL 條文數值。
B.followup: N01 Issue 是否有提到 12 servings，還是明確寫 five servings (400 g)？

M03_Q50.stem: Nutritional Transparency is a critical feature of the WELL Nourishment concept. In commercial dining spaces, what staff positions are required to have annual food allergen training?
M03_Q50.explanation: N02 Nutritional Transparency, Part 2 Address Food Allergens 的 Option 1 Food allergy training 要求 all food service staff，包括 managers、servers 與 kitchen staff，每年提供 food allergy training，並且營業時至少一名過去一年受訓人員在場處理問題。

A.gap: 只選 managers，漏掉所有 food service staff 的範圍。
A.followup: N02 Part 2 是否只要求 managers 受訓，還明列 servers and kitchen staff 也包含在內？

B.gap: 只看前場 servers，忽略 managers 與 kitchen staff。
B.followup: All food service staff 在 N02 food allergy training 中包括哪些職位？只訓練 servers 足夠嗎？

C.gap: 只聚焦 kitchen staff，忽略服務與管理職位。
C.followup: Food allergen questions 可能由誰接觸顧客？N02 為何要求 managers、servers、kitchen staff 都受訓？

M04_Q01.stem: Part 1: Provide Indoor Light of Feature L01: Light Exposure provides requirements in Option 2: Interior layout for envelope glazing. Which of the following is one of the requirements a project may choose?

options.text: Common spaces must have unassigned seating and task lighting at each available seat.
At least 30% of the regularly occupied area is within a 20 ft(6 m) horizontal distance of envelope glazing.
There are no opaque obstructions higher than 3. 2 ft within 50 ft of the transparent envelope glazing.
The envelope glazing area is no less than 20% of the regularly occupied floor area.

M04_Q01.explanation: Feature L01 Light Exposure - Part 1 Provide Indoor Light, Option 2: Interior layout 要求至少 30% regularly occupied area 位於 envelope glazing 水平距離 20 ft(6 m) 內，或 common spaces 的座位符合 15%/70%/16 ft 條件。20% glazing 與 50 ft obstruction 不是此 Option 的門檻。

D.gap: 混淆 L01 glazing 面積與室內距窗要求
D.followup: L01 Option 2 看的是距窗面積，還是 glazing 面積？

A.gap: 混淆座位距窗規則與 task lighting
A.followup: common spaces 要求座位距窗，還是每席 task lighting？

C.gap: 把 Building design obstruction 誤作 Option 2
C.followup: obstruction 條件屬於 Interior layout 還是 Building design？

M04_Q02.stem: Which of the following disorders related to light exposure are associated with increased risk of obesity, diabetes, depression, and hypertension?
M04_Q02.explanation: Feature L03 Circadian Lighting Design - Part 1 Meet Lighting for Day-Active People 要維持 daytime light exposure；其 Issue 說明 circadian rhythm disruption 與 obesity、diabetes、depression、metabolic disorders 相關，且夜間亮光會造成 sleep disorders。題目所列健康風險對應的是長期睡眠與 circadian disruption，而不是正常的 photoentrainment。

A.gap: 把情緒光照問題誤當完整代謝風險
A.followup: L03 的 obesity 風險連到 SAD，還是 circadian disruption？

D.gap: 把正常 photoentrainment 誤認成疾病
D.followup: photoentrainment 是同步機制，還是 disorder？

C.gap: 混淆光敏感反應與睡眠節律長期失調
C.followup: 這些風險連到 photosensitivity，還是 circadian disruption？

M04_Q03.stem: The circadian rhythm is an internal clock in humans and animals that synchronize physiological functions on a cycle of what duration?
M04_Q03.explanation: Feature L01 Light Exposure - Part 1 Provide Indoor Light 的 Issue 說 mammals function on an approximately 24-hour cycle，並稱為 circadian rhythms。這個約 24-hour cycle 是 WELL 用來支持 daylight/electric light exposure 設計的基本生理前提。

D.gap: 把短時光曝露誤當 circadian 週期
D.followup: L01 說 circadian rhythm 約幾小時？

C.gap: 把半天週期誤作完整日夜同步週期
C.followup: 完整 circadian cycle 是半天，還是約一天？

A.gap: 混淆即時光反應與長期生理同步週期
A.followup: sleep-wake cycle 會是 1 hour 週期嗎？

M04_Q04.stem: Light exposure in the late afternoon/early night will shift circadian rhythms in what way?

options.text: Circadian rhythms would not be affected by late afternoon/early night exposure to light.

M04_Q04.explanation: Feature L01 Light Exposure - Part 1 Provide Indoor Light 的 Light concept background 說 late night/early morning light 會造成 phase advance，而 late afternoon/early night exposure 會使 rhythm 向後移，也就是 phase delay。這也是 WELL 要控制 light timing 以降低 circadian phase disruption 的原因。

D.gap: 忽略不同時段光曝露會移動節律方向
D.followup: late afternoon/early night 光曝露真的不影響 phase 嗎？

B.gap: 把清晨 phase advance 套到傍晚
B.followup: phase advance 是清晨光，還是傍晚光造成？

A.gap: 使用非 WELL 術語，未辨識位移方向
A.followup: WELL 實際列的是 phase advance/delay，傍晚對應哪個？

M04_Q05.stem: How many options are available to fulfill Feature L02: Visual Lighting Design for all spaces except dwellings?
M04_Q05.explanation: Feature L02 Visual Lighting Design - Part 1 Provide Visual Acuity 在 For All Spaces except Dwelling Units 下提供兩條路徑：Option 1 Visual lighting design 與 Option 2 Predetermined light levels。Dwelling Units 另有 Promote Visual Acuity，不應算入此題範圍。

B.gap: 把 dwelling units 路徑也算進非住宅選項
B.followup: For All Spaces except Dwelling Units 下有幾個 Option？

D.gap: 只看到 guideline，漏掉 predetermined levels
D.followup: L02 除了 guidelines，是否還有 predetermined levels？

A.gap: 把 guideline 清單誤認為 compliance options
A.followup: IES、EN、ISO 是 guidelines，還是獨立 options？

M04_Q06.stem: How does the human body sense light?

options.text: Emissions are projected from the eye and bounce back when they detect light.
Light-sensitive tissues on the exterior of the eye, called the 'pupil'.
Light enters the eye and is sensed by photoreceptors in the retina.
Photosensetive cells located in the eyes and on the skin.

M04_Q06.explanation: Feature L01 Light Exposure - Part 1 Provide Indoor Light 的 Light concept background 說 light enters the human body through the eye and is sensed by photoreceptors in the retina。L03 Part 1 也因此要求在 vertical plane at eye level 評估 light entering the eye。

D.gap: 加入 skin 感光路徑，偏離 retina 描述
D.followup: L01 說光 through the eye，是否要求 skin sensing？

A.gap: 採用錯誤的眼睛發射式視覺理解模型
A.followup: WELL 是光進入 eye，還是 eye 發出光？

B.gap: 把 pupil 當感光組織，忽略 retina
B.followup: 感光並連到 visual/circadian 的是 pupil 還是 retina？

M04_Q07.stem: A minimum lighting intensity of at least 30fc at task surface is required in which space type for Part 1: Provide Visual Acuity of Feature L02: Visual Lighting Design?
M04_Q07.explanation: Feature L02 Visual Lighting Design - Part 1 Provide Visual Acuity, Option 2: Predetermined light levels specifies Offices and classrooms: minimum 30 fc(320 lux) at task surface。Lobby、atrium、transition、storage、dining、lounge 和 restrooms 的列示門檻則是 10 fc。

C.gap: 把特定 space type 門檻泛化到所有區域
C.followup: 30 fc 是所有區域，還是 Offices and classrooms？

A.gap: 混淆 circulation 與 task-surface 工作空間
A.followup: corridor/pathways 的門檻是 30 fc task surface 嗎？

D.gap: 以接待區直覺取代標準 space type
D.followup: L02 表中 reception 是否列為 30 fc 類型？

M04_Q08.stem: What WELL feature requires projects to provide appropriate illuminances on work planes for regular users of all age groups, as required for the tasks performed in the space?
M04_Q08.explanation: Feature L02 Visual Lighting Design - Part 1 Provide Visual Acuity 的 Summary 明確要求依 tasks performed 與 all age groups，在 work planes 提供 appropriate illuminances。L02 的具體路徑包含 reference guidelines 或 predetermined light levels。

B.gap: 混淆 circadian eye-level 與 work-plane 照度
B.followup: L03 是 eye level，還是 work-plane illuminance？

D.gap: 被 glare 字樣誤導，忽略 L04 管眩光
D.followup: L04 是 minimize glare，還是設定 age-group illuminance？

C.gap: 把控制權誤認為基本視覺照度設計
C.followup: L09 是 controllability，還是基準 work-plane illuminance？

options.text: A sign that a light is malfunctioning.
A way to measure eye strain.
A variance of luminance in time, measured by hertz.
A variance of sound, measured by decibels.

M04_Q09.explanation: Feature L08 Electric Light Quality - Part 2 Manage Flicker addresses flicker in luminaires and requires reduced flicker operation, IEEE 1789-2015 practices, or Pst LM ≤ 1.0 and SVM ≤ 1.6。Flicker is temporal variation in luminance, not a sound metric or an eye-strain measurement itself。

A.gap: 把 flicker 當故障，忽略其光品質屬性
A.followup: L08 Part 2 設 flicker 指標，代表只是故障訊號嗎？

B.gap: 把 eye strain 後果誤作 flicker 定義
B.followup: L08 管的是 eye strain 本身，還是 luminance time variation？

D.gap: 混淆 Sound decibels 與 Light flicker
D.followup: luminance in time 屬於 L08，還是 Sound decibels？
