A.followup: M02 Part 1 可以用 sounds，但題目問 linked benefits 時，Issue 舉了哪兩個 natural elements？

M09_Q41.stem: Company X is supporting and promoting occupant mental health. Which of the following should be available to employees at no cost?

options.text: Providing a napping room for new mothers.
A policy that establishes healthy working hours.

M09_Q41.explanation: M01 Mental Health Promotion, Part 1 Promote Mental Health and Well-being requires at least two supports be available to all employees and students at no cost, including trainings or courses related to mental health and well-being offered annually.

C.gap: 把 healthy working hours policy 當成唯一 no-cost training item。
C.followup: M01 Part 1 確實列 working-hours policy，但題目問 available at no cost 的 training/education 時是哪一項？

B.gap: 混淆 restoration space 或 lactation support 與 M01 mental well-being training。
B.followup: M01 Part 1 的 dedicated restoration space 是否等同於 napping room for new mothers？

D.gap: 選了與 mental health promotion 無關的娛樂空間。
D.followup: M01 Part 1 列出的 no-cost supports 是否包含 party room，還是 mental health education/training/programming？

M09_Q42.stem: An IT company wants to create an outdoor restorative space to allow their employees to benefit from fresh air and a connection to nature. Because this will be the only restorative space for the project, how can weather affect accessibility?

options.text: The space may be closed during times of inclement weather.
The space must be open during business hours.
The space must be open and functional year-round.

M09_Q42.explanation: M07 Restorative Spaces, Part 1 Provide Restorative Space notes that if restorative space is provided only outdoors, it must be functional year-round, so weather cannot make the only restorative space seasonally unusable.

C.gap: 只考慮營業時間開放，漏掉 year-round functional 條件。
C.followup: M07 Part 1 對 only outdoor restorative space 的 note 是 business hours，還是 year-round functionality？

A.gap: 誤以為惡劣天氣可關閉唯一 restorative space。
A.followup: 若室外空間是唯一 restorative space，M07 Part 1 note 是否允許 inclement weather 使其不可用？

B.gap: 把地理位置當成開放規則來源，忽略條文明確要求。
B.followup: M07 Part 1 的 accessibility 是由 geographic location 自訂，還是由 year-round functional note 控制？

M09_Q43.stem: An office building that includes a customer service call center is trying to achieve WELL Certification. In order to receive credit for Part 2: Provide Nap Policy and Space of Feature M06: Restorative Opportunities, can the customer service call center schedule nap and/or rest breaks for a specific time per employee in order to ensure proper coverage in calls?

options.text: Yes, companies are able to schedule employee time freely.
Employees can decide to accept specific nap or rest breaks.
No, scheduling or designating specific times for the nap or rest break does not meet the feature requirement.
Individual companies within the building can determine company protocols.

M09_Q43.explanation: M06 Restorative Opportunities, Part 2 Provide Nap Policy and Space, Option 1 Nap policy requires eligible employees to be allowed at least one nap or rest break of at least 30 minutes during the workday, not combined with meal breaks.

D.gap: 把 WELL feature requirement 誤交給各公司自行決定。
D.followup: M06 Part 2 是各 tenant 自訂 protocol，還是對 all eligible employees 有共同 minimum？

A.gap: 誤以為雇主可完全自由排定休息，忽略 employee allowance。
A.followup: M06 Part 2 的 wording 強調 employees are allowed，這是否等於公司可任意指定唯一時段？

B.gap: 把員工接受指定時段誤當成 feature 合規核心。
B.followup: M06 Part 2 要求的是至少 30-minute nap/rest break allowance，還是接受指定排班本身？

M09_Q44.stem: Workplace stress is incredibly common globally. Highly stressed employees are at risk for a number of negative outcomes, including decreased productivity, greater absenteeism and higher overall medical expenditures. Introducing mindfulness into the workplace has been shown to lower employee stress as well as improve focus, clarity of thinking and emotional intelligence. What interventions for employees have been found to reduce work-associated stress, depression and anxiety?
M09_Q44.explanation: M08 Restorative Programming, Part 1 Provide Restorative Programming is based on evidence that meditation interventions targeting workers reduce work-associated stress, depression and anxiety; compliant programming includes mindfulness training, weekly guided meditation/yoga or digital mindfulness offerings.

C.gap: 把 yoga 視為唯一實證介入，未抓到題目所問 meditation。
C.followup: M08 Solutions 說 meditation interventions 有效；yoga 在 Part 1 中是 mindfulness programming 的例子還是主述研究？

B.gap: 把一般健康飲食誤放入 restorative programming。
B.followup: M08 Part 1 的 programming 是 mindfulness/meditation/yoga，是否包含 healthy eating 作為核心介入？

A.gap: 混淆聲音環境與 M08 的 mindfulness-based programming。
A.followup: Sound strategy 比較屬於 M07 restorative space；M08 Solutions 說哪種 intervention 降低 stress/depression/anxiety？

M09_Q45.stem: Which United Nations sustainable development goals are part of Feature M01: Mental Health Promotion?

options.text: Reduced Inequalities and Good Health and Well-being
End Poverty and Life on Land

M09_Q45.explanation: M01 Mental Health Promotion, Part 1 Promote Mental Health and Well-being requires mental health supports and communications that advance health access and equity; the WELL feature metadata aligns this feature with Good Health and Well-being and Reduced Inequalities.

D.gap: 混淆環境/貧窮目標與 M01 的 mental health equity 重點。
D.followup: M01 Part 1 的 no-cost mental health resources 較直接對應健康與平等，還是 Life on Land？

A.gap: 抓到 inequalities 但誤加入 climate action，偏離 M01 內容。
A.followup: M01 Mental Health Promotion 的策略是 climate mitigation，還是 mental health access and equity？

B.gap: 把教育/性別目標誤當成 M01 的主要 SDG 對應。
B.followup: M01 Part 1 雖含 training，但 feature 的 SDG alignment 是否以 health 與 inequalities 為核心？

M09_Q46.stem: Which Mind concept features are preconditions for WELL Certification?

options.text: Tobacco Cessation and Substance Use Services
Mental Health Services and Mental Health Education
Mental Health Promotion and Nature and Place

M09_Q46.explanation: The WELL Mind feature list marks M01 Mental Health Promotion and M02 Nature and Place as preconditions; M01 Part 1 requires mental health supports, while M02 Part 1 and Part 2 require connection to nature and place.

B.gap: 把服務與教育類 optimization 誤認成 certification preconditions。
B.followup: M03/M04 在 Mind concept list 是 O 還是 P？哪兩個 feature 才列為 P？

D.gap: 混淆 restorative opportunities/spaces 與必備 preconditions。
D.followup: M06/M07 是取得 points 的 optimization，還是所有 WELL Certification 必做 precondition？

A.gap: 把成癮與物質使用支援誤當成 Mind 的最低門檻。
A.followup: M10/M11 在 feature list 是 optimization；precondition 欄列的是哪些 feature codes？

M09_Q47.stem: A company in Baltimore is looking to design their new office building with Feature M09: Enhanced Access to Nature in mind. How will building occupants benefit from workday nature contact?

options.text: No change is reported from workday nature contact.

M09_Q47.explanation: M09 Enhanced Access to Nature, Part 2 Provide Nature Access Outdoors is supported by the Issue/Solutions text that as workday nature contact increases, perceived job stress, subjective health complaints and sickness absence decrease.

C.gap: 把 nature contact 的效果反向理解成增加焦慮。
C.followup: M09 Issue 說 outdoor green spaces 與 workday nature contact 對 anxiety/job stress 是增加還是降低？

D.gap: 把 nature access 效益誤轉成 nutrition behavior。
D.followup: M09 Part 2 強調 green/blue space access；它直接說明的是 eating，還是 job stress/health complaints？

A.gap: 忽略 M09 Solutions 明確描述 dose-response health benefits。
A.followup: M09 Solutions 是否說 workday nature contact 無變化，還是 perceived job stress 會下降？

M09_Q48.stem: A manufacturing company in Boise is looking at ways to promote mental health and well-being for its employees. Part 1: Promote Mental Health and Well-being of Feature MO1: Mental Health Promotion requires annual communication to all regular occupants as well as new employees. What should be part of this communication?

options.text: Specific information about dental and vision insurance.
Mental health and well-being benefits offered by the organization.

M09_Q48.explanation: M01 Mental Health Promotion, Part 1 Promote Mental Health and Well-being requires annual communication to all regular occupants and onboarding communication to new employees specifically addressing all mental health and well-being benefits, resources and programs available through the project or organization.

B.gap: 把一般保險資訊誤當成 M01 指定的 mental health communication。
B.followup: M01 Part 1.b 要 annual communication 說明 general insurance，還是 mental health benefits/resources/programs？

A.gap: 把牙科視力福利誤放入 mental health promotion 溝通要求。
A.followup: M01 Part 1.b 的 scope 是否包含 dental/vision details，還是聚焦 mental health and well-being？

D.gap: 把所有第三方資源誤當成必要內容，忽略組織可用福利。
D.followup: M01 Part 1.b 要說明的是 all project/organization mental health benefits，是否限於第三方資源？

M09_Q49.stem: There is evidence to support that buildings can support occupants by decreasing stress and mental fatigue with connection to nature strategies. In Feature M02: Nature and Place, what are the three pathways that can allow occupants to benefit from access to nature in their spaces?
M09_Q49.explanation: M02 Nature and Place, Solutions for Part 1 Provide Connection to Nature explains that benefits of nature access can be achieved through direct, indirect or representational pathways, such as plants, window views or photographs.

C.gap: 列出元素例子但漏掉 WELL 定義的三種 pathways。
C.followup: M02 Solutions 問的是 pathway taxonomy，sunshine/plants/paintings 是分類名稱還是例子？

D.gap: 把具體設計元件誤當成 direct/indirect/representational 三分法。
D.followup: Windows、fountains、textiles 可是策略元素；M02 Solutions 的三個 pathway 名稱是什麼？

B.gap: 選了零散元素且缺少 indirect/representational 概念。
B.followup: M02 Solutions 是否把 textiles/sunshine/water 列為三大 pathway，還是列 direct/indirect/representational？

M09_Q50.stem: When focusing on human health, the built environment is a powerful tool that can help to mitigate adverse mental health outcomes. What steps should be looked at for these mitigation tools?

options.text: Through meetings, and stakeholder buy in.
Through features and the overall standard.

M09_Q50.explanation: The WELL Mind concept overview states that the built environment can mitigate adverse mental health outcomes through policies, programs and design; M01 Part 1 illustrates this with supportive programs, policies, resources and communications for mental health promotion.

B.gap: 把 mitigation 工具誤縮成會議與利害關係人支持。
B.followup: Mind overview 說 built environment 的 mitigation tools 是 meetings，還是 policies/programs/design？

D.gap: 把 WELL 的章節結構誤當成實際介入工具。
D.followup: Features and the overall standard 是分類架構；Mind overview 指出的介入類型是什麼？

A.gap: 選了抽象態度詞，未連到標準明列三類工具。
A.followup: Mind overview 是否用 consistency/openness 作為 mitigation steps，還是列 policy、program、design？

M10_Q01.stem: According to Part 1: Facilitate Stakeholder Charrette of Feature C02: Integrative Design, when should a stakeholder charrette take place?

options.text: Just after the project has kicked off.

M10_Q01.explanation: C02 Integrative Design Part 1 要求 stakeholder charrette 在規劃流程早期進行，讓健康目標在設計定案前就納入決策。

B.gap: 把 charrette 等同 kick-off 後的單次會議
B.followup: C02 強調的是在「規劃流程早期」介入，這跟專案剛啟動的時點有什麼差別？

A.gap: 誤以為 charrette 需每月持續舉辦
A.followup: charrette 是一次性密集協作工作坊，這跟 monthly 例會的性質有何不同？

C.gap: 把協作流程放到專案完成後，已失去設計影響力
C.followup: 若在 project completion 後才開 charrette，還能影響哪些 design 決策？

M10_Q02.stem: According to Feature C02: Integrative Design Process, who must meet with stakeholders prior to the design and programming of a project trying to achieve a WELL Certification?

options.text: Architects, owner, facility management team and engineers.

M10_Q02.explanation: C02 要求在 design and programming 前，由 architects、owner、facility management team 與 engineers 等核心關係人共同會談，確保跨領域整合。

A.gap: 關係人涵蓋不足，遺漏 owner/FM team
A.followup: C02 的整合精神要納入哪些角色才能涵蓋設計、營運與使用端？

B.gap: 以 PM 取代設計與工程專業
B.followup: project manager 之外，誰負責把健康策略落到實際 design？

C.gap: 仍漏掉 facility management team
C.followup: 少了 facility management team，後續 operation 階段的健康策略由誰把關？

M10_Q03.stem: Part 2: Promote Health-Oriented Mission of Feature C02: Integrative Design stipulates that the project establishes a health-oriented mission. Where should the health-oriented mission be detailed?

options.text: A general notice to all occupants.

M10_Q03.explanation: C02 Part 2 要求把 health-oriented mission 明文記載於 WELL Feature Guide，作為團隊共同依循的文件。

A.gap: 誤以為公告即可取代正式文件
A.followup: 一般 notice 與需被 review 的正式文件，在 verification 上有何差別？

C.gap: 混淆 Project Checklist 與 Feature Guide 的用途
C.followup: Project Checklist 記錄的是各 feature 進度，那 health-oriented mission 該寫在哪份文件？

B.gap: Project Matrix 並非記載 mission 的指定文件
B.followup: C02 指定的文件名稱是什麼？

M10_Q04.stem: The WELL Building Standard™ (WELL™) Community concept seeks to establish an inclusive, engaged occupant community. What factors link people within a community?

options.text: Engaging in joint action and experiences in shared settings or locations.

M10_Q04.explanation: Community concept overview 指出，社群由 social ties、shared common perspectives 與在共享場域的 joint action and experiences 共同連結，三者皆是。

A.gap: 只取單一面向，低估社群連結的多重性
A.followup: 除了 social ties，還有哪些因素把人連結成一個 community？

B.gap: 只取單一面向，忽略行動與場域
B.followup: shared perspectives 之外，共享場域中的共同行動是否也算連結因素？

C.gap: 只取單一面向，忽略既有人際與觀點
C.followup: joint action 之外，既有的 social ties 是否也是連結來源？

M10_Q05.stem: What are the Social Determinants of Health?
M10_Q05.explanation: Social Determinants of Health 指影響健康的 physical and built conditions（以及社會經濟環境），WELL Community 以此切入環境對健康的影響。

A.gap: 只取 environmental 單一面向
A.followup: SDOH 涵蓋的條件是否只有 environmental 一項？

C.gap: 把 mental 誤列為 SDOH 的定義範疇
C.followup: mental 是健康結果還是決定因素？SDOH 強調的是哪一類條件？

D.gap: 誤選包山包海而非 WELL 強調的條件
D.followup: WELL 在此最強調的是哪一類 determinant？

M10_Q06.stem: Which of the following is not a health disparity, according to the WELL Community concept?
M10_Q06.explanation: WELL Community 列舉的 health disparities 包含 gender、race、ethnicity 等社會群體差異；age 不在其列舉的 disparity 類別。

D.gap: 把 gender 誤判為非 disparity
D.followup: gender 是否屬於 WELL 列舉的健康不平等面向？

A.gap: 把 race 誤判為非 disparity
A.followup: race 是否屬於 WELL 列舉的健康不平等面向？

C.gap: 把 ethnicity 誤判為非 disparity
C.followup: ethnicity 是否屬於 WELL 列舉的健康不平等面向？

M10_Q07.stem: The U.S. Federal Emergency Management Agency estimates what percent of small businesses permanently close following a disaster due to the lack of a comprehensive disaster preparedness plan with proper mitigation strategies?
M10_Q07.explanation: C03 Emergency Preparedness overview 引用 FEMA 估計：約 40-60% 小型企業在缺乏完整防災計畫時，於災後永久歇業。

A.gap: 高估歇業比例，記成 75-80%
A.followup: FEMA 引用的區間是否高達近八成？

D.gap: 低估歇業比例
D.followup: 缺乏防災計畫的小型企業歇業比例，會低到只有兩三成嗎？

B.gap: 記成相近但非標準引用的區間
B.followup: 標準引用的是哪一個整數區間？

M10_Q08.stem: How does Part 1: Select Project Survey of Feature C04: Occupant Survey require a project team to collect feedback from building users?

options.text: Third-party survey from approved IWBI vendor.
A survey sent out via email.
A questionnaire given to the largest building tenant.

M10_Q08.explanation: C04 Occupant Survey Part 1 要求採用 IWBI 核可廠商提供的 third-party survey，以確保方法與比較基準一致。

D.gap: 誤以為只調查最大租戶即可
D.followup: 只問單一最大租戶，能否代表全體 building users？

C.gap: 誤以為自寄 email 問卷即符合
C.followup: self-administered email 問卷缺少哪一項 C04 要求的條件？

B.gap: 意見箱無法構成系統化調查
B.followup: suggestion box 能否提供可分析、可比較的調查結果？

M10_Q09.stem: What can an employer do to support the overall health and well-being of individuals and their families according to Part 1: Promote Health Benefits of Feature C06: Health Services and Benefits?

options.text: Run a marathon with a company team.
Allow employees flexible working hours or the opportunity to work remotely a few days a week.
Purchase fitbits or other fitness trackers for those wanting to get healthier.
Offer comprehensive health benefits, policies and services.

M10_Q09.explanation: C06 Health Services and Benefits Part 1 要求 employer 提供 comprehensive health benefits、policies and services，以支持員工與家庭整體健康。

B.gap: 把彈性工時誤當主要健康福利要求
B.followup: 彈性工時是加分項，但 C06 Part 1 要求的核心是哪一類 benefits？

C.gap: 把贈送穿戴裝置當成 comprehensive benefits
C.followup: 送 fitness tracker 是否等同提供 comprehensive health benefits？

A.gap: 把團隊活動誤當制度性健康福利
A.followup: 辦馬拉松屬於活動，C06 要求的是制度性的什麼？

M10_Q10.stem: Which of the following does a property management team need to do when conducting a post-occupancy survey, as stipulated in Part 2: Utilize Pre- and Post-Occupancy Survey of Feature C05: Enhanced Occupant Survey?

options.text: Ensure those taking the survey are not forced to do so.
Conduct the survey themselves in the building.
Compare results from the pre-occupancy survey against post-occupancy survey results..
Use a third party created survey.

M10_Q10.explanation: C05 Enhanced Occupant Survey Part 2 要求進行 pre- 與 post-occupancy 調查，並比對兩者結果以評估介入成效。

D.gap: 只做第三方問卷而未強調比對
D.followup: C05 的 enhanced 重點是『比對』，單用第三方問卷是否就達標？

B.gap: 自行施測違反第三方要求
B.followup: 自辦調查在客觀性上缺少什麼？

A.gap: 只談自願性而非比對結果
A.followup: 自願參與是基本倫理，但 C05 Part 2 要求比對哪兩次調查？

M10_Q11.stem: The WELL overview for Feature C06: Health Services and Benefits tells us that 94% of the world's countries mandate paid sick leave. The United States and this country are the only OECD countries that do not mandate paid sick leave.
M10_Q11.explanation: C06 overview 指出全球 94% 國家規定 paid sick leave，美國與 Korea 是僅有的兩個未強制的 OECD 國家。

A.gap: 誤記為日本
A.followup: OECD 中與美國並列未強制 paid sick leave 的是哪一國？

C.gap: 誤記為土耳其
C.followup: C06 overview 點名的另一個未強制國家是哪一國？

D.gap: 誤記為智利
D.followup: 標準明確點名的是 Korea 還是 Chile？

M10_Q12.stem: According to Feature C06: Health Services and Benefits, 94% of the world’s countries mandate paid sick leave, the U.S. and Korea are the only OECD countries that do not, and 40% of American employees have no sick leave. Studies estimate that how many Americans go to work sick because they lack sick leave or have only one-day of sick leave?
M10_Q12.explanation: C06 overview 引用研究：因缺乏或僅有一天病假，估計約有 2,000 萬名美國人帶病上班。

A.gap: 嚴重低估帶病上班人數
A.followup: 10 萬與『數千萬』的量級差距，哪個符合 overview 引用？

B.gap: 低估帶病上班人數一個量級
B.followup: 37.5 萬是否達到 overview 強調的數千萬級？

C.gap: 接近但少一個量級
C.followup: 標準引用的是一千萬還是兩千萬？

M10_Q13.stem: Studies show that implementing _______ reduces contagion in the workplace and improves employee productivity and reduces employee turnover.

options.text: Healthy lunches paid for by the employer daily.

M10_Q13.explanation: C06 overview 指出實施 paid sick leave 可降低職場傳染、提升生產力並降低離職率。

D.gap: telemedicine 是相關但非此處引用的措施
D.followup: overview 在此句強調的具體制度是哪一項？

C.gap: 開放式空間與傳染率不是此處主題
C.followup: floor plan 與 sick leave 政策何者是 C06 此句重點？

A.gap: 免費午餐並非降低傳染的引用措施
A.followup: 提供午餐與 paid sick leave，哪個對降低 contagion 有直接證據？

M10_Q14.stem: Successful health promotion programs can improve job satisfaction, according to Feature C07: Enhanced Health and Wellness Promotion. Specifically, medical and absenteeism costs fall by about $3.27 and $2.73, respectively, for every dollar spent on _______.
M10_Q14.explanation: C07 Enhanced Health and Wellness Promotion overview 指出，每投入 1 美元於 workplace health programs，醫療與缺勤成本分別約下降 $3.27 與 $2.73。

A.gap: 把公司旅遊誤當健康投資標的
A.followup: retreat 與系統化 health program，哪個對應這組投報數據？

C.gap: 辦公茶點與健康投報數據無關
C.followup: office refreshments 是否是 C07 引用的投資項目？

D.gap: 把退休金提撥誤當健康促進投資
D.followup: 401(k) match 屬於財務福利，與 workplace health program 是同一類嗎？

M10_Q15.stem: A tech corporation is pursuing WELL Certification for their new corporate headquarters in Austin, Texas. In order to receive 1 Point for Part 2: Offer On-Demand Health Services of Feature: C06 Health Services and Benefits a WELL Certified building must provide _______ ?
M10_Q15.explanation: C06 Part 2 Offer On-Demand Health Services 要求提供 onsite doctor 或 nurse practitioner 等隨需健康服務以得分。

A.gap: 餐飲主廚與健康服務無關
A.followup: head chef 屬於 nourishment/營運，與 on-demand health services 是同類嗎？

C.gap: Chief Wellness Officer 是管理角色而非隨需醫療
C.followup: CWO 負責策略，C06 Part 2 要求的是現場的哪種醫療人員？

D.gap: 私人教練不等於隨需醫療服務
D.followup: physical trainer 提供的服務與 on-demand health service 有何不同？

M10_Q16.stem: Part 1: Offer New Parent Leave of Feature C08: New Parent Support requires paid leave to be at ____ or higher of the employee's full salary or wages and cover benefits.
M10_Q16.explanation: C08 New Parent Support Part 1 要求 paid leave 達員工全薪的 75% 或以上，並涵蓋福利。

D.gap: 低估給付比例為 50%
D.followup: C08 規定的最低給付比例是否低到只有半薪？

B.gap: 接近但低於 75% 門檻
B.followup: 70% 與標準門檻 75% 之間，哪個才是 C08 要求？

C.gap: 高估為 100% 全薪
C.followup: C08 要求的是『至少 75%』還是『全額』？

M10_Q17.stem: At a minimum, WELL Feature C08: New Parent Support promotes how much paid leave for the primary caregiver and non-primary caregiver?

options.text: Primary Caregiver at least 30 Weeks | Non-Primary 4 Weeks.
Primary Caregiver at least 2 weeks | Non-Primary Caregiver 5 days.
Primary Caregiver at least 12 Weeks | Non-Primary 2 Weeks.
Primary Caregiver at least 4 Weeks | Non-Primary At least 2 Weeks.

M10_Q17.explanation: C08 至少提供 primary caregiver 12 週、non-primary caregiver 2 週的 paid leave。

B.gap: 週數嚴重低於 C08 門檻
B.followup: primary 2 週與標準的 12 週差距多大？

D.gap: primary 週數仍不足
D.followup: primary caregiver 的最低週數是 4 週還是 12 週？

A.gap: 高估週數，超出 C08 最低標
A.followup: 30 週是否為 C08 規定的『最低』要求？

M10_Q18.stem: Parental support policies help employees and their families in a variety of ways. Higher rates of breastfeeding and reduced infant mortality are some of the benefits of paid parental leave. Which of the following is not a policy that a project can implement to be WELL compliant?

options.text: Coaching programs, counseling or other resources to help employees transition when returning from leave.
Use of virtual assistance to help cover the work load.
Training for managers to help create a plan for leave and optimal support for returning to work.
Communication to expecting parents about the project or organization’s parental leave policies and supporting resource.

M10_Q18.explanation: C08 列舉的合規政策包含返崗過渡支持、主管訓練與政策溝通；以 virtual assistance 代為分擔工作量並非其要求。

A.gap: 返崗 coaching 其實是合規政策
A.followup: coaching/counseling 是否列於 C08 的支持措施？

C.gap: 主管訓練其實是合規政策
C.followup: 為 manager 提供請假規劃訓練是否屬 C08 範疇？

D.gap: 向員工溝通政策其實是合規措施
D.followup: 向 expecting parents 溝通 leave policy 是否為 C08 要求？

M10_Q19.stem: Part 1: Offer Workplace Breastfeeding Support of Feature C09: New Mother Support provides spaces and policies that encourage and support breastfeeding. How many pumping sessions per eight-hour workday should be allocated for an eligible employee?
M10_Q19.explanation: C09 New Mother Support 要求每八小時工作日提供 2-3 次 pumping sessions（每 2-3 小時 15-20 分鐘）。

C.gap: 次數低於最低要求
C.followup: 每八小時 1-2 次是否達到 C09 的最低頻率？

B.gap: 次數高於標準範圍
B.followup: 5-7 次是否超出 C09 規定的 2-3 次？

A.gap: 範圍過寬不符標準
A.followup: C09 給的是 2-3 次的明確區間，4-8 次是否符合？

M10_Q20.stem: A breastfeeding mother is traveling for work. She and her team will be visiting clients and their trip should only last 1 full day and half of the following day (36 hours). What travel accommodations should be made according to Part 1: Offer Workplace Breastfeeding Support of Feature C09: New Mother Support?

options.text: A hotel room or other accommodations with refrigerator access.
An insulated cooler purchased by the employee.
Coverage of express shipping of milk to family back home.
Reschedule return flight home to an earlier flight.

M10_Q20.explanation: C09 對出差中的哺乳員工，要求提供具 refrigerator access 的 hotel room 或同等住宿以保存母乳。

B.gap: 自費保冷袋未達雇主提供住宿的要求
B.followup: 由員工自費的 cooler 與雇主提供冷藏住宿，哪個符合 C09？

C.gap: 寄送母乳非標準要求的住宿安排
C.followup: express shipping 是否為 C09 指定的差旅哺乳安排？

D.gap: 改機票迴避問題而非提供安排
D.followup: 提早返程是否解決了出差期間的母乳保存需求？

M10_Q21.stem: The intent of Feature C10: Family Support is the support working parents and caregivers so that they are able to properly care for members of their families. If a project doesn't have an on-site childcare center, what percentage of off-site or at-home childcare costs should be subsidized for employees?
M10_Q21.explanation: C10 Family Support Part 1 要求若無 on-site childcare，需補貼 off-site 或 at-home childcare 成本至少 50%。

D.gap: 補貼比例嚴重偏低
D.followup: 10% 補貼是否達到 C10 的最低門檻？

C.gap: 接近但低於 50% 門檻
C.followup: 25% 與標準的 50% 之間，哪個是 C10 要求？

B.gap: 高估補貼比例
B.followup: C10 規定的是『至少 50%』還是更高？

M10_Q22.stem: Which of the following is NOT included in offering childcare as part of Feature C10: Family Support?

options.text: Employees are able to bring their children to the office on days their kids are sick.
On-site childcare centers compliant with local childcare licensure, or subsidies of at least 50% for off-site or at-home childcare, for regular occupants.
Seasonal childcare programs (e.g., center- or home-based care during school break or winter holidays) for regular occupants with school-age children.

Back-up childcare coverage for regular occupants in case of unexpected events, at no cost or subsidized by at least 50% (e.g., drop-in daycare, overnight childcare, in-home babysitting service, virtual childcare service).

M10_Q22.explanation: C10 的 childcare 支持包含 on-site 中心或≥50% 補貼、back-up 與 seasonal childcare；『讓員工帶生病小孩到辦公室』不屬其列。

B.gap: 此項其實屬 C10 合規 childcare
B.followup: on-site 中心或 50% 補貼是否列於 C10？

D.gap: back-up childcare 其實屬 C10
D.followup: 突發狀況的備援托育是否為 C10 選項？

C.gap: seasonal childcare 其實屬 C10
C.followup: 寒暑假的 seasonal 托育是否列於 C10？

M10_Q23.stem: An employee needs to take time off to care for their spouse who was diagnosed with cancer. At the very least, how many weeks of paid leave should this employee receive?

options.text: 16 weeks of paid leave paid at 75% or higher of employees full salary or wages.
4 weeks of paid leave paid at 70% or higher of employees full salary or wages.
2 weeks of paid leave paid at 50% or higher of employees full salary or wages.
12 weeks of paid leave paid at 75% or higher of employees full salary or wages.

M10_Q23.explanation: C10 Part 2 Offer Family Leave 要求為照顧家人提供至少 12 週、給付 75% 或以上的 paid leave。

C.gap: 週數與給付皆遠低於門檻
C.followup: 2 週、50% 與標準的 12 週、75% 差距多大？

B.gap: 週數與給付皆不足
B.followup: 4 週 70% 是否達到 C10 family leave 的最低標？

A.gap: 週數高於最低要求
A.followup: 16 週是否為 C10 規定的『最低』週數？

M10_Q24.stem: The WELL Building Standard offers family leave in Feature C10: Family Support. When an employee hits the 12 week threshold when receiving 75% pay for being out taking care of a terminal spouse, all of the following with the exception of ____ are options given to employees.

options.text: Use paid sick time or personal days for the care of a spouse.
Arrive late or leave early daily.

M10_Q24.explanation: C10 family leave 達 12 週後，員工可用 paid sick/personal days、彈性到離或永久遠距等選項；唯獨『被迫返崗或離職』不在其中。

A.gap: 此為合規選項而非例外
A.followup: 用 paid sick/personal days 照顧家人是否屬 C10 提供的選項？

C.gap: 彈性到離其實是合規選項
C.followup: arrive late/leave early 是否列於 C10 給員工的彈性？

B.gap: 永久遠距其實是合規選項
B.followup: permanent work from home 是否為 C10 的選項之一？

M10_Q25.stem: Acme Corp is very passionate about its community. Every year they host and are involved in various events to give back and show the community they care. Which of the following are examples of community engagement as it pertains to WELL?

options.text: Donation matching charity drives to organization of employee's choosing
March Madness Bracket and Prize Pool
A yearly 5k race and cookout that supports charity

M10_Q25.explanation: C11 Civic Engagement 認可如 donation matching charity drives 等實質回饋社群的制度化參與。

D.gap: 慈善路跑偏向活動而非制度化參與
D.followup: 一次性的 5k/cookout 與制度化的 donation matching，哪個更符合 civic engagement？

A.gap: 萬聖節變裝與公民參與無關
A.followup: costume contest 是否屬於回饋社群的 civic engagement？

C.gap: 賭注式活動非公民參與
C.followup: March Madness 獎金池與社群回饋有何關聯？

M10_Q26.stem: Acme Corp is building a new office in Atlanta, GA. In order to earn a point for Feature C11: Civic Engagement, they must include an indoor or outdoor space to be used by the community. Which space type is best suitable for this credit?

options.text: A presentation hall that is available every other week.
A small meeting room that can accommodate 5 adults.
A board room that is 2,000 sq. ft..
An outdoor classroom/quad with enough tables to accommodate 10-20 adults.

M10_Q26.explanation: C11 Civic Engagement, Part 2 Provide Community Space 允許採用 meeting space：project boundary 內一個或多個 indoor/outdoor spaces 可免費供公眾使用，capacity 至少 10 people，且至少 weekly 可用；戶外 classroom/quad 容納 10-20 adults 最符合此路徑。

C.gap: 只抓到 2,000 ft2，忽略 public use 與空間性質。
C.followup: C11 Part 2 的 community space 除面積外，還要求 public access、seating 與 navigability；board room 是否自然符合？

B.gap: 忽略 meeting space 至少容納 10 people 的門檻。
B.followup: 若採 C11 Part 2 的 meeting space 路徑，capacity 是至少 5 people 還是至少 10 people？

A.gap: 混淆活動空間大小與每週可用頻率要求。
A.followup: C11 Part 2 對 meeting space 的 availability 是 weekly minimum；every other week 是否達標？

M10_Q27.stem: A project wishes to submit a program to be considered for inclusion with regard to Feature C12: Diversity and Inclusion. All of the following with the exception of _____ must be included.

options.text: Protocol that eliminates C-suite and creates a company co-op.
Pay equity and transparency (e.g., compensation scale equity, living wage, gender and ethnic pay equity).
Non-discrimination, including discrimination and harassment reporting procedures.

M10_Q27.explanation: C12 Diversity and Inclusion, Part 1 Promote Diversity and Inclusion 的 custom program 列出 diversity/non-discrimination policy、wage equity policy、reporting procedures、training、ERG、annual reports 與 executive-level responsibility；並未要求消除 C-suite 或改成 company co-op。

D.gap: 把標準明列的 diversity policy 誤判為非必要。
D.followup: C12 Part 1 custom program 的政策清單中，diversity、inclusion、non-discrimination policy 是否被明列？

B.gap: 忽略 wage equity 與 pay transparency 是可採要求。
B.followup: C12 Part 1 的 wage equity policy 至少可包含哪些項目，living wage 與 salary range 是否在內？

C.gap: 未辨識 discrimination reporting 是政策核心要求。
C.followup: C12 Part 1 對 anonymous reporting 與 harassment/discrimination follow-up review 有何要求？

M10_Q28.stem: A project in San Francisco, California wants to maximize their diversity and inclusion points via a custom program. To receive the maximum three points for this effort, how many requirements from this list must they implement?  Gender (assigned, identity and/or expression).  Sexual orientation.  Race/Ethnicity.  Age.  Socioeconomic background.  Level of ability.  Other metric(s) as identified by the project or organization.
M10_Q28.explanation: C12 Diversity and Inclusion, Part 1 Promote Diversity and Inclusion 的 custom program 計分表規定：達成 Three requirements 得 1 point、Four 得 2 points、Five 得 3 points；最高 three points 需要達成 five requirements。

A.gap: 把最低得分門檻誤認為最高得分門檻。
A.followup: C12 Part 1 custom program 的表格中，Three requirements 對應幾 points，而最高 three points 對應幾項？

C.gap: 停在 2 points 門檻，未上推到最高點數。
C.followup: 若 Four requirements 只拿 2 points，C12 custom program 要拿 3 points 還差幾項？

B.gap: 把 diversity types 數量誤當 custom requirements 數量。
B.followup: 題幹列的是 diversity types；C12 Part 1 計分表計的是 requirements achieved，兩者是否相同？

M10_Q29.stem: XYZ Corp has offices across the United States. They ask a long-time employee from their Atlanta office to relocate to Los Angeles to help establish their new outfit. They plan to pay for the employee's relocation and provided a $ 1,000.00 increase in pay. The employee has family on the West Coast they will live with upon arriving and expressed how excited they are for this new adventure. Is XYZ Corp in compliance with the standards set forth in Feature C12: Diversity and Inclusion?

options.text: Yes, because XYZ covered the costs of the move and the employee is satisfied.
No, because XYZ needs to provide a living wage, determined by the local cost of living.
No, because XYZ corp needs to provide a merit raise, promotional raise, and a signing bonus for the new role.
Yes, because the employee will not incur the cost of living increase, as a result of living with family.

M10_Q29.explanation: C12 Diversity and Inclusion, Part 1 Promote Diversity and Inclusion 的 wage equity policy 可包含 provision of a living wage to all employees, determined based on local cost of living；搬遷補助或員工主觀滿意不能替代 local living wage 判定。

A.gap: 把 relocation reimbursement 與 living wage 合規混為一談。
A.followup: C12 Part 1 wage equity 看的是所有 employees 的 local cost of living，搬家費補助是否等於 living wage？

D.gap: 用個人住宿安排取代標準要求的當地生活工資。
D.followup: 即使員工暫住家人處，C12 的 living wage 是否仍按 local cost of living 判定？

C.gap: 加入標準未要求的 merit raise、bonus 條件。
C.followup: C12 Part 1 wage equity policy 有要求 promotion raise 或 signing bonus，還是要求 pay equity/living wage 等政策？

M10_Q30.stem: A new corporate headquarters for Salesforce is being built in Austin, TX. The design team wanted the office to fit into the Austin culture and has created every part of the office to be unique, creative, and very bright and bold. The initial employee feedback has been overwhelmingly positive, however, some employees find the loud color schemes to be distracting and overload their senses. Which strategy in Feature C13: Accessibility and Universal Design should Salesforce have consulted before this design language was chosen?
M10_Q30.explanation: C13 Accessibility and Universal Design, Part 1 Integrate Universal Design 要在 developmental and intellectual health 類別納入使用 color、texture、images 與 multi-sensory visually perceptible information，以 accommodate sensory requirements of neurodiverse individuals；過度明亮大膽的色彩造成 sensory overload 正落在此類別。

D.gap: 把 sensory overload 誤歸為 physical access 問題。
D.followup: C13 Part 1 的 physical access 是入口、出口、操作點；loud color schemes 比較像哪一類 sensory requirement？

A.gap: 混淆視覺刺激管理與 wayfinding 導引策略。
A.followup: C13 Part 1 的 wayfinding 著重 signage、tactile maps、symbols；題幹是否在問導航困難？

C.gap: 把設計前的感官包容誤認為營運政策問題。
C.followup: C13 Part 1 operations 例子是 flexible work hours 等政策；色彩與 multi-sensory design 應歸哪類？

M10_Q31.stem: John started working for LMN Corp in California. John suffers from heart complications, and sometimes has issues where he requires immediate medical attention. John usually takes public transit as his main form of transport, but as a result of wildfires, there have been public transportation shutdowns. John has relied on Uber and Lyft as a main transit option. How much should John be reimbursed by LMN Corp for his new expenditures on his transit costs?
M10_Q31.explanation: C14 Emergency Resources, Part 1 Promote Emergency Resources 的 emergency resources 清單包含 rides subsidized by at least 50% to destination of need for emergency situations，包括 public transit shutdown 時從 home to work 的需要。

A.gap: 大幅低估 emergency ride subsidy 的最低比例。
A.followup: C14 Part 1 對 emergency rides subsidy 寫的是 at least 10% 還是 at least 50%？

D.gap: 把補助比例停在半數門檻以下。
D.followup: John 因 wildfire transit shutdown 需改搭 Uber/Lyft，C14 Part 1 的 rides subsidy 最低是多少？

B.gap: 把最低要求誤放大為更高的自願補助。
B.followup: WELL 的 C14 Part 1 要求是 minimum threshold；75% 是否是標準明列的最低值？

M10_Q32.stem: The intent of Feature C18 β: Support for Victims of Domestic Violence is to increase availability and access to support services, resources, and care for victims of domestic abuse. As part of the domestic violence policy, how must paid time off be available to an employee who is a victim of domestic violence?

options.text: At least 10 days and is distinct from other paid time off.

M10_Q32.explanation: C18 β Support for Victims of Domestic Violence, Part 1 Support Victims of Domestic Violence 要求政策提供 at least ten days of leave，paid at full salary or wages，且 leave must be distinct from paid time off, sick leave and family leave。

D.gap: 混淆 domestic violence leave 與一般 sick leave。
D.followup: C18 β Part 1 明定 leave must be distinct from 哪些既有 leave 類型？

C.gap: 忽略標準明列至少十天有薪專屬假。
C.followup: C18 β Part 1 對 victims of domestic violence 的 paid leave 是否允許完全不新增天數？

B.gap: 低估 paid leave 天數，且未確認 distinct 要求。
B.followup: C18 β Part 1 寫的是 at least eight days 還是 at least ten days，薪資替代率又是多少？

M10_Q33.stem: Which of the following does NOT need to be included in Opioid Response training?

options.text: Recognizing the signs of an overdose and immediate steps to take.
General information about opioid use and naloxone.
Calling 911 and informing HR your co-worker may be using banned substances.
How to safely administer naloxone and steps to take following administration.

M10_Q33.explanation: C14 Emergency Resources, Part 2 Provide Opioid Response Kit and Training 要求 opioid emergency training 涵蓋 opioid use and naloxone、recognizing overdose signs and immediate steps、以及 safely administer naloxone and follow-up steps；向 HR 指稱同事使用 banned substances 不是訓練要求。

B.gap: 把 naloxone 基礎知識誤判為訓練外項目。
B.followup: C14 Part 2 的 opioid response training 是否第一項就要求 general information about opioid use and naloxone？

A.gap: 忽略辨識 overdose signs 是訓練核心。
A.followup: C14 Part 2 要 regular occupants 學會 recognizing signs of overdose，以及哪些 immediate steps？

D.gap: 誤以為 naloxone administration 不屬於訓練。
D.followup: C14 Part 2 是否明列 how to safely administer naloxone and steps following administration？

M10_Q34.stem: Green Co. has created a Business Continuity Plan in place in the event there were ever a natural disaster or other events that impacted business. At a minimum, how often does the business continuity team need to meet to revise and discuss the plan that is currently in place for Green Co.?
M10_Q34.explanation: C15 β Emergency Resilience and Recovery, Part 1 Promote Business Continuity 規定 business continuity plan 必須列出 team roles/responsibilities，並讓 business continuity team convene twice annually at minimum to review, test and update the plan。

A.gap: 把 annual review 誤當 team meeting 最低頻率。
A.followup: C15 β Part 1 對 business continuity team 用的是 annually 還是 twice annually at minimum？

D.gap: 把最低頻率提高成 quarterly，超出標準門檻。
D.followup: 若題目問 at minimum，C15 β Part 1 的表述是否要求每季都 convene？

C.gap: 把營運最佳實務誤作 WELL 最低要求。
C.followup: C15 β Part 1 要 review, test and update BCP；標準有寫 monthly meeting 嗎？

M10_Q35.stem: Business continuity planning is critical to help manage business disruption during emergencies. Cola Corp. is constructing an office in Tempe, AZ. Part 1: Promote Buiness Continuity of Feature C15 β: Emergency Resilience and Recovery details that a business continuity plan address at minimum:

options.text: Determines critical business functions, processes, supporting resources and dependencies (e.g., email, internet connectivity, third-party suppliers or service providers, interdependent departments).
Conducts a remote work readiness assessment.

M10_Q35.explanation: C15 β Emergency Resilience and Recovery, Part 1 Promote Business Continuity 要求 BCP 至少包含 critical business functions/dependencies、business impact analysis、remote work readiness assessment，並加上 team roles、continuity strategies 等項目。

A.gap: 只選中 BCP 的單一必要項，漏看其他要求。
A.followup: C15 β Part 1 的 BCP minimum list 是否只包含 critical functions，還包括 BIA 與 remote work readiness？

B.gap: 把 business impact analysis 當成唯一最低要求。
B.followup: C15 β Part 1 除 business impact analysis 外，還要求哪些 business continuity planning elements？

C.gap: 只抓到 remote work readiness，忽略 BCP 全套內容。
C.followup: C15 β Part 1 的 remote work readiness assessment 是 BCP 的一部分，是否足以單獨滿足 at minimum？

M10_Q36.stem: Part 2: Provide Opioid Response Kit and Training of Feature C14: Emergency Resources details requirements for opioid response kits. What must all emergency preparedness or first aid kits include:
M10_Q36.explanation: C14 Emergency Resources, Part 2 Provide Opioid Response Kit and Training 要求 all emergency preparedness or first aid kits include naloxone rescue kits，並附 naloxone preparation/administration instructions 與受訓人員清單。

A.gap: 把一般過敏藥誤認為 opioid response kit 要件。
A.followup: C14 Part 2 的 opioid response kits 明列的是 naloxone rescue kits，還是 antihistamine 類藥品？

D.gap: 把泛稱 OTC medications 當成特定 naloxone 要求。
D.followup: 標準要求 all emergency preparedness or first aid kits include 哪一種 opioid overdose reversal resource？

B.gap: 混淆一般 first aid supplies 與 opioid response 要件。
B.followup: C14 Part 2 關心 opioid emergency；band aids 是否能替代 naloxone rescue kits？

M10_Q37.stem: Feature C14: Emergency Resources provides resources, personnel and training to help organizations respond to diverse emergency situations. In Part 1: Promote Emergency Resources, are project owners required to make tenants participate in practice drills for emergency preparedness and response?

options.text: All staff and tenants must be involved in every drill.
Project owners must provide opportunities for all tenants to participate in drills and emergency, but do not have to mandate tenant participation.
No, practice drills and emergency preparedness are the responsibility of the HR Department for each tenant.
Project owners must mandate all tenants to take place and participate.

M10_Q37.explanation: C03 Emergency Preparedness, Part 1 Develop Emergency Preparedness Plan 要求 regular occupants receive education/training and annual practice drills or exercises for high-risk hazards；C14 Part 1 則是 emergency resources/training availability，並未寫成強制每位 tenant 參與每次 drill。

C.gap: 把 building-level emergency preparedness 推給各 tenant HR。
C.followup: C03 Part 1 的 WELL Core guidance 是 whole building；project owner 是否能只說由各 tenant HR 負責？

D.gap: 把提供 drills/training 誤讀為強制所有 tenant 參與。
D.followup: 標準要求 practice drills or exercises be conducted；這是否等同 mandate every tenant participant？

A.gap: 把演練覆蓋範圍誇大成每次全員必到。
A.followup: C03 Part 1 說 regular occupants receive education/training，但是否規定 all staff and tenants in every drill？

M10_Q38.stem: Feature C15 β: Emergency Resilience and Recovery seeks assist organizations to maintain business function, during and after emergencies. In the case of extended remote work, office closures, or other extreme events requiring a delayed and/or staggered return to the office, how long do projects have to implement the post-occupancy survey?

options.text: Within 1 month after returning to the workplace.
Within 6 months after returning to the workplace.
Within 1 year after returning to the workplace.
Within 3 months after returning to the workplace.

M10_Q38.explanation: C15 β Emergency Resilience and Recovery, Part 3 Facilitate Healthy Re-entry requires consultation with regular occupants prior to and just after re-entry, plus inspection, policy adjustment and communications; the standard text provided does not state a post-occupancy survey deadline such as three months.

A.gap: 選了過短期限，但標準未列此 survey deadline。
A.followup: C15 β Part 3 寫的是 re-entry consultation and communications；是否看到 within 1 month survey requirement？

B.gap: 把未列明的六個月期限套進 re-entry 要求。
B.followup: C15 β Part 3 對 re-entry plan 的條列項目中，有沒有出現 post-occupancy survey within 6 months？

C.gap: 把 annual survey 概念混入 C15 re-entry plan。
C.followup: C15 β Part 3 是 emergency re-entry plan；一年期限是否來自 C04 occupant survey 的 annual cadence？

M10_Q39.stem: How many lactation rooms are needed for a project to comply with Feature C09: New Mother Support?

options.text: A lactation room on every floor.
There are no specific requirements, this is left up to the project team to determine how to best establish the appropriate quantity base on their project's unique circumstances.

M10_Q39.explanation: C09 New Mother Support, Part 2 Design Lactation Room requires at least one dedicated lactation room and also says the quantity must meet current and anticipated employee demand; therefore WELL gives a minimum room presence plus a demand-based quantity rule, not a fixed per-floor count.

C.gap: 套用每兩層一間的標準外推規則。
C.followup: C09 Part 2 有寫 one located on every other floor，還是用 employee demand 決定數量？

B.gap: 把每層配置誤當 lactation room 明文要求。
B.followup: 若標準要求 quantity meets current and anticipated employee demand，是否必然等於 every floor one room？

D.gap: 誤以為 C09 對 lactation room 沒有任何最低要求
D.followup: C09 Part 2 要求至少一間 dedicated lactation room，這還能算『沒有具體要求』嗎？

M10_Q40.stem: A new residential tower is being constructed in Minneapolis. For the project to receive the maximum number of points (2) in Feature C16 β: Housing Equity, how many of the units need to be allocated for tenants whose incomes are at or below an income limit relative to local median household income?
M10_Q40.explanation: C16 β Housing Equity, Part 1 Allocate Affordable Units 的計分表規定，若要取得 2 points，需將 100% units allocated 給 income at 0-80% of local median 的 tenants；20% 或 40% allocated 只對應 1 point。

D.gap: 把 1 point 的 20% 配置誤認為最高分。
D.followup: C16 β Part 1 表格中，20% or more allocated 對應幾 points，而 2 points 對應多少 units？

A.gap: 停在另一個 1 point 門檻，未看最高分列。
A.followup: C16 β Housing Equity 對 40% or more allocated 的 income band 與 points 是什麼？

C.gap: 選了表格未列的中間比例。
C.followup: C16 β Part 1 的 units allocated 表格是否有 50% 這一列，還是只有 20%、40%、100%？

M10_Q41.stem: Part 1: Allocate Affordable Units of Feature C16 β: Housing Equity requires projects to assign a percentage of units is allocated for tenant show incomes are at or below an income limit. Total annual housing costs (defined as rent and utilities) paid by affordable unit tenants must be less than what percent of the income limit selected in the requirement?
M10_Q41.explanation: C16 β Housing Equity, Part 1 Allocate Affordable Units 要求 affordable unit tenants paid total annual housing costs, defined as rent and utilities, less than 30% of the income limit selected in requirement (a)。

B.gap: 把 housing cost burden 上限低估為 25%。
B.followup: C16 β Part 1 requirement b 對 rent and utilities 的上限，是 less than 25% 還是 30%？

D.gap: 把可負擔住房成本上限放寬到標準以上。
D.followup: 若 total annual housing costs 達 income limit 的 45%，是否仍符合 C16 β 的 less than 30%？

C.gap: 混淆 income eligibility band 與 housing cost burden。
C.followup: C16 β Part 1 的 50% 常出現在 income limit band，是否等於 rent and utilities 上限？

M10_Q42.stem: Affordable housing is a problem globally with families forced to spend a significant share of their income in housing cots making it hard for them to cover basic needs. In projects with 10 or more affordable housing units, at least ___ of allocated units must have two or more bedrooms and at least ___ of allocated units must have three or more bedrooms.
M10_Q42.explanation: C16 β Housing Equity, Part 1 Allocate Affordable Units 規定，在 projects with 10 or more affordable housing units 中，至少 50% of allocated units must have two or more bedrooms，且至少 10% must have three or more bedrooms。

A.gap: 高估二房與三房比例，未按標準門檻。
A.followup: C16 β Part 1 requirement e 對 two or more bedrooms 與 three or more bedrooms 分別是多少？

C.gap: 把二房比例低估、三房比例高估。
C.followup: 若有 10+ affordable units，C16 β 要求至少半數具 two or more bedrooms，三房比例是否為 20%？

D.gap: 把所有 affordable units 都需多房化，過度推論。
D.followup: C16 β Part 1 是否要求 100% allocated units 都有 two or more bedrooms？

M10_Q43.stem: Part 1: Disclose Labor Practices of Feature C17 β: Responsible Labor Practices requires a comprehensive mapping of the project or organization’s structure, operations, and supply chains is conducted annually for Tier 1 suppliers in the following sectors with the exception of:
M10_Q43.explanation: C17 β Responsible Labor Practices, Part 1 Disclose Labor Practices 要求 annual mapping of Tier 1 suppliers in construction, cleaning, catering, security and maintenance sectors as applicable；IT Support 不在明列 sector 清單內。

C.gap: 把 construction 這個明列高風險 sector 排除。
C.followup: C17 β Part 1 的 Tier 1 supplier mapping 清單第一項是否就是 Construction？

B.gap: 忽略 cleaning sector 被標準明列為 mapping 範圍。
B.followup: C17 β Issue 特別提到 cleaning sector 風險；Part 1 清單是否包含 Cleaning？

D.gap: 把 security 誤判為未列入供應商 sector。
D.followup: C17 β Part 1 的 five sectors 中，Security 是否與 Maintenance 一起被列出？

M10_Q44.stem: The intent of Feature C17 β: Responsible Labor Practices is to promote organizational commitment to responsible labor practices in order to address modern slavery in the supply chain and support human rights. The Global Slavery Index estimates that in 2016 there were over 40 million victims of modern slavery worldwide. How many people are forced labor globally.
M10_Q44.explanation: C17 β Responsible Labor Practices 的 Issue 說 Global Slavery Index 估計 2016 年有 over 40 million victims of modern slavery worldwide，其中 24.9 million were in forced labor；此數字支撐 Part 1 Disclose Labor Practices 的 modern slavery risk assessment。

D.gap: 大幅低估 forced labor 人數，未對上 Issue 數字。
D.followup: C17 β Issue 同一句區分 modern slavery total 與 forced labor；forced labor 是 10 million 嗎？

A.gap: 選了未被標準列出的中間估計值。
A.followup: C17 β Issue 寫 over 40 million victims，其中 forced labor 的具體數字是多少 million？

C.gap: 把 forced labor 人數誇大且超過 total estimate。
C.followup: 若 modern slavery victims worldwide 是 over 40 million，forced labor 是否可能是 69 million？

M10_Q45.stem: Feature C10: Family Support requires employers to provide this option to eligible employees:

options.text: Use unpaid days for the care of a spouse, domestic partner, child, dependent, parent, parent-in- law, grandparent, grandchild or sibling.
Use paid sick time or personal days for the care of anyone.
Use paid sick time or personal days for the care of a spouse or child only.

M12_Q06.stem: Which of the following is NOT a requirement for Part 2: Propose Innovation of Feature I01: Innovate WELL?

options.text: Must demonstrate existing scientific, medical and/or industry research.
Must be consistent with applicable laws and regulations and leading practices in building design and operations.
Must submit the outline of time and cost of innovation and its overall impact on the project.
Positively impacts project occupants by supporting health and well-being in a novel way that is not covered in WELL v2.

M12_Q06.explanation: I01 Innovate WELL – Part 1 Propose Innovations 要求 innovation proposal 正向影響 occupants、以 WELL v2 未涵蓋的 novel way 支持 health and well-being、由 existing scientific, medical and/or industry research substantiated，並符合 laws, regulations and leading practices。標準未要求提交 innovation 的 time and cost outline 作為此 Part 的必要條件。

B.gap: 把實際法規與 leading practices 要求誤判為非必要條件。
B.followup: I01 Part 1 條件中是否明列 consistent with applicable laws and regulations and leading practices？

A.gap: 忽略 innovation proposal 必須有 scientific、medical 或 industry research 佐證。
A.followup: I01 Part 1 為何要求 existing research substantiation？novel intervention 可以只靠創意主張嗎？

D.gap: 漏掉 I01 的核心：novel way 正向影響 occupants 且 WELL v2 未涵蓋。
D.followup: I01 Part 1 對 novel intervention 的健康影響與 WELL v2 coverage 兩個條件是什麼？

M12_Q07.stem: What are some ways a project team can earn an innovation point for Feature I04: Gateway to Wellness?

options.text: Complete an independent health and wellness program within the last three years.
Hire a WELL AP to create a wellness program.

M12_Q07.explanation: I04 Gateways to Wellness – Part 1 Complete Health and Wellness Programs 要求 within the last three years, the project has completed an independent health and wellness program, or an initiative approved by IWBI and listed on IWBI's website。重點是已完成且在三年內，而不是只做 survey 或聘請 WELL AP。

A.gap: 把單次 annual wellness survey 誤當成已完成的 health and wellness program。
A.followup: I04 Part 1 要求 completed independent program；annual survey 是否等同完整且 IWBI 認可的 program？

D.gap: 混淆 I04 wellness program 與 I02 WELL AP 專業參與點數。
D.followup: 聘請 WELL AP 對應哪個 Innovation feature？I04 Part 1 真正要求完成的是什麼類型 program？

C.gap: 只抓到 wellness program 字樣，漏掉 independent、completed 與三年內條件。
C.followup: I04 Part 1 除了 health and wellness program，還要求它在何時完成、是否需 independent 或 IWBI approved？

M12_Q08.stem: What is the primary reason that IWBI aligned with Green Building Rating Systems such as LEED and BREEAM?

options.text: To help reduce overall costs to the project.
To balance sustainability and human health considerations.
To be more attractive to the market.

M12_Q08.explanation: I05 Green Building Rating Systems 的 Summary 說 WELL aligns with leading green building rating systems to recognize projects that balance environmental sustainability with human health。其核心理由是 balancing sustainability and human health considerations，使 people and planet can thrive。

C.gap: 把 I05 alignment 誤解為市場吸引力策略，而非健康與永續平衡。
C.followup: I05 Summary 說 IWBI 對齊 green building systems 是為了 market appeal，還是為了哪兩種考量的平衡？

A.gap: 將專案成本降低當成 I05 目的，但標準未把 cost reduction 列為主因。
A.followup: I05 Summary 的 rationale 有提到 overall project costs 嗎？它如何連結 sustainability 與 human health？

D.gap: 只看到環境減排面，漏掉 I05 必須同時連結 human health。
D.followup: Reducing greenhouse gases 可能支持 sustainability，但 I05 Summary 還要求與哪個 human-centered 目標並列？

M12_Q09.stem: A project team wants to receive an innovation point for their WELL Certified Building. What are some of the ways they can do this?

options.text: Offer tours on the buildings website up to 6 times per year.
They can advertise WELL Features and Benefits in the community.
Offer a public tour that is listed in the WELL Certified spaces directory.
Offer a public tour three times per year.

M12_Q09.explanation: I03 Experience WELL Certification – Part 1 Offer WELL Educational Tours 要求 free, public tours of the WELL Certified space，且需 listed in the public directory of tours for WELL Certified spaces。完整門檻還包括 at least six times per year、at least 50 people per year、每個 WELL concept 至少一個 destination，並透過公開渠道宣傳。

B.gap: 只抓到公開宣傳概念，漏掉實體 public tours 與 directory 要求。
B.followup: I03 Part 1 的 advertised through public channel 是輔助條件；它還要求 tours 如何被 listed？

D.gap: 把三次 public tour 當成達標，低於 I03 每年至少六次門檻。
D.followup: I03 Part 1 明列 tours offered at least six times per year；三次是否滿足 minimum frequency？

A.gap: 混淆網站宣傳與 tour 本身，且把至少六次誤寫成最多六次。
A.followup: I03 Part 1 要 tours offered at least six times per year；up to six 和 at least six 差在哪裡？

M12_Q10.stem: What feature should a project use to submit innovation proposals?

options.text: Innovation proposals are submitted via email to IWBI.
You do not need to use a feature in order to submit an innovation proposal.

M12_Q10.explanation: Innovation concept overview 明確說 projects should use Feature I01: Innovate WELL to submit innovation proposals。I01 – Part 1 Propose Innovations 提供 proposal 必須滿足的要求，包括 novel occupant health impact、research substantiation 與符合法規及 leading practices。

D.gap: 混淆 I03 的 educational tours 與 I01 的 innovation proposal submission。
D.followup: I03 是 pre-approved strategy 還是提交 novel innovation proposal 的 feature？標準 overview 指向哪個 feature？

C.gap: 忽略 Innovation overview 明確要求透過 I01 提交 innovation proposals。
C.followup: 標準說 projects should use which feature to submit innovation proposals？是否允許不透過 feature？

A.gap: 把行政聯絡方式想像成提交路徑，未依 I01 feature 要求判斷。
A.followup: I01 Part 1 列的是 proposal requirements；標準是否把 email to IWBI 寫成正式 submission feature？

M12_Q11.stem: How many innovation points can a project receive?
M12_Q11.explanation: Innovation concept overview states that projects may receive up to 10 points in Innovation。I01 Innovate WELL 本身也標示 WELL Certification: 10 Pt | WELL Core: 10 Pt，表示 Innovation concept 的最高可得點數為 10。

B.gap: 大幅低估 Innovation concept 上限，可能只想到少數預核准策略。
B.followup: Innovation overview 對整個 concept 的 point cap 是多少？I01 頁首列出的 WELL Certification points 為何？

A.gap: 接近但仍低估上限，未對照 overview 的 explicit cap。
A.followup: 若標準明寫 projects may receive up to 10 points in Innovation，八分是來自哪個條文？

D.gap: 把 Innovation 可得分數高估，忽略 concept cap 限制。
D.followup: I05 雖有 five points，I01 也有多分，但整個 Innovation concept 是否能超過 10 points？

M12_Q12.stem: What is the intent of the Innovation Concept?

options.text: to pave the way for projects to do what they want.
to pave the way for projects to develop unique strategies for creating healthy environments.
to pave the way for projects to represent different strategies.
to pave the way for projects to create wellness movements in their facilities.

M12_Q12.explanation: Innovation concept overview states that Innovation features pave the way for projects to develop unique strategies for creating healthier environments。它進一步說 Innovation features address a novel concept or strategy not already included in WELL features，並以最多 10 points 支持這類策略。

A.gap: 把 Innovation 誤解成任意自由發揮，忽略健康、novelty 與審查要求。
A.followup: Innovation concept 是否允許 projects do what they want，還是仍需符合 I01 的 health impact 與 research criteria？

C.gap: 抓到 strategy 字樣，但漏掉 unique 與 creating healthier environments 的目的。
C.followup: Innovation overview 中 strategies 的目標是 merely different，還是要用 unique approaches 創造 healthier environments？

D.gap: 把 wellness movement 語感當成標準 intent，未扣回 healthier environments。
D.followup: 標準描述 Innovation intent 時，用的是 wellness movements，還是 creating healthier environments？
